title: Smiling Regulates Emotion During Traumatic Recollection
summary: We study when, where, and why 978 Holocaust survivors smile in video testimonies. We create an automatic smile detection model from facial features with an F1 of 85% and annotate detected smiles under two established taxonomies of smiling. We produce narrative features on 1,083,417 transcript sentences as well as emotional valence from three different modalities: audio, eye gaze, and text transcript. Smiling rates are significantly correlated with specific semantic topics, narrative structures, and temporal syntaxes across the entire corpus. Smiles often occur during periods of intense negative affect; these negative-affect smiles improve the valence trajectory of surrounding sentences significantly across all three modalities. Smiling reduces eye dynamics and blink rates, and the strength of both of these effects is also modulated by narrative valence. Taken together, we conclude that smiling plays a critical role in regulating emotion and social interaction during traumatic recollection.

AI.tldr: 研究分析了978名大屠杀幸存者视频证词中的微笑行为，开发了自动微笑检测模型，发现微笑与特定语义主题、叙事结构和时间句法相关，微笑在负面情感时期出现并能改善周围句子的情感轨迹，起到情绪调节作用。
AI.motivation: 研究大屠杀幸存者在视频证词中微笑的时间、地点和原因，探索微笑在创伤回忆中的情感调节和社会互动功能。
AI.method: 开发自动微笑检测模型（F1分数85%），使用两种微笑分类法标注检测到的微笑，对1,083,417个转录句子提取叙事特征，并从音频、眼动注视和文本转录三个模态获取情感效价。
AI.result: 微笑率与特定语义主题、叙事结构和时间句法显著相关；微笑常出现在强烈负面情感时期，这些负面情感微笑能显著改善周围句子的情感轨迹；微笑减少眼部动态和眨眼频率，这些效应的强度受叙事效价调节。
AI.conclusion: 微笑在创伤回忆过程中对情绪调节和社会互动起着关键作用。

title: AutoAWG: Adverse Weather Generation with Adaptive Multi-Controls for Automotive Videos
summary: Perception robustness under adverse weather remains a critical challenge for autonomous driving, with the core bottleneck being the scarcity of real-world video data in adverse weather. Existing weather generation approaches struggle to balance visual quality and annotation reusability. We present AutoAWG, a controllable Adverse Weather video Generation framework for Autonomous driving. Our method employs a semantics-guided adaptive fusion of multiple controls to balance strong weather stylization with high-fidelity preservation of safety-critical targets; leverages a vanishing point-anchored temporal synthesis strategy to construct training sequences from static images, thereby reducing reliance on synthetic data; and adopts masked training to enhance long-horizon generation stability. On the nuScenes validation set, AutoAWG significantly outperforms prior state-of-the-art methods: without first-frame conditioning, FID and FVD are relatively reduced by 50.0% and 16.1%; with first-frame conditioning, they are further reduced by 8.7% and 7.2%, respectively. Extensive qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate advantages in style fidelity, temporal consistency, and semantic--structural integrity, underscoring the practical value of AutoAWG for improving downstream perception in autonomous driving. Our code is available at: https://github.com/higherhu/AutoAWG

AI.tldr: AutoAWG是一个可控的恶劣天气视频生成框架，通过语义引导的自适应融合、消失点锚定的时间合成和掩码训练，在视觉质量和标注可重用性之间取得平衡，显著提升了自动驾驶感知在恶劣天气下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的感知鲁棒性面临关键挑战，核心瓶颈是真实世界恶劣天气视频数据的稀缺性。现有的天气生成方法难以平衡视觉质量和标注可重用性。
AI.method: 1) 采用语义引导的自适应多控制融合，平衡强天气风格化与安全关键目标的高保真度；2) 利用消失点锚定的时间合成策略从静态图像构建训练序列，减少对合成数据的依赖；3) 采用掩码训练增强长时域生成稳定性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes验证集上，AutoAWG显著优于先前最先进方法：无首帧条件时，FID和FVD相对降低50.0%和16.1%；有首帧条件时，进一步降低8.7%和7.2%。在风格保真度、时间一致性和语义-结构完整性方面均表现出优势。
AI.conclusion: AutoAWG通过创新的可控恶劣天气视频生成框架，有效解决了自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的数据稀缺问题，具有提升下游感知性能的实际价值，为自动驾驶系统在复杂天气条件下的鲁棒性提供了重要支持。

title: Can We Build Scene Graphs, Not Classify Them? FlowSG: Progressive Image-Conditioned Scene Graph Generation with Flow Matching
summary: Scene Graph Generation (SGG) unifies object localization and visual relationship reasoning by predicting boxes and subject-predicate-object triples. Yet most pipelines treat SGG as a one-shot, deterministic classification problem rather than a genuinely progressive, generative task. We propose FlowSG, which recasts SGG as continuous-time transport on a hybrid discrete-continuous state: starting from a noised graph, the model progressively grows an image-conditioned scene graph through constraint-aware refinements that jointly synthesize nodes (objects) and edges (predicates). Specifically, we first leverage a VQ-VAE to quantize a scene graph (e.g., continuous visual features) into compact, predictable tokens; a graph Transformer then (i) predicts a conditional velocity field to transport continuous geometry (boxes) and (ii) updates discrete posteriors for categorical tokens (object features and predicate labels), coupling semantics and geometry via flow-conditioned message aggregation. Training combines flow-matching losses for geometry with a discrete-flow objective for tokens, yielding few-step inference and plug-and-play compatibility with standard detectors and segmenters. Extensive experiments on VG and PSG under closed- and open-vocabulary protocols show consistent gains in predicate R/mR and graph-level metrics, validating the mixed discrete-continuous generative formulation over one-shot classification baselines, with an average improvement of about 3 points over the state-of-the-art USG-Par.

AI.tldr: FlowSG将场景图生成重新定义为混合离散-连续状态上的连续时间传输任务，通过约束感知的渐进式细化来联合合成节点和边，相比一次性分类方法在多项指标上取得显著提升。
AI.motivation: 当前大多数场景图生成方法将其视为一次性确定性分类问题，而非真正的渐进式生成任务。这限制了模型对复杂视觉关系推理的能力，需要更符合场景图生成本质的生成式方法。
AI.method: 1. 使用VQ-VAE将场景图量化为紧凑可预测的token；2. 采用图Transformer预测条件速度场来传输连续几何（边界框）并更新离散分类token的后验分布；3. 通过流条件消息聚合耦合语义和几何信息；4. 结合几何的流匹配损失和token的离散流目标进行训练。
AI.result: 在VG和PSG数据集上的闭集和开放词汇协议实验显示，在谓词R/mR和图级指标上均取得一致提升，平均比当前最佳方法USG-Par提高约3个百分点，验证了混合离散-连续生成式方法的优越性。
AI.conclusion: FlowSG通过将场景图生成重新构建为连续时间传输任务，实现了渐进式生成过程，相比传统一次性分类方法在性能上有显著改进，为场景图生成提供了新的生成式框架。

title: Compile to Compress: Boosting Formal Theorem Provers by Compiler Outputs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in formal theorem proving, yet state-of-the-art performance often necessitates prohibitive test-time compute via massive roll-outs or extended context windows. In this work, we address this scalability bottleneck by exploiting an informative structure in formal verification: the observation that compilers map a vast space of diverse proof attempts to a compact set of structured failure modes. We introduce a learning-to-refine framework that leverages this compression to perform efficient learning and proof exploration. We perform tree search that corrects errors locally conditioned on explicit verifier feedback, thereby circumventing the costs associated with accumulating a long history of proof attempts. Extensive evaluations show that our method consistently amplifies the reasoning capabilities of base provers across varying scales. Notably, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on PutnamBench among publicly reported $\sim$8B and $\sim$32B parameter models under comparable test-time budgets, offering a scalable paradigm for next-generation verifier-guided reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习优化的定理证明框架，通过利用编译器将大量证明尝试映射到紧凑失败模式的结构特性，实现高效学习和证明探索，显著降低了计算成本。
AI.motivation: 当前大型语言模型在形式定理证明中表现出潜力，但最先进性能通常需要大量测试时计算（通过大规模展开或长上下文窗口），存在可扩展性瓶颈。本文旨在解决这一瓶颈。
AI.method: 引入学习优化框架，利用形式验证中的结构化特性：编译器将多样化的证明尝试映射到紧凑的失败模式集合。采用树搜索方法，基于验证器反馈局部修正错误，避免累积长证明历史带来的成本。
AI.result: 广泛评估表明，该方法在不同规模下都能持续增强基础证明器的推理能力。在PutnamBench上，在可比较的测试时预算下，该方法在公开报告的约8B和约32B参数模型中实现了最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为下一代验证器引导的推理提供了一个可扩展的范式，通过利用形式验证中的结构化压缩特性，有效解决了大型语言模型在定理证明中的可扩展性瓶颈问题。

title: On Solving the Multiple Variable Gapped Longest Common Subsequence Problem
summary: This paper addresses the Variable Gapped Longest Common Subsequence (VGLCS) problem, a generalization of the classical LCS problem involving flexible gap constraints between consecutive solutions' characters. The problem arises in molecular sequence comparison, where structural distance constraints between residues must be respected, and in time-series analysis where events are required to occur within specified temporal delays. We propose a search framework based on the root-based state graph representation, in which the state space comprises a generally large number of rooted state subgraphs. To cope with the resulting combinatorial explosion, an iterative beam search strategy is employed, dynamically maintaining a global pool of promising candidate root nodes, enabling effective control of diversification across iterations. To exploit the search for high-quality solutions, several known heuristics from the LCS literature are utilized into the standalone beam search procedure. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive computational study on the VGLCS problem comprising 320 synthetic instances with up to 10 input sequences and up to 500 characters. Experimental results show robustness of the designed approach over the baseline beam search in comparable runtimes.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于根状态图表示和迭代束搜索的框架，用于解决具有灵活间隙约束的变间隙最长公共子序列问题，在合成实例上展示了优于基线方法的性能。
AI.motivation: VGLCS问题是经典LCS问题的泛化，在分子序列比较（需要满足残基间的结构距离约束）和时间序列分析（事件需要在指定时间延迟内发生）中有重要应用，但现有研究缺乏全面的计算分析。
AI.method: 采用基于根状态图的搜索框架，将状态空间表示为多个根状态子图；使用迭代束搜索策略动态维护有希望的候选根节点池以控制组合爆炸；结合LCS文献中的启发式方法提升搜索质量。
AI.result: 在包含320个合成实例（最多10个输入序列，最多500个字符）的首次全面计算研究中，所设计方法在可比运行时间内表现出优于基线束搜索的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于根状态图表示和迭代束搜索的框架能有效处理VGLCS问题，为分子序列比较和时间序列分析等实际应用提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Vision-Based Human Awareness Estimation for Enhanced Safety and Efficiency of AMRs in Industrial Warehouses
summary: Ensuring human safety is of paramount importance in warehouse environments that feature mixed traffic of human workers and autonomous mobile robots (AMRs). Current approaches often treat humans as generic dynamic obstacles, leading to conservative AMR behaviors like slowing down or detouring, even when workers are fully aware and capable of safely sharing space. This paper presents a real-time vision-based method to estimate human awareness of an AMR using a single RGB camera. We integrate state-of-the-art 3D human pose lifting with head orientation estimation to ascertain a human's position relative to the AMR and their viewing cone, thereby determining if the human is aware of the AMR. The entire pipeline is validated using synthetically generated data within NVIDIA Isaac Sim, a robust physics-accurate robotics simulation environment. Experimental results confirm that our system reliably detects human positions and their attention in real time, enabling AMRs to safely adapt their motion based on human awareness. This enhancement is crucial for improving both safety and operational efficiency in industrial and factory automation settings.

AI.tldr: 提出基于单目RGB相机的实时视觉方法，用于估计人类对自主移动机器人(AMR)的感知状态，通过3D人体姿态重建和头部朝向估计来判断人类是否注意到AMR，从而让AMR根据人类感知状态安全调整运动。
AI.motivation: 在仓库环境中，人类工人与自主移动机器人(AMR)混合交通场景下，现有方法通常将人类视为通用动态障碍物，导致AMR行为过于保守（如减速或绕行），即使工人完全意识到并能安全共享空间。这影响了操作效率。
AI.method: 使用单目RGB相机实时估计人类对AMR的感知状态，整合最先进的3D人体姿态重建技术和头部朝向估计方法，确定人类相对于AMR的位置及其视线锥，从而判断人类是否注意到AMR。整个流程在NVIDIA Isaac Sim物理精确机器人仿真环境中使用合成数据进行验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该系统能够可靠地实时检测人类位置及其注意力状态，使AMR能够根据人类感知状态安全调整运动。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过准确估计人类对AMR的感知状态，使AMR能够更智能地调整行为，在确保安全的同时提高工业自动化环境中的操作效率，解决了现有方法过于保守的问题。

title: Easy Samples Are All You Need: Self-Evolving LLMs via Data-Efficient Reinforcement Learning
summary: Previous LLMs-based RL studies typically follow either supervised learning with high annotation costs, or unsupervised paradigms using voting or entropy-based rewards. However, their performance remains far from satisfactory due to the substantial annotation cost and issues such as model collapse or reward hacking. To address these issues, we introduce a new perspective inspired by cognitive learning theory and propose a novel approach called EasyRL. The core of EasyRL is to simulate the human cognitive acquisition curve by integrating reliable knowledge transfer from easy labeled data with a progressive divide-and-conquer strategy that tackles increasingly difficult unlabeled data. Specifically, we initialize a warm-up model using supervised RL with few-shot labeled data. This is followed by a divide-and-conquer pseudo-labeling strategy on difficult unlabeled data, combining consistency-based selection for low-uncertainty cases and reflection-based resolution for medium-uncertainty cases. Finally, difficulty-progressive self-training with iterative pseudo-labeling and RL further strengthens the model's reasoning capability. EasyRL provides a unified self-evolving framework that facilitates data-efficient post-training of LLMs. Experimental results on mathematical and scientific benchmarks demonstrate that EasyRL, using only 10% of easy labeled data, consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: EasyRL提出了一种基于认知学习理论的新方法，通过整合少量标注数据和渐进式分治策略，在仅使用10%标注数据的情况下，在数学和科学基准上超越了现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的强化学习方法存在标注成本高、模型崩溃或奖励黑客等问题，性能不尽如人意。需要一种更高效、数据利用率更高的方法来提升LLM的推理能力。
AI.method: 1) 使用少量标注数据进行监督RL初始化模型；2) 对困难未标注数据采用分治伪标注策略：低不确定性情况使用一致性选择，中等不确定性情况使用反思解决；3) 难度渐进的自训练结合迭代伪标注和RL进一步强化模型推理能力。
AI.result: 在数学和科学基准测试中，EasyRL仅使用10%的标注数据，就能持续超越最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: EasyRL提供了一个统一的自演化框架，促进了LLM的数据高效后训练，通过模拟人类认知获取曲线，有效解决了现有RL方法的局限性。

title: Beyond One Output: Visualizing and Comparing Distributions of Language Model Generations
summary: Users typically interact with and evaluate language models via single outputs, but each output is just one sample from a broad distribution of possible completions. This interaction hides distributional structure such as modes, uncommon edge cases, and sensitivity to small prompt changes, leading users to over-generalize from anecdotes when iterating on prompts for open-ended tasks. Informed by a formative study with researchers who use LMs (n=13) examining when stochasticity matters in practice, how they reason about distributions over language, and where current workflows break down, we introduce GROVE. GROVE is an interactive visualization that represents multiple LM generations as overlapping paths through a text graph, revealing shared structure, branching points, and clusters while preserving access to raw outputs. We evaluate across three crowdsourced user studies (N=47, 44, and 40 participants) targeting complementary distributional tasks. Our results support a hybrid workflow: graph summaries improve structural judgments such as assessing diversity, while direct output inspection remains stronger for detail-oriented questions.

AI.tldr: GROVE是一个交互式可视化工具，通过文本图展示语言模型的多个生成结果，帮助用户理解输出分布的结构特征，如模式、分支点和聚类。
AI.motivation: 用户通常通过单个输出来评估语言模型，但这隐藏了输出分布的结构特征（如模式、边缘案例、对提示微小变化的敏感性），导致用户从个别案例过度泛化，在开放式任务的提示迭代中产生偏差。
AI.method: 首先进行形成性研究（n=13）了解研究人员在实践中如何处理随机性、如何推理语言分布以及当前工作流程的痛点。然后开发GROVE可视化工具，将多个LM生成表示为文本图中的重叠路径，揭示共享结构、分支点和聚类，同时保留对原始输出的访问。
AI.result: 通过三个众包用户研究（N=47, 44, 40）评估，结果显示混合工作流程最有效：图摘要改善了结构判断（如评估多样性），而直接输出检查在细节导向问题上表现更好。
AI.conclusion: GROVE可视化工具能够有效帮助用户理解语言模型的输出分布结构，支持混合工作流程：使用图摘要进行结构分析，结合直接输出检查处理细节问题，从而改善用户对LM输出的理解和评估。

title: ARES: Adaptive Red-Teaming and End-to-End Repair of Policy-Reward System
summary:
Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is central to aligning Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it introduces a critical vulnerability: an imperfect Reward Model (RM) can become a single point of failure when it fails to penalize unsafe behaviors. While existing red-teaming approaches primarily target policy-level weaknesses, they overlook what we term systemic weaknesses cases where both the core LLM and the RM fail in tandem.
  We present ARES, a framework that systematically discovers and mitigates such dual vulnerabilities. ARES employs a ``Safety Mentor'' that dynamically composes semantically coherent adversarial prompts by combining structured component types (topics, personas, tactics, goals) and generates corresponding malicious and safe responses. This dual-targeting approach exposes weaknesses in both the core LLM and the RM simultaneously. Using the vulnerabilities gained, ARES implements a two-stage repair process: first fine-tuning the RM to better detect harmful content, then leveraging the improved RM to optimize the core model. Experiments across multiple adversarial safety benchmarks demonstrate that ARES substantially enhances safety robustness while preserving model capabilities, establishing a new paradigm for comprehensive RLHF safety alignment.

AI.tldr: ARES框架通过同时攻击核心LLM和奖励模型来发现RLHF中的系统性弱点，并采用两阶段修复方法提升模型安全性
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF方法中，不完美的奖励模型可能成为单点故障，而传统红队测试主要针对策略级弱点，忽略了核心LLM和奖励模型同时失效的系统性弱点
AI.method: ARES采用"安全导师"动态组合语义连贯的对抗性提示（包含主题、角色、策略、目标等结构化组件），生成恶意和安全响应，同时暴露核心LLM和奖励模型的弱点，然后进行两阶段修复：先微调奖励模型以更好检测有害内容，再用改进的奖励模型优化核心模型
AI.result: 在多个对抗性安全基准测试中，ARES显著增强了安全鲁棒性，同时保持了模型能力，为全面的RLHF安全对齐建立了新范式
AI.conclusion: ARES框架通过系统性发现和缓解核心LLM与奖励模型的双重漏洞，为解决RLHF中的系统性弱点提供了有效方法，提升了大型语言模型的安全对齐效果

title: DanceCrafter: Fine-Grained Text-Driven Controllable Dance Generation via Choreographic Syntax
summary: Text-driven controllable dance generation remains under-explored, primarily due to the severe scarcity of high-quality datasets and the inherent difficulty of articulating complex choreographies. Characterizing dance is particularly challenging owing to its intricate spatial dynamics, strong directionality, and the highly decoupled movements of distinct body parts. To overcome these bottlenecks, we bridge principles from dance studies, human anatomy, and biomechanics to propose \textit{Choreographic Syntax}, a novel theoretical framework with a tailored annotation system. Grounded in this syntax, we combine professional dance archives with high-fidelity motion capture data to construct \textbf{DanceFlow}, the most fine-grained dance dataset to date. It encompasses 41 hours of high-quality motions paired with 6.34 million words of detailed descriptions. At the model level, we introduce \textbf{DanceCrafter}, a tailored motion transformer built upon the Momentum Human Rig. To circumvent optimization instabilities, we construct a continuous manifold motion representation paired with a hybrid normalization strategy. Furthermore, we design an anatomy-aware loss to explicitly regulate the decoupled nature of body parts. Together, these adaptations empower DanceCrafter to achieve the high-fidelity and stable generation of complex dance sequences. Extensive evaluations and user studies demonstrate our state-of-the-art performance in motion quality, fine-grained controllability, and generation naturalness.

AI.tldr: 提出Choreographic Syntax理论框架和DanceFlow数据集，开发DanceCrafter模型实现文本驱动的精细可控舞蹈生成
AI.motivation: 文本驱动的可控舞蹈生成面临高质量数据集稀缺和复杂舞蹈动作难以描述的挑战，需要解决舞蹈的空间动态性、方向性和身体部位解耦运动等特性
AI.method: 1. 提出Choreographic Syntax理论框架和标注系统；2. 构建DanceFlow数据集（41小时高质量动作+634万词描述）；3. 开发基于Momentum Human Rig的DanceCrafter模型，采用连续流形运动表示、混合归一化策略和解剖感知损失函数
AI.result: 在运动质量、精细可控性和生成自然度方面达到最先进水平，通过广泛评估和用户研究验证了性能优势
AI.conclusion: 通过理论框架、高质量数据集和专门模型设计的结合，成功实现了高保真、稳定的复杂舞蹈序列生成，解决了文本驱动舞蹈生成的关键瓶颈

title: Curiosity-Critic: Cumulative Prediction Error Improvement as a Tractable Intrinsic Reward for World Model Training
summary: Local prediction-error-based curiosity rewards focus on the current transition without considering the world model's cumulative prediction error across all visited transitions. We introduce Curiosity-Critic, which grounds its intrinsic reward in the improvement of this cumulative objective, and show that it reduces to a tractable per-step form: the difference between the current prediction error and the asymptotic error baseline of the current state transition. We estimate this baseline online with a learned critic co-trained alongside the world model; regressing a single scalar, the critic converges well before the world model saturates, redirecting exploration toward learnable transitions without oracle knowledge of the noise floor. The reward is higher for learnable transitions and collapses toward the baseline for stochastic ones, effectively separating epistemic (reducible) from aleatoric (irreducible) prediction error online. Prior prediction-error curiosity formulations, from Schmidhuber (1991) to learned-feature-space variants, emerge as special cases corresponding to specific approximations of this baseline. Experiments on a stochastic grid world show that Curiosity-Critic outperforms prediction-error and visitation-count baselines in convergence speed and final world model accuracy.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Curiosity-Critic方法，通过基于世界模型累积预测误差改进的内在奖励来指导探索，使用在线学习的critic估计状态转移的渐近误差基线，有效区分可学习的认知误差和不可约的随机误差。
AI.motivation: 现有基于局部预测误差的好奇心奖励只关注当前转移，忽略了世界模型在所有访问过的转移上的累积预测误差。需要一种能够基于累积目标改进的内在奖励机制。
AI.method: 提出Curiosity-Critic方法，其内在奖励基于累积预测误差目标的改进，可简化为可处理的每步形式：当前预测误差与当前状态转移渐近误差基线的差值。通过在线学习的critic与世界模型协同训练来估计这个基线。
AI.result: 在随机网格世界实验中，Curiosity-Critic在收敛速度和最终世界模型准确性方面优于预测误差和访问计数基线方法。critic在世界模型饱和前就能良好收敛，将探索引导到可学习的转移上。
AI.conclusion: Curiosity-Critic通过基于累积预测误差改进的内在奖励，有效区分认知误差和随机误差，将先前的预测误差好奇心公式统一为特定基线近似的特例，在探索效率和模型学习方面表现优越。

title: Align then Refine: Text-Guided 3D Prostate Lesion Segmentation
summary: Automated 3D segmentation of prostate lesions from biparametric MRI (bp-MRI) is essential for reliable algorithmic analysis, but achieving high precision remains challenging. Volumetric methods must combine multiple modalities while ensuring anatomical consistency, but current models struggle to integrate cross-modal information reliably. While vision-language models (VLMs) are replacing the currently used architectural designs, they still lack the fine-grained, lesion-level semantics required for effective localized guidance. To address these limitations, we propose a new multi-encoder U-Net architecture incorporating three key innovations: (1) an alignment loss that enhances foreground text-image similarity to inject lesion semantics; (2) a heatmap loss that calibrates the similarity map and suppresses spurious background activations; and (3) a final-stage, confidence-gated multi-head cross-attention refiner that performs localized boundary edits in high-confidence regions. A phase-scheduled training regime stabilizes the optimization of these components. Our method consistently outperforms prior approaches, establishing a new state-of-the-art on the PI-CAI dataset through enhanced multi-modal fusion and localized text guidance. Our code is available at https://github.com/NUBagciLab/Prostate-Lesion-Segmentation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的多编码器U-Net架构，用于从双参数MRI中自动分割前列腺病变，通过文本-图像对齐、热图校准和置信度门控交叉注意力精炼器，在PI-CAI数据集上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 当前的前列腺病变3D分割方法在多模态信息融合方面存在挑战，视觉语言模型缺乏细粒度的病变级语义指导，需要更有效的局部化引导机制来提高分割精度。
AI.method: 提出多编码器U-Net架构，包含三个关键创新：1)增强前景文本-图像相似性的对齐损失；2)校准相似性图并抑制虚假背景激活的热图损失；3)在置信区域进行局部边界编辑的置信度门控多头交叉注意力精炼器。采用阶段调度训练策略稳定优化。
AI.result: 在PI-CAI数据集上持续优于先前方法，建立了新的最先进性能，通过增强的多模态融合和局部化文本指导实现了更好的分割效果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过创新的对齐机制、热图校准和局部精炼策略，有效解决了前列腺病变分割中的多模态融合和语义指导问题，为医学图像分析提供了新的解决方案。

title: Autonomous Skeletal Landmark Localization towards Agentic C-Arm Control
comment: Accepted at IJCARS: IPCAI 2026. Int J CARS (2026)
summary:
Purpose: Automated C-arm positioning ensures timely treatment in patients requiring emergent interventions. When a conventional Deep Learning (DL) approach for C-arm control fails, clinicians must revert to manual operation, resulting in additional delays. Consequently, an agentic C-arm control framework based on multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is highly desirable, as it can incorporate clinician feedback and use reasoning to make adjustments toward more accurate positioning. Skeletal landmark localization is essential for C-arm control, and we investigate adapting MLLMs for autonomous landmark localization.
  Methods: We used an annotated synthetic X-ray dataset and a real X-ray dataset. Each X-ray in both datasets is paired with several skeletal landmarks. We fine-tuned two MLLMs and tasked them with retrieving the closest landmarks from each X-ray. Quantitative evaluations of landmark localization were performed and compared against a leading DL approach. We further conducted qualitative experiments demonstrating: (1) how an MLLM can correct an initially incorrect prediction through reasoning, and (2) how the MLLM can sequentially navigate the C-arm toward a target location.
  Results: On both datasets, fine-tuned MLLMs demonstrate competitive performance across all localization tasks when compared with the DL approach. In the qualitative experiments, the MLLMs provide evidence of reasoning and spatial awareness.
  Conclusion: This study shows that fine-tuned MLLMs achieve accurate skeletal landmark localization and hold promise for agentic autonomous C-arm control. Our code is available athttps://github.com/marszzibros/C-arm-localization-LLMs.git

AI.tldr: 该研究提出基于多模态大语言模型的智能C臂控制框架，通过微调MLLMs实现骨骼标志点定位，在合成和真实X射线数据集上取得与深度学习方法相当的性能，并展示推理和空间感知能力。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法在C臂控制失败时需要临床医生手动操作，导致治疗延迟。需要能够整合临床医生反馈并通过推理进行调整的智能C臂控制框架，而骨骼标志点定位是实现这一目标的关键。
AI.method: 使用带标注的合成X射线数据集和真实X射线数据集，微调两种多模态大语言模型，让它们从X射线图像中检索最接近的骨骼标志点。与领先的深度学习方法进行定量比较，并进行定性实验展示推理能力和C臂导航能力。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上，微调后的MLLMs在所有定位任务中均表现出与深度学习方法相当的性能。定性实验显示MLLMs具有推理能力和空间感知能力，能够纠正初始错误预测并顺序导航C臂至目标位置。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明微调后的MLLMs能够实现准确的骨骼标志点定位，为智能自主C臂控制提供了有前景的解决方案。代码已开源。

title: Beyond Coefficients: Forecast-Necessity Testing for Interpretable Causal Discovery in Nonlinear Time-Series Models
summary:
Nonlinear machine-learning models are increasingly used to discover causal relationships in time-series data, yet the interpretation of their outputs remains poorly understood. In particular, causal scores produced by regularized neural autoregressive models are often treated as analogues of regression coefficients, leading to misleading claims of statistical significance.
  In this paper, we argue that causal relevance in nonlinear time-series models should be evaluated through forecast necessity rather than coefficient magnitude, and we present a practical evaluation procedure for doing so. We present an interpretable evaluation framework based on systematic edge ablation and forecast comparison, which tests whether a candidate causal relationship is required for accurate prediction. Using Neural Additive Vector Autoregression as a case study model, we apply this framework to a real-world case study of democratic development, modeled as a multivariate time series of panel data - democracy indicators across 139 countries. We show that relationships with similar causal scores can differ dramatically in their predictive necessity due to redundancy, temporal persistence, and regime-specific effects.
  Our results demonstrate how forecast-necessity testing supports more reliable causal reasoning in applied AI systems and provides practical guidance for interpreting nonlinear time-series models in high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于预测必要性的非线性时间序列模型因果相关性评估框架，通过系统性的边消融和预测比较来检验候选因果关系是否对准确预测是必需的。
AI.motivation: 当前非线性机器学习模型在时间序列因果发现中应用日益广泛，但其输出解释性差。特别是正则化神经自回归模型产生的因果分数常被当作回归系数的类比，导致对统计显著性的误导性声称。需要更可靠的因果推理方法。
AI.method: 提出了一个基于预测必要性的可解释评估框架，采用系统性的边消融和预测比较方法。以神经加性向量自回归模型为案例研究模型，应用于139个国家民主发展的多变量时间序列面板数据。
AI.result: 研究发现，具有相似因果分数的关系在预测必要性上可能存在显著差异，这主要由于冗余性、时间持久性和特定制度效应等因素造成。预测必要性测试能够更可靠地支持因果推理。
AI.conclusion: 预测必要性测试为应用AI系统中的因果推理提供了更可靠的方法，并为高风险领域中非线性时间序列模型的解释提供了实用指导。该方法支持更可靠的因果推理，避免仅依赖系数大小导致的误导性结论。

title: Handling and Interpreting Missing Modalities in Patient Clinical Trajectories via Autoregressive Sequence Modeling
summary: An active challenge in developing multimodal machine learning (ML) models for healthcare is handling missing modalities during training and deployment. As clinical datasets are inherently temporal and sparse in terms of modality presence, capturing the underlying predictive signal via diagnostic multimodal ML models while retaining model explainability remains an ongoing challenge. In this work, we address this by re-framing clinical diagnosis as an autoregressive sequence modeling task, utilizing causal decoders from large language models (LLMs) to model a patient's multimodal trajectory. We first introduce a missingness-aware contrastive pre-training objective that integrates multiple modalities in datasets with missingness in a shared latent space. We then show that autoregressive sequence modeling with transformer-based architectures outperforms baselines on the MIMIC-IV and eICU fine-tuning benchmarks. Finally, we use interpretability techniques to move beyond performance boosts and find that across various patient stays, removing modalities leads to divergent behavior that our contrastive pre-training mitigates. By abstracting clinical diagnosis as sequence modeling and interpreting patient stay trajectories, we develop a framework to profile and handle missing modalities while addressing the canonical desideratum of safe, transparent clinical AI.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种处理医疗多模态数据缺失问题的新方法，通过将临床诊断重新定义为自回归序列建模任务，利用对比预训练和transformer架构来整合缺失模态，并在MIMIC-IV和eICU基准测试中取得优于基线模型的效果。
AI.motivation: 医疗多模态机器学习面临的主要挑战是在训练和部署过程中处理缺失的模态数据。临床数据集本质上是时序性的，且模态存在稀疏性，如何在保持模型可解释性的同时捕捉潜在的预测信号是一个持续存在的难题。
AI.method: 1. 将临床诊断重新定义为自回归序列建模任务，利用大型语言模型的因果解码器来建模患者的多模态轨迹；2. 引入缺失感知的对比预训练目标，在共享潜在空间中整合具有缺失的多模态数据集；3. 使用基于transformer的架构进行自回归序列建模。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV和eICU微调基准测试中，自回归序列建模方法优于基线模型。通过可解释性技术发现，移除不同模态会导致模型行为出现差异，而对比预训练能够缓解这种问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过将临床诊断抽象为序列建模并解释患者住院轨迹，开发了一个框架来分析和处理缺失模态，同时满足了安全、透明的临床AI的经典需求。

title: DeltaSeg: Tiered Attention and Deep Delta Learning for Multi-Class Structural Defect Segmentation
summary: Automated segmentation of structural defects from visual inspection imagery remains challenging due to the diversity of damage types, extreme class imbalance, and the need for precise boundary delineation. This paper presents DeltaSeg, a U-shaped encoder-decoder architecture with a tiered attention strategy that integrates Squeeze-and-Excitation (SE) channel attention in the encoder, Coordinate Attention at the bottleneck and decoder, and a novel Deep Delta Attention (DDA) mechanism in the skip connections. The encoder uses depthwise separable convolutions with dilated stages to maintain spatial resolution while expanding the receptive field. Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) at the bottleneck captures multi-scale context. The DDA module refines skip connections through a dual-path scheme combining a learned delta operator for nuisance feature suppression with spatial attention gates conditioned on decoder signals. Deep supervision through multi-scale auxiliary heads further strengthens gradient flow and encourages semantically meaningful features at intermediate decoder stages. We evaluate DeltaSeg on two datasets: the S2DS dataset (7 classes) and the Culvert-Sewer Defect Dataset (CSDD, 9 classes). Across both benchmarks, DeltaSeg consistently outperforms 12 competing architectures including U-Net, SA-UNet, UNet3+, SegFormer, Swin-UNet, EGE-UNet, FPN, and Mobile-UNETR, demonstrating strong generalization across damage types, imaging conditions, and structural geometries.

AI.tldr: DeltaSeg：一种用于结构缺陷分割的U型编码器-解码器架构，采用分层注意力策略，在S2DS和CSDD数据集上优于12种竞争架构
AI.motivation: 结构缺陷的自动分割面临挑战，包括损伤类型多样性、极端类别不平衡以及需要精确边界划分。现有方法在这些复杂场景下表现有限。
AI.method: 提出DeltaSeg架构：U型编码器-解码器，编码器使用深度可分离卷积和扩张阶段；瓶颈层采用ASPP捕获多尺度上下文；分层注意力策略包括编码器的SE通道注意力、瓶颈和解码器的坐标注意力，以及跳跃连接中的新型深度Delta注意力机制；通过多尺度辅助头进行深度监督。
AI.result: 在S2DS（7类）和CSDD（9类）两个数据集上评估，DeltaSeg在12种竞争架构（包括U-Net、SA-UNet、UNet3+、SegFormer等）中表现最佳，展示了跨损伤类型、成像条件和结构几何的强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DeltaSeg通过分层注意力策略和深度监督，有效解决了结构缺陷分割中的挑战，在多个基准测试中表现出优越性能，为视觉检测中的自动化缺陷分割提供了有效解决方案。

title: Towards Understanding the Robustness of Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to optimization-based jailbreak attacks that exploit internal gradient structure. While Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) are widely used for interpretability, their robustness implications remain underexplored. We present a study of integrating pretrained SAEs into transformer residual streams at inference time, without modifying model weights or blocking gradients. Across four model families (Gemma, LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen) and two strong white-box attacks (GCG, BEAST) plus three black-box benchmarks, SAE-augmented models achieve up to a 5x reduction in jailbreak success rate relative to the undefended baseline and reduce cross-model attack transferability. Parametric ablations reveal (i) a monotonic dose-response relationship between L0 sparsity and attack success rate, and (ii) a layer-dependent defense-utility tradeoff, where intermediate layers balance robustness and clean performance. These findings are consistent with a representational bottleneck hypothesis: sparse projection reshapes the optimization geometry exploited by jailbreak attacks.

AI.tldr: 通过在推理时将预训练的稀疏自编码器集成到Transformer残差流中，无需修改模型权重或阻断梯度，显著提升了大型语言模型对越狱攻击的鲁棒性，在多种模型和攻击方法下实现了高达5倍的攻击成功率降低。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型仍然容易受到基于优化的越狱攻击，这些攻击利用了内部梯度结构。虽然稀疏自编码器广泛用于可解释性研究，但其在鲁棒性方面的潜力尚未充分探索。本研究旨在探索将预训练SAE集成到模型推理过程中是否能增强对越狱攻击的防御能力。
AI.method: 在推理时将预训练的稀疏自编码器集成到Transformer残差流中，不修改模型权重，也不阻断梯度。研究覆盖了四个模型家族（Gemma、LLaMA、Mistral、Qwen）和两种强白盒攻击（GCG、BEAST）以及三个黑盒基准测试。通过参数化消融实验分析了L0稀疏度与攻击成功率的关系，以及不同层的防御-效用权衡。
AI.result: SAE增强模型相对于未防御基线实现了高达5倍的越狱攻击成功率降低，并减少了跨模型攻击的可迁移性。参数化消融显示：1）L0稀疏度与攻击成功率存在单调剂量-响应关系；2）中间层在鲁棒性和干净性能之间达到最佳平衡。这些发现与表示瓶颈假说一致：稀疏投影重塑了越狱攻击所利用的优化几何结构。
AI.conclusion: 将稀疏自编码器集成到推理过程中是一种有效的防御策略，能够显著提升大型语言模型对越狱攻击的鲁棒性，同时保持模型性能。这种方法通过稀疏投影重塑优化几何，为基于表示的防御机制提供了新的研究方向。

title: Formally Verified Patent Analysis via Dependent Type Theory: Machine-Checkable Certificates from a Hybrid AI + Lean 4 Pipeline
summary: We present a formally verified framework for patent analysis as a hybrid AI + Lean 4 pipeline. The DAG-coverage core (Algorithm 1b) is fully machine-verified once bounded match scores are fixed. Freedom-to-operate, claim-construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, and doctrine-of-equivalents analyses are formalized at the specification level with kernel-checked candidate certificates. Existing patent-analysis approaches rely on manual expert analysis (slow, non-scalable) or ML/NLP methods (probabilistic, opaque, non-compositional). To our knowledge, this is the first framework that applies interactive theorem proving based on dependent type theory to intellectual property analysis. Claims are encoded as DAGs in Lean 4, match strengths as elements of a verified complete lattice, and confidence scores propagate through dependencies via proven-correct monotone functions. We formalize five IP use cases (patent-to-product mapping, freedom-to-operate, claim construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, doctrine of equivalents) via six algorithms. Structural lemmas, the coverage-core generator, and the closed-path identity coverage = W_cov are machine-verified in Lean 4. Higher-level theorems for the other use cases remain informal proof sketches, and their proof-generation functions are architecturally mitigated (untrusted generators whose outputs are kernel-checked and sorry-free axiom-audited). Guarantees are conditional on the ML layer: they certify mathematical correctness of computations downstream of ML scores, not the accuracy of the scores themselves. A case study on a synthetic memory-module claim demonstrates weighted coverage and construction-sensitivity analysis. Validation against adjudicated cases is future work.

AI.tldr: 首个基于依赖类型理论和交互式定理证明的专利分析框架，将专利权利要求编码为DAG，通过形式化验证确保算法正确性，但ML层评分准确性仍需验证。
AI.motivation: 现有专利分析方法依赖人工专家分析（慢、不可扩展）或ML/NLP方法（概率性、不透明、非组合性），缺乏形式化验证的可靠框架。
AI.method: 将专利权利要求编码为Lean 4中的DAG，匹配强度作为已验证完全格的元素，置信度通过已验证单调函数在依赖关系中传播，形式化五个IP用例和六个算法。
AI.result: DAG覆盖核心算法完全机器验证，结构引理、覆盖核心生成器和闭合路径恒等式在Lean 4中验证，高层定理保持非正式证明草图，ML层下游计算数学正确性得到认证。
AI.conclusion: 这是首个将交互式定理证明应用于知识产权分析的框架，为专利分析提供形式化验证基础，但ML评分准确性验证和实际案例验证是未来工作重点。

title: URoPE: Universal Relative Position Embedding across Geometric Spaces
summary: Relative position embedding has become a standard mechanism for encoding positional information in Transformers. However, existing formulations are typically limited to a fixed geometric space, namely 1D sequences or regular 2D/3D grids, which restricts their applicability to many computer vision tasks that require geometric reasoning across camera views or between 2D and 3D spaces. To address this limitation, we propose URoPE, a universal extension of Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) to cross-view or cross-dimensional geometric spaces. For each key/value image patch, URoPE samples 3D points along the corresponding camera ray at predefined depth anchors and projects them into the query image plane. Standard 2D RoPE can then be applied using the projected pixel coordinates. URoPE is a parameter-free and intrinsics-aware relative position embedding that is invariant to the choice of global coordinate systems, while remaining fully compatible with existing RoPE-optimized attention kernels. We evaluate URoPE as a plug-in positional encoding for transformer architectures across a diverse set of tasks, including novel view synthesis, 3D object detection, object tracking, and depth estimation, covering 2D-2D, 2D-3D, and temporal scenarios. Experiments show that URoPE consistently improves the performance of transformer-based models across all tasks, demonstrating its effectiveness and generality for geometric reasoning. Our project website is: https://urope-pe.github.io/.

AI.tldr: URoPE是一种通用的相对位置编码方法，将RoPE扩展到跨视图或跨维度的几何空间，通过采样3D点并投影到查询图像平面，实现2D-3D几何推理。
AI.motivation: 现有的相对位置编码方法通常局限于固定的几何空间（如1D序列或规则2D/3D网格），这限制了它们在需要跨相机视图或2D-3D空间几何推理的计算机视觉任务中的应用。
AI.method: URoPE为每个关键/值图像块沿对应相机光线在预定义深度锚点处采样3D点，然后将这些点投影到查询图像平面，使用投影的像素坐标应用标准的2D RoPE。
AI.result: 实验表明，URoPE作为Transformer架构的插件位置编码，在新视图合成、3D目标检测、目标跟踪和深度估计等任务中一致提升了基于Transformer模型的性能。
AI.conclusion: URoPE是一种参数无关、内参感知的相对位置编码方法，对全局坐标系选择具有不变性，同时完全兼容现有的RoPE优化注意力核，有效提升了跨几何空间的推理能力。

title: Error-free Training for MedMNIST Datasets
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new concept called Artificial Special Intelligence by which Machine Learning models for the classification problem can be trained error-free, thus acquiring the capability of not making repeated mistakes. The method is applied to 18 MedMNIST biomedical datasets. Except for three datasets, which suffer from the double-labeling problem, all are trained to perfection.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"人工特殊智能"概念，使机器学习分类模型能够无错误训练，避免重复犯错，在18个MedMNIST生物医学数据集上验证，除3个存在双标签问题的数据集外，其余均实现完美训练
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习模型在分类任务中会重复犯同样的错误，作者希望开发一种能够无错误训练的方法，使模型具备不重复犯错的能力
AI.method: 提出"人工特殊智能"概念，应用于18个MedMNIST生物医学数据集进行分类训练
AI.result: 除3个存在双标签问题的数据集外，其余15个数据集均实现了完美训练，模型不再重复犯错
AI.conclusion: 人工特殊智能概念能够有效实现机器学习模型的零错误训练，但双标签问题仍是需要解决的技术挑战

title: REVEAL: Multimodal Vision-Language Alignment of Retinal Morphometry and Clinical Risks for Incident AD and Dementia Prediction
summary: The retina provides a unique, noninvasive window into Alzheimer's disease (AD) and dementia, capturing early structural changes through morphometric features, while systemic and lifestyle risk factors reflect well-established contributors to disease susceptibility long before clinical symptom onset. However, current retinal analysis frameworks typically model imaging and risk factors separately, limiting their ability to capture joint multimodal patterns critical for early risk prediction. Moreover, existing methods rarely incorporate mechanisms to organize or align patients with similar retinal and clinical characteristics, constraining the learning of coherent cross-modal associations. To address these limitations, we introduce REVEAL (REtinal-risk Vision-Language Early Alzheimer's Learning), a framework that aligns color fundus photographs with individualized disease-specific risk profiles for predicting incident AD and dementia, on average 8 years before diagnosis (range: 1-11 years). Because real-world risk factors are structured questionnaire data, we translate them into clinically interpretable narratives compatible with pretrained vision-language models (VLMs). We further propose a group-aware contrastive learning (GACL) strategy that clusters patients with similar retinal morphometry and risk factors as positive pairs, strengthening multimodal alignment. This unified representation learning framework substantially outperforms state-of-the-art retinal imaging models paired with clinical text encoders, as well as general-purpose VLMs, demonstrating the value of jointly modeling retinal biomarkers and clinical risk factors. By providing a generalizable and noninvasive approach for early AD and dementia risk stratification, REVEAL has the potential to enable earlier intervention and improve preventive care at the population level.

AI.tldr: REVEAL框架通过将眼底照片与个体化疾病风险特征对齐，结合分组感知对比学习策略，实现了阿尔茨海默病和痴呆的早期预测（平均提前8年）。
AI.motivation: 视网膜为阿尔茨海默病和痴呆提供了独特的非侵入性观察窗口，但现有方法通常将影像和风险因素分开建模，无法捕捉多模态联合模式，且缺乏组织或对齐具有相似特征患者的机制。
AI.method: 1. 将结构化问卷风险因素转化为临床可解释的叙述文本，与预训练视觉语言模型兼容；2. 提出分组感知对比学习策略，将具有相似视网膜形态学和风险因素的患者聚类为正样本对，加强多模态对齐。
AI.result: REVEAL框架在预测阿尔茨海默病和痴呆方面显著优于最先进的视网膜成像模型与临床文本编码器的组合，以及通用视觉语言模型，证明了联合建模视网膜生物标志物和临床风险因素的价值。
AI.conclusion: REVEAL提供了一个可推广的非侵入性方法，用于早期阿尔茨海默病和痴呆风险分层，有望实现更早干预并改善人群层面的预防性护理。

title: Streaming Structured Inference with Flash-SemiCRF
summary: Semi-Markov Conditional Random Fields (semi-CRFs) assign labels to segments of a sequence rather than to individual positions, enabling exact inference over segment-level features and principled uncertainty estimates at their boundaries. However, existing implementations must materialize a large edge potential tensor whose size grows with sequence length, maximum segment length, and label count, becoming prohibitive for speech-scale state spaces and intractable at genomic scales where sequences can exceed 100,000 positions. This memory bottleneck has limited the adoption of exact segment-level inference for long sequences and large label sets. We identify that the core inefficiency is materializing edge potentials that can instead be evaluated on-the-fly from a compact prefix-sum array, and make several improvements. First, replacing the stored edge tensor with prefix-sum lookup reduces the memory footprint by a factor proportional to the product of segment length and label count. Second, a streaming forward-backward pass with checkpoint-boundary normalization keeps working memory sublinear in sequence length while preserving exact gradients. Third, zero-centered cumulative scores control numerical drift and induce an adaptive duration prior under label imbalance. We integrate these ideas into Flash-SemiCRF, a fused Triton kernel that enables exact semi-CRF inference on previously intractable problem sizes. Available at https://github.com/biobenkj/flash-semicrf.

AI.tldr: Flash-SemiCRF：一种高效的内存优化半马尔可夫条件随机场实现，通过前缀和查找和流式前向后向算法，解决了长序列和大标签集场景下的内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 传统半CRF实现需要存储庞大的边势能张量，其大小随序列长度、最大片段长度和标签数量增长，在语音规模状态空间和基因组尺度（超过10万个位置）下变得不可行，这限制了精确片段级推理在长序列和大标签集上的应用。
AI.method: 1. 用前缀和查找替代存储的边张量，内存占用减少与片段长度和标签数量乘积成正比；2. 采用带检查点边界归一化的流式前向后向传递，保持工作内存与序列长度呈亚线性关系；3. 零中心累积分数控制数值漂移，在标签不平衡下引入自适应持续时间先验；4. 集成到Flash-SemiCRF，一个融合的Triton内核。
AI.result: Flash-SemiCRF能够在先前难以处理的问题规模上实现精确的半CRF推理，解决了内存瓶颈问题，使长序列和大标签集的精确片段级推理变得可行。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新的内存优化技术，Flash-SemiCRF突破了传统半CRF实现的内存限制，为基因组学等需要处理超长序列的领域提供了高效的精确推理解决方案。

title: CAHAL: Clinically Applicable resolution enHAncement for Low-resolution MRI scans
summary: Large-scale automated morphometric analysis of brain MRI is limited by the thick-slice, anisotropic acquisitions prevalent in routine clinical practice. Existing generative super-resolution (SR) methods produce visually compelling isotropic volumes but often introduce anatomical hallucinations, systematic volumetric overestimation, and structural distortions that compromise downstream quantitative analysis and diagnostic safety. To address this, we propose CAHAL (Clinically Applicable resolution enHAncement for Low-resolution MRI scans), a hallucination-robust, physics-informed resolution enhancement framework that operates directly in the patient's native acquisition space. CAHAL employs a deterministic bivariate Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture routing each input through specialised residual 3D U-Net experts conditioned on both volumetric resolution and acquisition anisotropy, two independent descriptors of clinical MRI acquisition. Experts are optimised with a composite loss combining edge-penalised spatial reconstruction, Fourier-domain spectral coherence matching, and a segmentation-guided semantic consistency constraint. Training pairs are generated on-the-fly via physics-based degradation sampled from a large-scale real-world database, ensuring robust generalisation. Validated on T1-weighted and FLAIR sequences against generative baselines, CAHAL achieves state-of-the-art results, improving the best related methods in terms of accuracy and efficiency.

AI.tldr: CAHAL是一个用于临床MRI低分辨率扫描的幻觉鲁棒、物理信息驱动的分辨率增强框架，直接在患者原始采集空间操作，避免解剖幻觉和结构扭曲，提升下游定量分析可靠性。
AI.motivation: 临床实践中普遍存在的厚层、各向异性MRI采集限制了大规模自动化形态测量分析。现有的生成式超分辨率方法虽然能产生视觉上吸引人的各向同性体积，但常常引入解剖幻觉、系统性体积高估和结构扭曲，影响下游定量分析和诊断安全性。
AI.method: 提出CAHAL框架，采用确定性双变量混合专家架构，通过专门的残差3D U-Net专家路由每个输入，这些专家以体积分辨率和采集各向异性为条件。使用复合损失函数优化，包括边缘惩罚空间重建、傅里叶域频谱一致性匹配和分割引导的语义一致性约束。训练对通过基于物理的退化从大规模真实世界数据库中采样生成。
AI.result: 在T1加权和FLAIR序列上验证，CAHAL相比生成式基线方法取得了最先进的结果，在准确性和效率方面改进了最佳相关方法。
AI.conclusion: CAHAL提供了一个幻觉鲁棒、物理信息驱动的分辨率增强框架，能够直接在临床MRI采集空间操作，避免解剖幻觉和结构扭曲，从而提升下游定量分析的可靠性和诊断安全性。

title: Efficient Mixture-of-Experts LLM Inference with Apple Silicon NPUs
summary:
Apple Neural Engine (ANE) is a dedicated neural processing unit (NPU) present in every Apple Silicon chip. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) LLMs improve inference efficiency via sparse activation but are challenging for NPUs in three ways: expert routing is unpredictable and introduces dynamic tensor shapes that conflict with the shape-specific constraints of NPUs; several irregular operators, e.g., top-k, scatter/gather, etc., are not NPU-friendly; and launching many small expert kernels incurs substantial dispatch and synchronization overhead. NPUs are designed to offload AI compute from CPU and GPU; our goal is to enable such offloading for MoE inference, particularly during prefill, where long-context workloads consume substantial system resources.
  This paper presents NPUMoE, a runtime inference engine that accelerates MoE execution on Apple Silicon by offloading dense, static computation to NPU, while preserving a CPU/GPU fallback path for dynamic operations. NPUMoE uses offline calibration to estimate expert capacity and popularity that drives three key techniques: (1) Static tiers for expert capacity to address dynamic expert routing (2) Grouped expert execution to mitigate NPU concurrency limits (3) Load-aware expert compute graph residency to reduce CPU-NPU synchronization overhead. Experiments on Apple M-series devices using three representative MoE LLMs and four long-context workloads show that NPUMoE consistently outperforms baselines, reducing latency by 1.32x-5.55x, improving energy efficiency by 1.81x-7.37x, and reducing CPU-cycle usage by 1.78x-5.54x through effective NPU offloading.

AI.tldr: NPUMoE是一个针对Apple Silicon芯片的运行时推理引擎，通过将混合专家模型（MoE）的静态密集计算卸载到神经处理单元（NPU），同时保留CPU/GPU回退路径处理动态操作，显著提升MoE推理性能。
AI.motivation: 混合专家模型（MoE）通过稀疏激活提高推理效率，但在Apple Neural Engine（ANE）NPU上存在三大挑战：专家路由不可预测导致动态张量形状与NPU形状特定约束冲突；不规则算子（如top-k、scatter/gather等）不适用于NPU；启动大量小型专家内核会产生显著的调度和同步开销。NPU旨在从CPU和GPU卸载AI计算，本文目标是实现MoE推理的此类卸载，特别是在预填充阶段，长上下文工作负载消耗大量系统资源。
AI.method: NPUMoE采用离线校准来估计专家容量和流行度，驱动三项关键技术：1）静态专家容量层级以处理动态专家路由；2）分组专家执行以缓解NPU并发限制；3）负载感知的专家计算图驻留以减少CPU-NPU同步开销。系统将密集静态计算卸载到NPU，同时保留CPU/GPU回退路径处理动态操作。
AI.result: 在Apple M系列设备上使用三个代表性MoE LLM和四个长上下文工作负载的实验表明，NPUMoE始终优于基线方法：延迟降低1.32-5.55倍，能效提高1.81-7.37倍，通过有效的NPU卸载使CPU周期使用减少1.78-5.54倍。
AI.conclusion: NPUMoE成功解决了MoE模型在Apple Silicon NPU上的执行挑战，通过智能的卸载策略显著提升了推理性能、能效和系统资源利用率，为在移动设备上高效运行大型MoE模型提供了可行方案。

title: Personalized Benchmarking: Evaluating LLMs by Individual Preferences
summary: With the rise in capabilities of large language models (LLMs) and their deployment in real-world tasks, evaluating LLM alignment with human preferences has become an important challenge. Current benchmarks average preferences across all users to compute aggregate ratings, overlooking individual user preferences when establishing model rankings. Since users have varying preferences in different contexts, we call for personalized LLM benchmarks that rank models according to individual needs. We compute personalized model rankings using ELO ratings and Bradley-Terry coefficients for 115 active Chatbot Arena users and analyze how user query characteristics (topics and writing style) relate to LLM ranking variations. We demonstrate that individual rankings of LLM models diverge dramatically from aggregate LLM rankings, with Bradley-Terry correlations averaging only $ρ= 0.04$ (57\% of users show near-zero or negative correlation) and ELO ratings showing moderate correlation ($ρ= 0.43$). Through topic modeling and style analysis, we find users exhibit substantial heterogeneity in topical interests and communication styles, influencing their model preferences. We further show that a compact combination of topic and style features provides a useful feature space for predicting user-specific model rankings. Our results provide strong quantitative evidence that aggregate benchmarks fail to capture individual preferences for most users, and highlight the importance of developing personalized benchmarks that rank LLM models according to individual user preferences.

AI.tldr: 研究发现聚合基准无法捕捉个人偏好，提出需要个性化LLM基准，通过分析115名用户数据发现个人排名与聚合排名差异显著，主题和写作风格特征可预测用户特定模型排名。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型能力的提升和在现实任务中的部署，评估LLM与人类偏好的对齐性变得重要。当前基准将所有用户的偏好平均计算聚合评分，忽视了在建立模型排名时的个人用户偏好。由于用户在不同情境下有不同偏好，需要个性化的LLM基准来根据个人需求对模型进行排名。
AI.method: 使用ELO评分和Bradley-Terry系数为115名活跃的Chatbot Arena用户计算个性化模型排名，分析用户查询特征（主题和写作风格）与LLM排名变化的关系。通过主题建模和风格分析，研究用户主题兴趣和沟通风格的异质性如何影响模型偏好。
AI.result: 个人LLM模型排名与聚合LLM排名存在显著差异：Bradley-Terry相关性平均仅为ρ=0.04（57%用户显示接近零或负相关），ELO评分显示中等相关性（ρ=0.43）。用户表现出主题兴趣和沟通风格的显著异质性，影响其模型偏好。紧凑的主题和风格特征组合为预测用户特定模型排名提供了有用的特征空间。
AI.conclusion: 聚合基准无法捕捉大多数用户的个人偏好，强调了开发个性化基准的重要性，这些基准应根据个人用户偏好对LLM模型进行排名。主题和风格特征可用于预测用户特定模型偏好。

title: HELM: Harness-Enhanced Long-horizon Memory for Vision-Language-Action Manipulation
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models fail systematically on long-horizon manipulation tasks despite strong short-horizon performance. We show that this failure is not resolved by extending context length alone in the current reactive execution setting; instead, it stems from three recurring execution-loop deficiencies: the memory gap, the verification gap, and the recovery gap. We present HELM, a model-agnostic framework that addresses these deficiencies with three components: an Episodic Memory Module (EMM) that retrieves key task history via CLIP-indexed keyframes, a learned State Verifier (SV) that predicts action failure before execution from observation, action, subgoal, and memory-conditioned context, and a Harness Controller (HC) that performs rollback and replanning. The SV is the core learning contribution: it consistently outperforms rule-based feasibility checks and ensemble uncertainty baselines, and its effectiveness depends critically on access to episodic memory. On LIBERO-LONG, HELM improves task success rate by 23.1 percentage points over OpenVLA (58.4% to 81.5%), while extending the context window to H=32 yields only a 5.4-point gain and same-budget LoRA adaptation remains 12.2 points below HELM. HELM also improves long-horizon performance on CALVIN and substantially boosts recovery success under controlled perturbations. Ablations and mechanism analyses isolate the contribution of each component, and we release LIBERO-Recovery as a perturbation-injection protocol for evaluating failure recovery in long-horizon manipulation.

AI.tldr: HELM框架通过三个组件解决VLA模型在长时程操作任务中的系统性问题：记忆模块检索关键历史，状态验证器预测动作失败，控制器执行回滚和重规划，显著提升任务成功率。
AI.motivation: 当前视觉-语言-动作模型在短时程任务上表现良好，但在长时程操作任务中存在系统性失败。研究发现，仅扩展上下文长度无法解决这一问题，根本原因在于执行循环中的三个缺陷：记忆缺口、验证缺口和恢复缺口。
AI.method: 提出HELM框架，包含三个组件：1) 情景记忆模块，通过CLIP索引的关键帧检索任务历史；2) 学习的状态验证器，从观察、动作、子目标和记忆条件上下文中预测动作失败；3) 控制器，执行回滚和重规划。状态验证器是核心学习贡献。
AI.result: 在LIBERO-LONG上，HELM将任务成功率从58.4%提升到81.5%，比仅扩展上下文窗口的5.4%增益显著。在CALVIN上也大幅提升长时程性能，并在受控扰动下显著提高恢复成功率。状态验证器始终优于基于规则的可行性检查和集成不确定性基线。
AI.conclusion: HELM框架有效解决了VLA模型在长时程操作任务中的执行循环缺陷，通过记忆检索、失败预测和恢复机制的组合显著提升性能。状态验证器的有效性关键依赖于情景记忆的访问，该框架为长时程操作任务提供了系统解决方案。

title: Reasoning Structure Matters for Safety Alignment of Reasoning Models
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieve strong performance on complex reasoning tasks but often generate harmful responses to malicious user queries. This paper investigates the underlying cause of these safety risks and shows that the issue lies in the reasoning structure itself. Based on this insight, we claim that effective safety alignment can be achieved by altering the reasoning structure. We propose AltTrain, a simple yet effective post training method that explicitly alters the reasoning structure of LRMs. AltTrain is both practical and generalizable, requiring no complex reinforcement learning (RL) training or reward design, only supervised finetuning (SFT) with a lightweight 1K training examples. Experiments across LRM backbones and model sizes demonstrate strong safety alignment, along with robust generalization across reasoning, QA, summarization, and multilingual setting.

AI.tldr: AltTrain：通过改变推理结构实现大型推理模型的安全对齐，仅需1K训练样本的监督微调
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在复杂推理任务上表现优异，但面对恶意查询时容易生成有害响应。研究发现问题根源在于推理结构本身，因此通过改变推理结构可以实现有效的安全对齐。
AI.method: 提出AltTrain方法，这是一种简单有效的后训练方法，通过监督微调（SFT）显式改变大型推理模型的推理结构。该方法不需要复杂的强化学习训练或奖励设计，仅需1K轻量级训练样本。
AI.result: 在不同骨干模型和模型规模上的实验表明，AltTrain实现了强大的安全对齐效果，同时在推理、问答、摘要和多语言设置中展现出稳健的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过改变推理结构是实现大型推理模型安全对齐的有效途径，AltTrain方法简单实用且泛化性强，为模型安全对齐提供了新的解决方案。

title: CrossPan: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Cross-Sequence Pancreas MRI Segmentation and Generalization
summary: Automatic pancreas segmentation is fundamental to abdominal MRI analysis, yet deep learning models trained on one MRI sequence often fail catastrophically when applied to another-a challenge that has received little systematic investigation. We introduce CrossPan, a multi-institutional benchmark comprising 1,386 3D scans across three routinely acquired sequences (T1-weighted, T2-weighted, and Out-of-Phase) from eight centers. Our experiments reveal three key findings. First, cross-sequence domain shifts are far more severe than cross-center variability: models achieving Dice scores above 0.85 in-domain collapse to near-zero (<0.02) when transferred across sequences. Second, state-of-the-art domain generalization methods provide negligible benefit under these physics-driven contrast inversions, whereas foundation models like MedSAM2 maintain moderate zero-shot performance through contrast-invariant shape priors. Third, semi-supervised learning offers gains only under stable intensity distributions and becomes unstable on sequences with high intra-organ variability. These results establish cross-sequence generalization-not model architecture or center diversity-as the primary barrier to clinically deployable pancreas MRI segmentation. Dataset and code are available at https://crosspan.netlify.app/.

AI.tldr: CrossPan基准测试揭示胰腺MRI分割中跨序列域偏移比跨中心变异性更严重，现有域泛化方法效果有限，而MedSAM2等基础模型通过形状先验保持中等零样本性能。
AI.motivation: 胰腺自动分割对腹部MRI分析至关重要，但针对特定MRI序列训练的深度学习模型在应用到其他序列时性能会严重下降，这一问题缺乏系统研究。
AI.method: 引入CrossPan多机构基准数据集，包含1,386个3D扫描，涵盖T1加权、T2加权和Out-of-Phase三种常规序列，来自八个中心。评估跨序列域偏移的严重程度，比较现有域泛化方法、基础模型和半监督学习的效果。
AI.result: 1) 跨序列域偏移远严重于跨中心变异性：域内Dice分数>0.85的模型在跨序列时崩溃至接近零(<0.02)；2) 最先进的域泛化方法在物理驱动的对比度反转下效果有限，而MedSAM2等基础模型通过对比度不变的形状先验保持中等零样本性能；3) 半监督学习仅在稳定强度分布下有效，在高器官内变异性序列中不稳定。
AI.conclusion: 跨序列泛化能力（而非模型架构或中心多样性）是临床可部署胰腺MRI分割的主要障碍。CrossPan数据集和代码已公开。

title: Preserving Clusters in Error-Bounded Lossy Compression of Particle Data
summary: Lossy compression is widely used to reduce storage and I/O costs for large-scale particle datasets in scientific applications such as cosmology, molecular dynamics, and fluid dynamics, where clustering structures (e.g., single-linkage or Friends-of-Friends) are critical for downstream analysis; however, existing compressors typically provide only pointwise error bounds on particle positions and offer no guarantees on preserving clustering outcomes, and even small perturbations can alter cluster connectivity and compromise scientific validity. We propose a correction-based technique to preserve single-linkage clustering under lossy compression, operating on decompressed data from off-the-shelf compressors such as SZ3 and Draco. Our key contributions are threefold: (1) a clustering-aware correction algorithm that identifies vulnerable particle pairs via spatial partitioning and local neighborhood search; (2) an optimization-based formulation that enforces clustering consistency using projected gradient descent with a loss that encodes pairwise distance violations; and (3) a scalable GPU-accelerated and distributed implementation for large-scale datasets. Experiments on cosmology and molecular dynamics datasets show that our method effectively preserves clustering results while maintaining competitive compression performance compared with SZ3, ZFP, Draco, LCP, and space-filling-curve-based schemes.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于校正的技术，在保持压缩性能的同时，确保有损压缩后的粒子数据能保留单链接聚类结果
AI.motivation: 科学应用中的大规模粒子数据集（如宇宙学、分子动力学）通常使用有损压缩来减少存储和I/O成本，但现有压缩器只提供粒子位置的逐点误差边界，无法保证聚类结果的保留，即使微小扰动也可能改变聚类连通性，影响科学有效性
AI.method: 提出基于校正的技术，在现成压缩器（如SZ3、Draco）解压数据上操作，包括：(1) 通过空间划分和局部邻域搜索识别脆弱粒子对的聚类感知校正算法；(2) 使用投影梯度下降和编码成对距离违规的损失函数来强制聚类一致性的优化公式；(3) 面向大规模数据集的可扩展GPU加速和分布式实现
AI.result: 在宇宙学和分子动力学数据集上的实验表明，该方法能有效保留聚类结果，同时在与SZ3、ZFP、Draco、LCP和空间填充曲线方案相比时保持有竞争力的压缩性能
AI.conclusion: 提出的校正技术能够在有损压缩中有效保留单链接聚类结果，为科学应用中大规模粒子数据的压缩提供了聚类感知的解决方案

title: DW-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs on Data Warehouse Graph Topology Reasoning
comment: 24 pages, 6 figures. Datasets and evaluation code available at GitHub
summary: This paper introduces DW-Bench, a new benchmark that evaluates large language models (LLMs) on graph-topology reasoning over data warehouse schemas, explicitly integrating both foreign-key (FK) and data-lineage edges. The benchmark comprises 1,046 automatically generated, verifiably correct questions across five schemas. Experiments show that tool-augmented methods substantially outperform static approaches but plateau on hard compositional subtypes.

AI.tldr: DW-Bench是一个评估大语言模型在数据仓库模式上进行图拓扑推理的新基准，整合了外键和数据血缘边，包含1046个自动生成的验证正确的问题
AI.motivation: 现有基准在评估LLMs对数据仓库复杂图结构（包括外键和数据血缘关系）的推理能力方面存在不足，需要专门的评估框架
AI.method: 创建了包含5个模式、1046个自动生成且可验证正确的问题的基准，明确整合了外键和数据血缘边，用于评估LLMs的图拓扑推理能力
AI.result: 实验表明，工具增强方法显著优于静态方法，但在困难的组合子类型上性能达到瓶颈
AI.conclusion: DW-Bench为评估LLMs在数据仓库图拓扑推理能力提供了有效的基准，揭示了工具增强方法的优势及其在复杂推理任务上的局限性

title: LLM-as-Judge Framework for Evaluating Tone-Induced Hallucination in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed in settings where reliable visual grounding carries operational consequences, yet their behavior under progressively coercive prompt phrasing remains undercharacterized. Existing hallucination benchmarks predominantly rely on neutral prompts and binary detection, leaving open how both the incidence and the intensity of fabrication respond to graded linguistic pressure across structurally distinct task types. We present Ghost-100, a procedurally constructed benchmark of 800 synthetically generated images spanning eight categories across three task families -- text-illegibility, time-reading, and object-absence -- each designed under a negative-ground-truth principle that guarantees the queried target is absent, illegible, or indeterminate by construction. Every image is paired with five prompts drawn from a structured 5-Level Prompt Intensity Framework, holding the image and task identity fixed while varying only directive force, so that tone is isolated as the sole independent variable. We adopt a dual-track evaluation protocol: a rule-based H-Rate measuring the proportion of responses in which a model crosses from grounded refusal into unsupported positive commitment, and a GPT-4o-mini-judged H-Score on a 1-5 scale characterizing the confidence and specificity of fabrication once it occurs. We additionally release a three-stage automated validation workflow, which retrospectively confirms 717 of 800 images as strictly compliant. Evaluating nine open-weight VLMs, we find that H-Rate and H-Score dissociate substantially across model families, reading-style and presence-detection subsets respond to prompt pressure in qualitatively different ways, and several models exhibit non-monotonic sensitivity peaking at intermediate tone levels -- patterns that aggregate metrics obscure.

AI.tldr: Ghost-100基准测试评估视觉语言模型在渐进式强制提示下的幻觉行为，发现不同模型家族对提示压力的响应模式存在显著差异
AI.motivation: 现有幻觉基准主要依赖中性提示和二元检测，无法评估模型在渐进式强制提示下的幻觉行为变化，特别是在不同任务类型中幻觉发生率和强度的响应模式
AI.method: 构建Ghost-100基准，包含800张合成图像，涵盖三个任务家族（文本不可读、时间读取、物体缺失），每个图像配以5个不同强度的提示。采用双轨评估协议：基于规则的H-Rate和GPT-4o-mini评分的H-Score
AI.result: 评估9个开源VLM发现：H-Rate和H-Score在不同模型家族间显著分离；阅读式和存在检测子集对提示压力的响应方式不同；多个模型在中等提示强度下表现出非单调敏感性峰值
AI.conclusion: Ghost-100基准揭示了VLM在强制提示下的复杂幻觉行为模式，这些模式被聚合指标所掩盖，强调了需要更细粒度的评估方法来理解模型在现实部署中的可靠性

title: Geometric Decoupling: Diagnosing the Structural Instability of Latent
summary: Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs) achieve high-fidelity synthesis but suffer from latent space brittleness, causing discontinuous semantic jumps during editing. We introduce a Riemannian framework to diagnose this instability by analyzing the generative Jacobian, decomposing geometry into \textit{Local Scaling} (capacity) and \textit{Local Complexity} (curvature). Our study uncovers a \textbf{``Geometric Decoupling"}: while curvature in normal generation functionally encodes image detail, OOD generation exhibits a functional decoupling where extreme curvature is wasted on unstable semantic boundaries rather than perceptible details. This geometric misallocation identifies ``Geometric Hotspots" as the structural root of instability, providing a robust intrinsic metric for diagnosing generative reliability.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出黎曼几何框架分析潜在扩散模型的不稳定性，发现几何解耦现象：正常生成时曲率编码图像细节，但OOD生成时极端曲率浪费在不稳定的语义边界而非可感知细节上，识别出"几何热点"作为不稳定的结构根源。
AI.motivation: 潜在扩散模型虽然能实现高保真合成，但存在潜在空间脆弱性问题，导致编辑时出现不连续的语义跳跃。需要诊断这种不稳定性并理解其几何根源。
AI.method: 引入黎曼几何框架，通过分析生成雅可比矩阵，将几何分解为局部缩放（容量）和局部复杂度（曲率）。研究几何解耦现象，识别几何热点作为不稳定的结构根源。
AI.result: 研究发现几何解耦现象：正常生成时曲率功能性地编码图像细节，但OOD生成时出现功能解耦，极端曲率浪费在不稳定的语义边界而非可感知细节上。几何热点被识别为生成不稳定的结构根源。
AI.conclusion: 几何解耦和几何热点的发现为诊断生成可靠性提供了鲁棒的内在度量标准，揭示了潜在扩散模型不稳定性的几何根源，为改进模型稳定性提供了理论基础。

title: Rethinking Dataset Distillation: Hard Truths about Soft Labels
comment: CVPR 2026 (Oral). First two authors contributed equally
summary: Despite the perceived success of large-scale dataset distillation (DD) methods, recent evidence finds that simple random image baselines perform on-par with state-of-theart DD methods like SRe2L due to the use of soft labels during downstream model training. This is in contrast with the findings in coreset literature, where high-quality coresets consistently outperform random subsets in the hardlabel (HL) setting. To understand this discrepancy, we perform a detailed scalability analysis to examine the role of data quality under different label regimes, ranging from abundant soft labels (termed as SL+KD regime) to fixed soft labels (SL) and hard labels (HL). Our analysis reveals that high-quality coresets fail to convincingly outperform the random baseline in both SL and SL+KD regimes. In the SL+KD setting, performance further approaches nearoptimal levels relative to the full dataset, regardless of subset size or quality, for a given compute budget. This performance saturation calls into question the widespread practice of using soft labels for model evaluation, where unlike the HL setting, subset quality has negligible influence. A subsequent systematic evaluation of five large-scale and four small-scale DD methods in the HL setting reveals that only RDED reliably outperforms random baselines on ImageNet-1K, but can still lag behind strong coreset methods due to its over-reliance on easy sample patches. Based on this, we introduce CAD-Prune, a compute-aware pruning metric that efficiently identifies samples of optimal difficulty for a given compute budget, and use it to develop CA2D, a compute-aligned DD method, outperforming current DD methods on ImageNet-1K at various IPC settings. Together, our findings uncover many insights into current DD research and establish useful tools to advance dataefficient learning for both coresets and DD.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大规模数据集蒸馏方法在软标签设置下与随机基线表现相当，但在硬标签设置下高质量核心集能稳定超越随机子集。论文提出了计算感知的CAD-Prune指标和CA2D方法，在ImageNet-1K上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前大规模数据集蒸馏方法在软标签设置下表现与随机基线相当，这与核心集文献中高质量核心集在硬标签设置下稳定超越随机子集的发现存在矛盾。需要理解数据质量在不同标签机制下的作用差异。
AI.method: 1) 进行可扩展性分析，研究数据质量在从丰富软标签(SL+KD)到固定软标签(SL)和硬标签(HL)不同标签机制下的作用；2) 在HL设置下系统评估5个大规模和4个小规模DD方法；3) 提出CAD-Prune计算感知剪枝指标，识别给定计算预算下的最优难度样本；4) 开发CA2D计算对齐DD方法。
AI.result: 1) 高质量核心集在SL和SL+KD机制下未能显著超越随机基线；2) 在SL+KD设置下，性能接近全数据集的最优水平，与子集大小或质量无关；3) 在HL设置下，只有RDED在ImageNet-1K上可靠超越随机基线，但仍落后于强核心集方法；4) CA2D方法在ImageNet-1K的各种IPC设置下优于当前DD方法。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了当前DD研究的多个见解：软标签评估实践存在问题，子集质量影响可忽略；提出了计算感知的CAD-Prune指标和CA2D方法，为数据高效学习提供了有用工具。需要重新思考DD评估方法，特别是在硬标签设置下的性能评估。

title: On Accelerating Grounded Code Development for Research
summary: A major challenge for niche scientific and technical domains in leveraging coding agents is the lack of access to up-to-date, domain- specific knowledge. Foundational models often demonstrate limited reasoning capabilities in specialized fields and cannot inherently incorporate knowledge that evolves through ongoing research and experimentation. Materials scientists exploring novel compounds, communication engineers designing and evaluating new protocols, and bioengineering researchers conducting iterative experiments all face this limitation. These experts typically lack the resources to fine-tune large models or continuously embed new findings, creating a barrier to adopting AI-driven coding agents. To address this, we introduce a framework that gives coding agents instanta- neous access to research repositories and technical documentation, enabling real-time, context-aware operation. Our open-source im- plementation allows users to upload documents via doc-search.dev and includes zed-fork, which enforces domain-specific rules and workflows. Together, these tools accelerate the integration of coding agents into specialized scientific and technical workflows

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一个框架，让编码智能体能够即时访问研究资料库和技术文档，解决专业科学领域缺乏最新领域知识的问题。
AI.motivation: 专业科学和技术领域（如材料科学、通信工程、生物工程）在利用编码智能体时面临缺乏最新领域特定知识的挑战。基础模型在专业领域推理能力有限，且无法整合持续发展的研究成果，而领域专家通常缺乏微调大模型或持续嵌入新发现的资源。
AI.method: 引入一个框架，让编码智能体能够即时访问研究资料库和技术文档，实现实时、上下文感知的操作。开源实现包括doc-search.dev文档上传功能和zed-fork工具，后者用于强制执行领域特定规则和工作流程。
AI.result: 该框架加速了编码智能体在专业科学和技术工作流程中的集成，使研究人员能够实时获取最新领域知识，提高编码智能体在专业环境中的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 通过提供即时访问研究资料库和技术文档的框架，解决了专业领域编码智能体缺乏最新知识的问题，降低了AI驱动编码智能体在专业科学和技术工作流程中的采用门槛。

title: DUALVISION: RGB-Infrared Multimodal Large Language Models for Robust Visual Reasoning
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive performance on visual perception and reasoning tasks with RGB imagery, yet they remain fragile under common degradations, such as fog, blur, or low-light conditions. Infrared (IR) imaging, a well-established complement to RGB, offers inherent robustness in these conditions, but its integration into MLLMs remains underexplored. To bridge this gap, we propose DUALVISION, a lightweight fusion module that efficiently incorporates IR-RGB information into MLLMs via patch-level localized cross-attention. To support training and evaluation and to facilitate future research, we also introduce DV-204K, a dataset of ~25K publicly available aligned IR-RGB image pairs with 204K modality-specific QA annotations, and DV-500, a benchmark of 500 IR-RGB image pairs with 500 QA pairs designed for evaluating cross-modal reasoning. Leveraging these datasets, we benchmark both open- and closed-source MLLMs and demonstrate that DUALVISION delivers strong empirical performance under a wide range of visual degradations. Our code and dataset are available at https://abrarmajeedi.github.io/dualvision.

AI.tldr: 提出DUALVISION模块，通过轻量级融合将红外图像信息整合到多模态大语言模型中，增强模型在视觉退化条件下的鲁棒性
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在RGB图像上表现良好，但在雾、模糊、低光等常见退化条件下表现脆弱。红外成像在这些条件下具有固有鲁棒性，但如何将其整合到MLLMs中尚未充分探索
AI.method: 提出DUALVISION轻量级融合模块，通过patch级别的局部交叉注意力机制高效整合IR-RGB信息；构建DV-204K数据集（约25K对齐的IR-RGB图像对，含204K模态特定QA标注）和DV-500基准（500个IR-RGB图像对，500个QA对用于评估跨模态推理）
AI.result: DUALVISION在多种视觉退化条件下表现出强大的实证性能；对开源和闭源MLLMs进行了基准测试，验证了方法的有效性
AI.conclusion: DUALVISION成功将红外图像信息整合到MLLMs中，显著提升了模型在视觉退化条件下的鲁棒性；提供了新的数据集和基准，为未来研究奠定了基础

title: Curvature-Aware PCA with Geodesic Tangent Space Aggregation for Semi-Supervised Learning
summary: Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is a fundamental tool for representation learning, but its global linear formulation fails to capture the structure of data supported on curved manifolds. In contrast, manifold learning methods model nonlinearity but often sacrifice the spectral structure and stability of PCA. We propose \emph{Geodesic Tangent Space Aggregation PCA (GTSA-PCA)}, a geometric extension of PCA that integrates curvature awareness and geodesic consistency within a unified spectral framework. Our approach replaces the global covariance operator with curvature-weighted local covariance operators defined over a $k$-nearest neighbor graph, yielding local tangent subspaces that adapt to the manifold while suppressing high-curvature distortions. We then introduce a geodesic alignment operator that combines intrinsic graph distances with subspace affinities to globally synchronize these local representations. The resulting operator admits a spectral decomposition whose leading components define a geometry-aware embedding. We further incorporate semi-supervised information to guide the alignment, improving discriminative structure with minimal supervision. Experiments on real datasets show consistent improvements over PCA, Kernel PCA, Supervised PCA and strong graph-based baselines such as UMAP, particularly in small sample size and high-curvature regimes. Our results position GTSA-PCA as a principled bridge between statistical and geometric approaches to dimensionality reduction.

AI.tldr: GTSA-PCA是一种几何扩展的PCA方法，通过曲率加权的局部协方差算子和测地线对齐算子，在统一谱框架中集成曲率感知和测地线一致性，在流形数据上优于传统PCA和流形学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统PCA的全局线性公式无法捕捉弯曲流形上的数据结构，而流形学习方法虽然能建模非线性但牺牲了PCA的谱结构和稳定性。需要一种既能处理非线性流形结构又能保持PCA谱特性的方法。
AI.method: 提出GTSA-PCA：1) 用曲率加权的局部协方差算子替代全局协方差算子，在k近邻图上定义局部切子空间；2) 引入测地线对齐算子，结合内在图距离和子空间亲和度来全局同步局部表示；3) 可加入半监督信息指导对齐过程；4) 对最终算子进行谱分解得到几何感知嵌入。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，GTSA-PCA相比PCA、核PCA、监督PCA以及UMAP等图基方法有持续改进，特别是在小样本量和高曲率情况下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: GTSA-PCA为降维提供了一个原则性的桥梁，连接了统计方法和几何方法，在保持PCA谱结构稳定性的同时有效处理流形数据的非线性几何特性。

title: Plausible Reasoning and First-Order Plausible Logic
comment: 28 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1703.01697
summary: Defeasible statements are statements that are likely, or probable, or usually true, but may occasionally be false. Plausible reasoning makes conclusions from statements that are either facts or defeasible statements without using numbers. So there are no probabilities or suchlike involved. Seventeen principles of logics that do plausible reasoning are suggested and several important plausible reasoning examples are considered. There are 14 necessary principles and 3 desirable principles, one of which is not formally stated. A first-order logic, called Plausible Logic (PL), is defined that satisfies all but two of the desirable principles and reasons correctly with all the examples. As far as we are aware, this is the only such logic. PL has 8 reasoning algorithms because, from a given plausible reasoning situation, there are different sensible conclusions. This article is a condensation of my book `Plausible Reasoning and Plausible Logic' (PRPL), which is to be submitted. Each section of this article corresponds to a chapter in PRPL, and vice versa. The proofs of all the results are in PRPL, so they are omitted in this article.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为"可信逻辑"的一阶逻辑系统，用于处理可信推理，定义了17条逻辑原则，并开发了8种推理算法来处理不同的可信推理情境。
AI.motivation: 可信陈述是那些可能、大概或通常为真但偶尔可能为假的陈述。可信推理是从事实或可信陈述中得出结论的过程，不涉及概率等数值计算。目前缺乏能够系统处理可信推理的逻辑框架。
AI.method: 提出了17条可信推理的逻辑原则（14条必要原则和3条可取原则），定义了一种名为"可信逻辑"的一阶逻辑系统，该系统满足除两条可取原则外的所有原则，并开发了8种不同的推理算法来处理各种可信推理情境。
AI.result: 可信逻辑系统能够正确处理所有考虑的可信推理示例，据作者所知，这是唯一能够做到这一点的逻辑系统。该系统提供了8种推理算法，以适应不同可信推理情境下的合理结论。
AI.conclusion: 可信逻辑为处理可信推理提供了一个系统化的逻辑框架，填补了该领域的空白。该文章是即将提交的书籍《可信推理与可信逻辑》的浓缩版本，每个章节对应书中的一个章节。

title: Feasibility of Indoor Frame-Wise Lidar Semantic Segmentation via Distillation from Visual Foundation Model
summary: Frame-wise semantic segmentation of indoor lidar scans is a fundamental step toward higher-level 3D scene understanding and mapping applications. However, acquiring frame-wise ground truth for training deep learning models is costly and time-consuming. This challenge is largely addressed, for imagery, by Visual Foundation Models (VFMs) which segment image frames. The same VFMs may be used to train a lidar scan frame segmentation model via a 2D-to-3D distillation pipeline. The success of such distillation has been shown for autonomous driving scenes, but not yet for indoor scenes. Here, we study the feasibility of repeating this success for indoor scenes, in a frame-wise distillation manner by coupling each lidar scan with a VFM-processed camera image. The evaluation is done using indoor SLAM datasets, where pseudo-labels are used for downstream evaluation. Also, a small manually annotated lidar dataset is provided for validation, as there are no other lidar frame-wise indoor datasets with semantics. Results show that the distilled model achieves up to 56% mIoU under pseudo-label evaluation and around 36% mIoU with real-label, demonstrating the feasibility of cross-modal distillation for indoor lidar semantic segmentation without manual annotations.

AI.tldr: 研究探索了将视觉基础模型（VFMs）通过2D到3D蒸馏方法应用于室内激光雷达扫描的语义分割，无需人工标注即可训练模型。
AI.motivation: 室内激光雷达扫描的逐帧语义分割对于3D场景理解和地图应用至关重要，但获取训练深度学习模型所需的逐帧地面真值成本高昂且耗时。视觉基础模型在图像分割方面表现出色，但尚未在室内场景中验证其通过蒸馏方法训练激光雷达分割模型的可行性。
AI.method: 采用2D到3D蒸馏管道，将每个激光雷达扫描与经过视觉基础模型处理的相机图像配对，通过跨模态蒸馏训练激光雷达扫描分割模型。使用室内SLAM数据集进行评估，其中伪标签用于下游评估，并提供了小型手动标注的激光雷达数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 蒸馏模型在伪标签评估下达到最高56%的mIoU，在真实标签评估下达到约36%的mIoU，证明了无需人工标注即可实现室内激光雷达语义分割的跨模态蒸馏可行性。
AI.conclusion: 研究表明，通过视觉基础模型的2D到3D蒸馏方法，可以在无需人工标注的情况下实现室内激光雷达扫描的语义分割，为室内场景的3D理解提供了可行的无监督学习途径。

title: Learning Lifted Action Models from Unsupervised Visual Traces
comment: Accepted to the 36th International Conference on Automated Planning and Scheduling (ICAPS-26)
summary: Efficient construction of models capturing the preconditions and effects of actions is essential for applying AI planning in real-world domains. Extensive prior work has explored learning such models from high-level descriptions of state and/or action sequences. In this paper, we tackle a more challenging setting: learning lifted action models from sequences of state images, without action observation. We propose a deep learning framework that jointly learns state prediction, action prediction, and a lifted action model. We also introduce a mixed-integer linear program (MILP) to prevent prediction collapse and self-reinforcing errors among predictions. The MILP takes the predicted states, actions, and action model over a subset of traces and solves for logically consistent states, actions, and action model that are as close as possible to the original predictions. Pseudo-labels extracted from the MILP solution are then used to guide further training. Experiments across multiple domains show that integrating MILP-based correction helps the model escape local optima and converge toward globally consistent solutions.

AI.tldr: 从状态图像序列中学习提升动作模型，无需动作观察，通过深度学习框架联合学习状态预测、动作预测和提升动作模型，使用MILP防止预测崩溃和自增强错误。
AI.motivation: 从状态图像序列中学习动作模型是一个更具挑战性的设置，因为缺乏动作观察信息，需要构建能够捕捉动作前提条件和效果的模型，这对于在实际领域应用AI规划至关重要。
AI.method: 提出深度学习框架联合学习状态预测、动作预测和提升动作模型；引入混合整数线性规划（MILP）防止预测崩溃和自增强错误，MILP在轨迹子集上求解逻辑一致的状态、动作和动作模型，并使用MILP解中的伪标签指导进一步训练。
AI.result: 在多个领域的实验表明，集成基于MILP的校正有助于模型逃离局部最优解，收敛到全局一致的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够从状态图像序列中有效学习提升动作模型，无需动作观察，通过MILP校正机制提高了学习过程的鲁棒性和一致性。

title: Multi-Domain Learning with Global Expert Mapping
comment: Submitted to IEEE TPAMI on August 2025
summary: Human perception generalizes well across different domains, but most vision models struggle beyond their training data. This gap motivates multi-dataset learning, where a single model is trained on diverse datasets to improve robustness under domain shifts. However, unified training remains challenging due to inconsistencies in data distributions and label semantics. Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models provide a scalable solution by routing inputs to specialized subnetworks (experts). Yet, existing MoEs often fail to specialize effectively, as their load-balancing mechanisms enforce uniform input distribution across experts. This fairness conflicts with domain-aware routing, causing experts to learn redundant representations, and reducing performance especially on rare or out-of-distribution domains. We propose GEM (Global Expert Mapping), a planner-compiler framework that replaces the learned router with a global scheduler. Our planner, based on linear programming relaxation, computes a fractional assignment of datasets to experts, while the compiler applies hierarchical rounding to convert this soft plan into a deterministic, capacity-aware mapping. Unlike prior MoEs, GEM avoids balancing loss, resolves the conflict between fairness and specialization, and produces interpretable routing. Experiments show that GEM-DINO achieves state-of-the-art performance on the UODB benchmark, with notable gains on underrepresented datasets and solves task interference in few-shot adaptation scenarios.

AI.tldr: GEM框架通过全局调度器替代学习型路由器，解决MoE模型中负载均衡与领域专业化之间的冲突，在跨域学习任务中实现更好的专业化和性能提升。
AI.motivation: 人类感知具有良好的跨域泛化能力，但大多数视觉模型在训练数据之外表现不佳。多数据集学习旨在通过训练多样化数据来提高模型在域偏移下的鲁棒性，但数据分布和标签语义的不一致性使得统一训练具有挑战性。现有的MoE模型虽然通过专家路由提供可扩展解决方案，但其负载均衡机制强制专家间均匀分配输入，这与领域感知路由相冲突，导致专家学习冗余表示，在稀有或分布外域上性能下降。
AI.method: 提出GEM（全局专家映射）框架，包含规划器和编译器两部分。规划器基于线性规划松弛计算数据集到专家的分数分配，编译器通过分层舍入将软计划转换为确定性的容量感知映射。该框架替代了学习型路由器，避免了平衡损失，解决了公平性与专业化之间的冲突。
AI.result: GEM-DINO在UODB基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，在代表性不足的数据集上获得显著提升，并解决了少样本适应场景中的任务干扰问题。
AI.conclusion: GEM框架通过全局调度策略有效解决了MoE模型中负载均衡与领域专业化之间的根本冲突，实现了更好的专家专业化、可解释路由和跨域性能提升，为多数据集学习提供了更有效的解决方案。

title: One Step Forward and K Steps Back: Better Reasoning with Denoising Recursion Models
summary: Looped transformers scale computational depth without increasing parameter count by repeatedly applying a shared transformer block and can be used for iterative refinement, where each loop rewrites a full fixed-size prediction in parallel. On difficult problems, such as those that require search-like computation, reaching a highly structured solution starting from noise can require long refinement trajectories. Learning such trajectories is challenging when training specifies only the target solution and provides no supervision over the intermediate refinement path. Diffusion models tackle this issue by corrupting data with varying magnitudes of noise and training the model to reverse it in a \textit{single step}. However, this process misaligns training and testing behaviour. We introduce Denoising Recursion Models, a method that similarly corrupts data with noise but trains the model to reverse the corruption over \textit{multiple} recursive steps. This strategy provides a tractable curriculum of intermediate states, while better aligning training with testing and incentivizing non-greedy, forward-looking generation. Through extensive experiments, we show this approach outperforms the Tiny Recursion Model (TRM) on ARC-AGI, where it recently achieved breakthrough performance.

AI.tldr: Denoising Recursion Models (DRM)通过多步递归去噪训练，比单步去噪的扩散模型更好地对齐训练与测试行为，在ARC-AGI任务上超越了Tiny Recursion Model (TRM)。
AI.motivation: 循环transformer通过共享参数增加计算深度，可用于迭代优化。但在需要搜索式计算的困难问题中，从噪声到高度结构化解决方案的长优化轨迹难以学习，因为训练只指定目标解而不监督中间路径。扩散模型通过单步去噪解决此问题，但训练与测试行为不一致。
AI.method: 提出Denoising Recursion Models (DRM)：与扩散模型类似，用噪声破坏数据，但训练模型通过多个递归步骤来逆转破坏。这种方法提供了可处理的中间状态课程，同时更好地对齐训练与测试，并激励非贪婪、前瞻性的生成。
AI.result: 通过大量实验表明，该方法在ARC-AGI任务上超越了最近取得突破性性能的Tiny Recursion Model (TRM)。
AI.conclusion: DRM通过多步递归去噪训练，提供了更好的训练-测试对齐和前瞻性生成能力，在需要复杂搜索计算的任务上表现优异。

title: Reinforcement Learning Improves LLM Accuracy and Reasoning in Disease Classification from Radiology Reports
summary: Accurate disease classification from radiology reports is essential for many applications. While supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of lightweight LLMs improves accuracy, it can degrade reasoning.
