We propose a two-stage approach: SFT on disease labels followed by Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) to refine predictions by optimizing accuracy and format without reasoning supervision. Across three radiologist-annotated datasets, SFT outperformed baselines and GRPO further improved classification and enhanced reasoning recall and comprehensiveness.

AI.tldr: 提出两阶段方法：先监督微调疾病分类，再用GRPO优化预测准确性和格式，不依赖推理监督，在放射学报告分类中提升效果
AI.motivation: 放射学报告的准确疾病分类对许多应用至关重要，但监督微调轻量级大语言模型虽然能提高准确性，却可能损害模型的推理能力
AI.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段对疾病标签进行监督微调；第二阶段使用组相对策略优化（GRPO），通过优化准确性和格式来细化预测，无需推理监督
AI.result: 在三个放射科医生标注的数据集上，监督微调方法优于基线，而GRPO进一步改善了分类性能，同时增强了推理的召回率和全面性
AI.conclusion: 提出的两阶段方法（SFT+GRPO）能有效提升放射学报告疾病分类的准确性，同时改善模型的推理能力，无需专门的推理监督

title: Task Switching Without Forgetting via Proximal Decoupling
summary: In continual learning, the primary challenge is to learn new information without forgetting old knowledge. A common solution addresses this trade-off through regularization, penalizing changes to parameters critical for previous tasks. In most cases, this regularization term is directly added to the training loss and optimized with standard gradient descent, which blends learning and retention signals into a single update and does not explicitly separate essential parameters from redundant ones. As task sequences grow, this coupling can over-constrain the model, limiting forward transfer and leading to inefficient use of capacity. We propose a different approach that separates task learning from stability enforcement via operator splitting. The learning step focuses on minimizing the current task loss, while a proximal stability step applies a sparse regularizer to prune unnecessary parameters and preserve task-relevant ones. This turns the stability-plasticity into a negotiated update between two complementary operators, rather than a conflicting gradient. We provide theoretical justification for the splitting method on the continual-learning objective, and demonstrate that our proposed solver achieves state-of-the-art results on standard benchmarks, improving both stability and adaptability without the need for replay buffers, Bayesian sampling, or meta-learning components.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于算子分裂的持续学习方法，将任务学习和稳定性增强分离，通过稀疏正则化剪枝不必要参数并保留任务相关参数，在标准基准测试中取得了SOTA结果。
AI.motivation: 持续学习中的主要挑战是在学习新信息时不遗忘旧知识。现有方法通常通过正则化惩罚对先前任务关键参数的改变，但这种方法将学习和保留信号混合在单一更新中，没有明确区分关键参数和冗余参数。随着任务序列增长，这种耦合会过度约束模型，限制前向迁移并导致容量使用效率低下。
AI.method: 提出基于算子分裂的方法，将任务学习与稳定性增强分离：学习步骤专注于最小化当前任务损失，而近端稳定性步骤应用稀疏正则化来剪枝不必要参数并保留任务相关参数。这种方法将稳定性-可塑性权衡转化为两个互补算子之间的协商更新，而不是冲突的梯度。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中取得了最先进的结果，提高了稳定性和适应性，且不需要重放缓冲区、贝叶斯采样或元学习组件。提供了分裂方法在持续学习目标上的理论证明。
AI.conclusion: 通过算子分裂将任务学习与稳定性增强分离的方法有效解决了持续学习中的稳定性-可塑性权衡问题，实现了更好的前向迁移和容量利用，为持续学习提供了一种新颖有效的解决方案。

title: OLLM: Options-based Large Language Models
summary: We introduce Options LLM (OLLM), a simple, general method that replaces the single next-token prediction of standard LLMs with a \textit{set of learned options} for the next token, indexed by a discrete latent variable. Instead of relying on temperature or sampling heuristics to induce diversity, OLLM models variation explicitly: a small latent space parametrizes multiple plausible next-token options which can be selected or searched by a downstream policy. Architecturally, OLLM is a lightweight "plug-in" that inserts two layers: an encoder and a decoder, before the output head, allowing almost any pretrained LLM to be converted with minimal additional parameters. We apply OLLM to a 1.7B-parameter backbone (only $1.56\%$ of parameters trainable) trained on OpenMathReasoning and evaluated on OmniMath. The SOTA LoRA-adapted baselines peak at $51\%$ final answer correctness, while OLLM's option set allows up to $\sim 70\%$ under optimal latent selection. We then train a compact policy in the latent space that emits latents to control generation. Operating in a low-dimensional option space makes reward optimization far more sample-efficient and substantially reduces common misalignments (e.g., language switching or degenerate reasoning), as the policy is constrained to options learned during SFT. Crucially, this alignment arises from model structure rather than additional KL or handcrafted alignment losses. Our results demonstrate that optionized next-token modeling enhances controllability, robustness, and efficiency in math reasoning, and highlight latent-space policy learning as a promising direction for reinforcement learning in LLMs.

AI.tldr: OLLM用学习到的选项集合替代标准LLM的单次令牌预测，通过离散潜变量索引多个合理的下一个令牌选项，增强可控性和多样性
AI.motivation: 标准LLM依赖温度或采样启发式方法产生多样性，缺乏显式建模变化的能力。OLLM旨在通过显式建模多个合理的下一个令牌选项来增强可控性、鲁棒性和效率
AI.method: OLLM是一个轻量级"插件"，在输出头前插入编码器和解码器两层，将预训练LLM转换为选项化模型。使用小型潜空间参数化多个合理的下一个令牌选项，下游策略可在潜空间中选择或搜索
AI.result: 在1.7B参数骨干上，仅1.56%参数可训练。SOTA LoRA基线峰值51%最终答案正确率，而OLLM在最优潜选择下可达~70%。在潜空间中训练紧凑策略可控制生成，显著减少常见错位问题
AI.conclusion: 选项化的下一个令牌建模增强了数学推理中的可控性、鲁棒性和效率，潜空间策略学习是LLM强化学习的有前景方向。这种对齐源于模型结构而非额外KL或手工对齐损失

title: ConvVitMamba: Efficient Multiscale Convolution, Transformer, and Mamba-Based Sequence modelling for Hyperspectral Image Classification
comment: Pre-print Accepted for Publication in International Journal of Remote Sensing
summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) classification remains challenging due to high spectral dimensionality, redundancy, and limited labeled data. Although convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and Vision Transformers (ViTs) achieve strong performance by exploiting spectral-spatial information and long-range dependencies, they often incur high computational cost and large model size, limiting practical use. To address these limitations, a unified hybrid framework, termed ConvVitMamba, is proposed for efficient HSI classification. The architecture integrates three components: a multiscale convolutional feature extractor to capture local spectral, spatial, and joint patterns; a Vision Transformer based tokenization and encoding stage to model global contextual relationships; and a lightweight Mamba inspired gated sequence mixing module for efficient content-aware refinement without quadratic self-attention. Principal Component Analysis (PCA) is used as preprocessing to reduce redundancy and improve efficiency. Experiments on four benchmark datasets, including Houston and three UAV borne QUH datasets (Pingan, Qingyun, and Tangdaowan), demonstrate that ConvVitMamba consistently outperforms CNN, Transformer, and Mamba based methods while maintaining a favorable balance between accuracy, model size, and inference efficiency. Ablation studies confirm the complementary contributions of all components. The results indicate that the proposed framework provides an effective and efficient solution for HSI classification in diverse scenarios. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/mqalkhatib/ConvVitMamba

AI.tldr: 提出ConvVitMamba统一混合框架，通过整合多尺度卷积、Vision Transformer和轻量级Mamba模块，实现高效高光谱图像分类，在精度、模型大小和推理效率间取得良好平衡。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类面临光谱维度高、冗余性强、标记数据有限等挑战。现有CNN和ViT方法虽然性能强，但计算成本高、模型大，限制了实际应用。需要设计更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出ConvVitMamba统一混合框架：1) 多尺度卷积特征提取器捕获局部光谱、空间和联合模式；2) Vision Transformer进行token化和编码，建模全局上下文关系；3) 轻量级Mamba门控序列混合模块，实现无需二次自注意力的内容感知细化；4) 使用PCA预处理减少冗余。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集（Houston和三个UAV borne QUH数据集）上的实验表明，ConvVitMamba在CNN、Transformer和Mamba方法中表现最佳，同时在精度、模型大小和推理效率间保持良好平衡。消融研究证实了各组件的互补贡献。
AI.conclusion: ConvVitMamba框架为不同场景下的高光谱图像分类提供了有效且高效的解决方案，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了计算成本和模型复杂度。

title: ParamBoost: Gradient Boosted Piecewise Cubic Polynomials
summary: Generalized Additive Models (GAMs) can be used to create non-linear glass-box (i.e. explicitly interpretable) models, where the predictive function is fully observable over the complete input space. However, glass-box interpretability itself does not allow for the incorporation of expert knowledge from the modeller. In this paper, we present ParamBoost, a novel GAM whose shape functions (i.e. mappings from individual input features to the output) are learnt using a Gradient Boosting algorithm that fits cubic polynomial functions at leaf nodes. ParamBoost incorporates several constraints commonly used in parametric analysis to ensure well-refined shape functions. These constraints include: (i) continuity of the shape functions and their derivatives (up to C2); (ii) monotonicity; (iii) convexity; (iv) feature interaction constraints; and (v) model specification constraints. Empirical results show that the unconstrained ParamBoost model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GAMs across several real-world datasets. We further demonstrate that modellers can selectively impose required constraints at a modest trade-off in predictive performance, allowing the model to be fully tailored to application-specific interpretability and parametric-analysis requirements.

AI.tldr: ParamBoost是一种新型广义可加模型，使用梯度提升算法学习三次多项式形状函数，可灵活加入专家约束，在保持良好预测性能的同时实现可解释性
AI.motivation: 传统GAMs虽然具有玻璃盒可解释性，但无法融入建模者的专家知识。需要一种既能保持可解释性，又能灵活整合领域专家约束的模型
AI.method: 提出ParamBoost方法，使用梯度提升算法学习形状函数，在叶节点拟合三次多项式函数。可选择性加入五种约束：(i)函数及其导数连续性(C2)；(ii)单调性；(iii)凸性；(iv)特征交互约束；(v)模型规范约束
AI.result: 无约束的ParamBoost模型在多个真实数据集上持续优于最先进的GAMs。实验表明，建模者可以以适度的预测性能为代价，选择性施加所需约束，使模型完全适应特定应用的可解释性和参数分析需求
AI.conclusion: ParamBoost提供了一种灵活框架，既能保持GAMs的玻璃盒可解释性，又能融入专家知识约束，在预测性能和可解释性之间实现良好平衡，适用于需要参数分析和领域知识整合的应用场景

title: Towards Scalable Lifelong Knowledge Editing with Selective Knowledge Suppression
summary: Large language models (LLMs) require frequent knowledge updates to reflect changing facts and mitigate hallucinations. To meet this demand, lifelong knowledge editing has emerged as a continual approach to modify specific pieces of knowledge without retraining the entire model. Existing parameter editing methods struggle with stability during sequential edits due to catastrophic forgetting. While retrieval-based approaches are proposed to alleviate this issue, their applicability remains limited across various datasets because of high training costs. To address these limitations and enhance scalability in lifelong settings, we propose LightEdit. Our framework first selects relevant knowledge from retrieved information to modify the query effectively. It then incorporates a decoding strategy to suppress the model's original knowledge probabilities, thereby enabling efficient edits based on the selected information. Extensive experiments on ZSRE, Counterfact, and RIPE benchmarks demonstrate that LightEdit outperforms existing lifelong knowledge editing methods. Furthermore, by minimizing training costs, LightEdit achieves cost-effective scalability, enabling easy adaptation to various datasets.

AI.tldr: LightEdit是一个终身知识编辑框架，通过检索相关知识和抑制原始知识概率，高效更新LLM知识，解决现有方法稳定性差和训练成本高的问题
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型需要频繁更新知识以反映变化的事实并减少幻觉。现有参数编辑方法在连续编辑时存在灾难性遗忘问题，而基于检索的方法由于训练成本高，在不同数据集上的适用性有限
AI.method: LightEdit框架首先从检索信息中选择相关知识来有效修改查询，然后采用解码策略抑制模型的原始知识概率，基于选择的信息实现高效编辑
AI.result: 在ZSRE、Counterfact和RIPE基准测试上的广泛实验表明，LightEdit优于现有的终身知识编辑方法。通过最小化训练成本，LightEdit实现了成本效益高的可扩展性，能够轻松适应各种数据集
AI.conclusion: LightEdit通过结合检索选择和解码策略，解决了终身知识编辑中的稳定性和可扩展性问题，为LLM的知识更新提供了一种高效、成本效益高的解决方案

title: HMR-Net: Hierarchical Modular Routing for Cross-Domain Object Detection in Aerial Images
summary: Despite advances in object detection, aerial imagery remains a challenging domain, as models often fail to generalize across variations in spatial resolution, scene composition, and semantic label coverage. Differences in geographic context, sensor characteristics, and object distributions across datasets limit the capacity of conventional models to learn consistent and transferable representations. Shared methods trained on such data tend to impose a unified representation across fundamentally different domains, resulting in poor performance on region-specific content and less flexibility when dealing with novel object categories. To address this, we propose a novel modular learning framework that enables structured specialization in aerial detection. Our method introduces a hierarchical routing mechanism with two levels of modularity: a global expert assignment layer that uses latent geographic embeddings to route datasets to specialized processing modules, and a local scene decomposition mechanism that allocates image subregions to region-specific sub-modules. This allows our method to specialize across datasets and within complex scenes. Additionally, the framework contains a conditional expert module that uses external semantic information (e.g., category names or textual descriptions) to enable detection of novel object categories during inference, without the need for retraining or fine-tuning. By moving beyond monolithic representations, our method offers an adaptive framework for remote sensing object detection. Comprehensive evaluations on four datasets highlight improvements in multi-dataset generalization, regional specialization, and open-category detection.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于航空影像目标检测的模块化学习框架，通过分层路由机制实现跨数据集和场景内的专业化，支持开放类别检测而无需重新训练。
AI.motivation: 航空影像目标检测面临空间分辨率、场景构成和语义标签覆盖的差异挑战，传统模型难以在不同数据集间泛化，统一的表示方法在区域特定内容和新颖类别上表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出模块化学习框架，包含两层模块化：全局专家分配层使用潜在地理嵌入将数据集路由到专门处理模块；局部场景分解机制将图像子区域分配到区域特定子模块；还包含条件专家模块，利用外部语义信息实现推理时的新类别检测。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的综合评估显示，该方法在多数据集泛化、区域专业化和开放类别检测方面均有改进。
AI.conclusion: 通过超越单一表示，该方法为遥感目标检测提供了一个自适应框架，能够更好地处理航空影像的多样性和复杂性。

title: Has Automated Essay Scoring Reached Sufficient Accuracy? Deriving Achievable QWK Ceilings from Classical Test Theory
comment: Accepted for publication at AIED 2026 (full paper)
summary: Automated essay scoring (AES) is commonly evaluated on public benchmarks using quadratic weighted kappa (QWK). However, because benchmark labels are assigned by human raters and inevitably contain scoring errors, it remains unclear both what QWK is theoretically attainable and what level is practically sufficient for deployment. We therefore derive two dataset-specific QWK ceilings based on the reliability concept in classical test theory, which can be estimated from standard two-rater benchmarks without additional annotation. The first is the theoretical ceiling: the maximum QWK that an ideal AES model that perfectly predicts latent true scores can achieve under label noise. The second is the human-like ceiling: the QWK attainable by an AES model with human-level scoring error, providing a practical target when AES is intended to replace a single human rater. We further show that human--human QWK, often used as a ceiling reference, can underestimate the true ceiling. Simulation experiments validate the proposed ceilings, and experiments on real benchmarks illustrate how they clarify the current performance and remaining headroom of modern AES models.

AI.tldr: 论文提出两种基于经典测试理论的数据集特定QWK上限，用于评估自动作文评分系统的性能极限
AI.motivation: 自动作文评分通常使用QWK在公共基准上评估，但由于人工评分存在不可避免的错误，不清楚QWK的理论可达到水平和实际部署所需水平
AI.method: 基于经典测试理论的可靠性概念，推导出两种数据集特定的QWK上限：理论上限（完美预测潜在真实分数的理想模型能达到的最大QWK）和类人上限（具有人类水平评分错误的AES模型可达到的QWK）
AI.result: 模拟实验验证了提出的上限，真实基准实验展示了这些上限如何阐明现代AES模型的当前性能和剩余提升空间
AI.conclusion: 提出的QWK上限为评估自动作文评分系统提供了更准确的性能参考，表明传统的人-人QWK可能低估真实上限

title: Hierarchically Robust Zero-shot Vision-language Models
comment: This paper is accepted by CVPR'26
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) can perform zero-shot classification but are susceptible to adversarial attacks. While robust fine-tuning improves their robustness, existing approaches align fixed text embeddings with an image embedding, sacrificing natural performance and robustness. A robustness degradation also occurs when a model faces adversarial attacks targeting superclasses (parent classes, e.g., mammal) in addition to their base (leaf) classes (e.g., cat). Thus, to enhance adversarial robustness and leverage the inherent hierarchical properties of class space, we propose a novel adversarial fine-tuning framework based on hierarchical embeddings and several levels of adversarially robust alignment of image-text modalities. Additional mechanisms place visual embeddings at the desired depth of hierarchy, and we provide a theoretical connection between the depth of embedding in the hierarchy and the maximum viable margin size. Our model naturally realizes several margin sizes, boosting generalization of adversaries for robustification. As various trees with different parent labels can share the same leaf labels, we also consider aligning over multiple trees to boost semantic variety. Experiments across several datasets are performed.

AI.tldr: 提出基于层次嵌入和对抗对齐的视觉语言模型鲁棒微调框架，通过多层级对抗对齐和嵌入深度控制增强对抗鲁棒性，同时保持自然性能
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在零样本分类中容易受到对抗攻击，现有鲁棒微调方法通过固定文本嵌入与图像嵌入对齐，牺牲了自然性能和鲁棒性。当模型面临针对超类（如哺乳动物）和基类（如猫）的对抗攻击时，鲁棒性会进一步下降。需要利用类别空间的层次特性来增强对抗鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出基于层次嵌入的对抗微调框架：1）使用多层级对抗对齐图像-文本模态；2）通过额外机制将视觉嵌入放置在层次结构的期望深度；3）提供嵌入深度与最大可行边界大小的理论联系；4）模型自然实现多种边界大小，增强对抗样本的泛化；5）考虑在多个共享相同叶标签的树上进行对齐，提升语义多样性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上进行实验验证，结果表明该方法能有效提升对抗鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过层次嵌入和多层级对抗对齐的框架，能够增强视觉语言模型的对抗鲁棒性，同时保持自然性能，并利用类别空间的层次特性来提升模型的整体鲁棒性。

title: AC-SINDy: Compositional Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics
summary: We present AC-SINDy, a compositional extension of the Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (SINDy) framework that replaces explicit feature libraries with a structured representation based on arithmetic circuits. Rather than enumerating candidate basis functions, the proposed approach constructs nonlinear features through compositions of linear functions and multiplicative interactions, yielding a compact and scalable parameterization and enabling sparsity to be enforced directly over the computational graph. We also introduce a formulation that separates state estimation from dynamics identification by combining latent state inference with shared dynamics and multi-step supervision, improving robustness to noise while preserving interpretability. Experiments on nonlinear and chaotic systems demonstrate that the method recovers accurate and interpretable governing equations while scaling more favorably than standard SINDy.

AI.tldr: AC-SINDy是SINDy框架的扩展，用算术电路代替显式特征库，通过线性函数和乘法交互的组合构建非线性特征，实现紧凑可扩展的参数化，并在计算图上直接施加稀疏性。
AI.motivation: 标准SINDy方法需要枚举候选基函数，这在处理复杂非线性系统时面临可扩展性问题。需要一种更紧凑、可扩展的参数化方法，同时保持可解释性并提高对噪声的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 1. 用基于算术电路的结构化表示代替显式特征库；2. 通过线性函数和乘法交互的组合构建非线性特征；3. 将状态估计与动力学识别分离，结合隐状态推断、共享动力学和多步监督；4. 在计算图上直接施加稀疏性。
AI.result: 在非线性和混沌系统上的实验表明，该方法能够恢复准确且可解释的支配方程，同时比标准SINDy具有更好的可扩展性，对噪声具有更好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AC-SINDy通过算术电路的结构化表示提供了一种更紧凑、可扩展的SINDy扩展方法，能够在保持可解释性的同时提高对噪声的鲁棒性，为复杂非线性系统的动力学识别提供了有效工具。

title: Reasoning-Aware AIGC Detection via Alignment and Reinforcement
summary: The rapid advancement and widespread adoption of Large Language Models (LLMs) have elevated the need for reliable AI-generated content (AIGC) detection, which remains challenging as models evolve. We introduce AIGC-text-bank, a comprehensive multi-domain dataset with diverse LLM sources and authorship scenarios, and propose REVEAL, a detection framework that generates interpretable reasoning chains before classification. Our approach uses a two-stage training strategy: supervised fine-tuning to establish reasoning capabilities, followed by reinforcement learning to improve accuracy, improve logical consistency, and reduce hallucinations. Extensive experiments show that REVEAL achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple benchmarks, offering a robust and transparent solution for AIGC detection. The project is open-source at https://aka.ms/reveal

AI.tldr: REVEAL是一个用于AI生成内容检测的框架，通过生成可解释的推理链进行分类，使用两阶段训练策略，在多个基准测试中达到最先进性能。
AI.motivation: 随着大型语言模型的快速发展和广泛应用，对可靠的AI生成内容检测需求日益增长，但现有方法在模型不断演进的情况下仍面临挑战。
AI.method: 引入AIGC-text-bank多领域数据集，提出REVEAL检测框架，采用两阶段训练策略：先通过监督微调建立推理能力，再通过强化学习提高准确性、逻辑一致性和减少幻觉。
AI.result: REVEAL在多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能，为AIGC检测提供了鲁棒且透明的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: REVEAL框架通过可解释的推理链和两阶段训练策略，为AI生成内容检测提供了有效的解决方案，项目已开源。

title: Harmful Intent as a Geometrically Recoverable Feature of LLM Residual Streams
summary:
Harmful intent is geometrically recoverable from large language model residual streams: as a linear direction in most layers, and as angular deviation in layers where projection methods fail. Across 12 models spanning four architectural families (Qwen2.5, Qwen3.5, Llama-3.2, Gemma-3) and three alignment variants (base, instruction-tuned, abliterated), under single-turn, English evaluation, we characterise this geometry through six direction-finding strategies. Three succeed: a soft-AUC-optimised linear direction reaches mean AUROC 0.98 and TPR@1\%FPR 0.80; a class-mean probe reaches 0.98 and 0.71 at <1ms fitting cost; a supervised angular-deviation strategy reaches AUROC 0.96 and TPR of 0.61 along a representationally distinct direction ($73^\circ$ from projection-based solutions), uniquely sustaining detection in middle layers where projection methods collapse.
  Detection remains stable across alignment variants, including abliterated models from which refusal has been surgically removed: harmful intent and refusal behaviour are functionally dissociated features of the representation. A direction fitted on AdvBench transfers to held-out HarmBench and JailbreakBench with worst-case AUROC 0.96. The same picture holds at scale: across Qwen3.5 from 0.8B to 9B parameters, AUROC remains $\geq$0.98 and cross-variant transfer stays within 0.018 of own-direction performance
  This is consistent with a simple account: models acquire a linearly decodable representation of harmful intent as part of general language understanding, and alignment then shapes what they do with such inputs without reorganising the upstream recognition signal. As a practical consequence, AUROC in the 0.97+ regime can substantially overestimate operational detectability; TPR@$1\%$FPR should accompany AUROC in safety-adjacent evaluation.

AI.tldr: 研究发现大语言模型的残差流中存在可几何恢复的有害意图表示：在大多数层中表现为线性方向，在投影方法失效的层中表现为角度偏差。该表示在不同架构、对齐变体和规模下保持稳定，有害意图与拒绝行为在表示上是功能解耦的特征。
AI.motivation: 研究大语言模型中是否存在可检测的有害意图表示，以及这种表示在不同模型架构、对齐方法和规模下的几何特性与稳定性，这对于理解模型的安全机制和开发有效的安全检测方法具有重要意义。
AI.method: 使用6种方向寻找策略在12个模型（涵盖4种架构家族和3种对齐变体）的残差流中表征有害意图的几何表示。成功策略包括：软AUC优化的线性方向、类均值探针、监督角度偏差策略。在单轮英文评估中分析这些方法的性能。
AI.result: 软AUC优化的线性方向达到平均AUROC 0.98和TPR@1%FPR 0.80；类均值探针达到0.98和0.71且拟合成本<1ms；监督角度偏差策略达到AUROC 0.96和TPR 0.61，在中间层保持检测能力。检测在不同对齐变体（包括移除拒绝能力的模型）中保持稳定，AdvBench训练的方向可迁移到HarmBench和JailbreakBench（最差AUROC 0.96）。在不同规模模型（0.8B到9B）中AUROC保持≥0.98。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型在通用语言理解过程中获得了线性可解码的有害意图表示，对齐过程仅影响模型如何处理此类输入而不重组上游识别信号。在安全评估中，仅使用AUROC（0.97+）可能高估操作可检测性，应同时报告TPR@1%FPR指标。

title: UAF: A Unified Audio Front-end LLM for Full-Duplex Speech Interaction
summary: Full-duplex speech interaction, as the most natural and intuitive mode of human communication, is driving artificial intelligence toward more human-like conversational systems. Traditional cascaded speech processing pipelines suffer from critical limitations, including accumulated latency, information loss, and error propagation across modules. To address these issues, recent efforts focus on the end-to-end audio large language models (LLMs) like GPT-4o, which primarily unify speech understanding and generation task. However, most of these models are inherently half-duplex, and rely on a suite of separate, task-specific front-end components, such as voice activity detection (VAD) and turn-taking detection (TD). In our development of speech assistant, we observed that optimizing the speech front-end is equally crucial as advancing the back-end unified model for achieving seamless, responsive interactions. To bridge this gap, we propose the first unified audio front-end LLM (UAF) tailored for full-duplex speech systems. Our model reformulates diverse audio front-end tasks into a single auto-regressive sequence prediction problem, including VAD, TD, speaker recognition (SR), automatic speech recognition (ASR) and question answer (QA). It takes streaming fixed-duration audio chunk (e.g., 600 ms) as input, leverages a reference audio prompt to anchor the target speaker at the beginning, and regressively generates discrete tokens encoding both semantic content and system-level state controls (e.g., interruption signals). Experiments demonstrate that our model achieves leading performance across multiple audio front-end tasks and significantly enhances response latency and interruption accuracy in real-world interaction scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出首个针对全双工语音系统的统一音频前端大语言模型(UAF)，将VAD、TD、SR、ASR、QA等任务统一为自回归序列预测问题，显著提升响应延迟和打断准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统级联语音处理流水线存在延迟累积、信息丢失和错误传播等问题，而现有的端到端音频大语言模型大多是半双工的，且依赖多个独立的前端组件。在开发语音助手时发现，优化语音前端与推进后端统一模型同等重要，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 将多种音频前端任务重新表述为单一的自回归序列预测问题，包括语音活动检测、话轮转换检测、说话人识别、语音识别和问答。模型以流式固定时长音频块为输入，利用参考音频提示在开始时锚定目标说话人，回归生成编码语义内容和系统级状态控制的离散标记。
AI.result: 实验表明，该模型在多个音频前端任务上达到领先性能，并在实际交互场景中显著提升了响应延迟和打断准确性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的统一音频前端大语言模型(UAF)成功解决了全双工语音系统中的前端任务统一问题，为实现更自然、响应更快的语音交互系统提供了有效方案。

title: Bridging Foundation Models and ASTM Metallurgical Standards for Automated Grain Size Estimation from Microscopy Images
comment: Accepted at the 11th IEEE Workshop on Computer Vision for Multimodal Microscopy Image Analysis (CVMI), CVPR Workshops 2026
summary: Extracting standardized metallurgical metrics from microscopy images remains challenging due to complex grain morphology and the data demands of supervised segmentation. To bridge foundational computer vision with practical metallurgical evaluation, we propose an automated pipeline for dense instance segmentation and grain size estimation that adapts Cellpose-SAM to microstructures and integrates its topology-aware gradient tracking with an ASTM E112 Jeffries planimetric module. We systematically benchmark this pipeline against a classical convolutional network (U-Net), an adaptive-prompting vision foundation model (MatSAM) and a contemporary vision-language model (Qwen2.5-VL-7B). Our evaluations reveal that while the out-of-the-box vision-language model struggles with the localized spatial reasoning required for dense microscopic counting and MatSAM suffers from over-segmentation despite its domain-specific prompt generation, our adapted pipeline successfully maintains topological separation. Furthermore, experiments across progressively reduced training splits demonstrate exceptional few-shot scalability; utilizing only two training samples, the proposed system predicts the ASTM grain size number (G) with a mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) as low as 1.50%, while robustness testing across varying target grain counts empirically validates the ASTM 50-grain sampling minimum. These results highlight the efficacy of application-level foundation model integration for highly accurate, automated materials characterization. Our project repository is available at https://github.com/mueez-overflow/ASTM-Grain-Size-Estimator.

AI.tldr: 提出一个自动化管道，将Cellpose-SAM适配于微观结构分析，结合拓扑感知梯度跟踪和ASTM E112 Jeffries平面测量模块，用于密集实例分割和晶粒尺寸估计，在少样本情况下表现出色。
AI.motivation: 从显微镜图像中提取标准化的冶金指标具有挑战性，因为复杂的晶粒形态和监督分割的数据需求。需要将基础计算机视觉技术与实际冶金评估相结合。
AI.method: 提出自动化管道，将Cellpose-SAM适配于微观结构分析，集成其拓扑感知梯度跟踪与ASTM E112 Jeffries平面测量模块。系统性地与U-Net、MatSAM和Qwen2.5-VL-7B进行基准测试。
AI.result: 提出的管道成功保持拓扑分离，而现成的视觉语言模型在密集微观计数方面表现不佳，MatSAM存在过分割问题。在仅使用2个训练样本时，预测ASTM晶粒尺寸数(G)的平均绝对百分比误差低至1.50%。
AI.conclusion: 应用级基础模型集成对于高精度自动化材料表征具有高效性，验证了ASTM 50晶粒采样的最低要求，展示了少样本可扩展性。

title: Collaborative Contextual Bayesian Optimization
summary: Discovering optimal designs through sequential data collection is essential in many real-world applications. While Bayesian Optimization (BO) has achieved remarkable success in this setting, growing attention has recently turned to context-specific optimal design, formalized as Contextual Bayesian Optimization (CBO). Unlike BO, CBO is inherently more challenging as it must approximate an entire mapping from the context space to its corresponding optimal design, requiring simultaneous exploration across contexts and exploitation within each. In many modern applications, such tasks arise across multiple potentially heterogeneous but related clients, where collaboration can significantly improve learning efficiency. We propose CCBO, Collaborative Contextual Bayesian Optimization, a unified framework enabling multiple clients to jointly perform CBO with controllable contexts, supporting both online collaboration and offline initialization from peers' historical beliefs, with an optional privacy-preserving communication mechanism. We establish sublinear regret guarantees and demonstrate, through extensive simulations and a real-world hot rolling application, that CCBO achieves substantial improvements over existing approaches even under client heterogeneity. The code to reproduce the results can be found at https://github.com/cchihyu/Collaborative-Contextual-Bayesian-Optimization

AI.tldr: 提出CCBO框架，支持多个客户端在可控上下文环境中协作进行上下文贝叶斯优化，通过在线协作和离线初始化提升学习效率，具有隐私保护机制。
AI.motivation: 现实应用中需要通过顺序数据收集发现最优设计，上下文贝叶斯优化(CBO)比传统贝叶斯优化更具挑战性，需要同时跨上下文探索和每个上下文内利用。现代应用中多个异构但相关的客户端可以通过协作显著提高学习效率。
AI.method: 提出CCBO（协作上下文贝叶斯优化）统一框架，支持多个客户端在可控上下文环境中联合执行CBO，支持在线协作和从同伴历史信念进行离线初始化，并提供可选的隐私保护通信机制。
AI.result: 建立了次线性遗憾保证，通过大量模拟和实际热轧应用表明，即使在客户端异构情况下，CCBO相比现有方法也能实现显著改进。
AI.conclusion: CCBO为多客户端协作的上下文贝叶斯优化提供了一个有效的统一框架，在保持隐私的同时显著提升了学习效率，适用于现实世界的异构应用场景。

title: Toward Clinically Acceptable Chest X-ray Report Generation: A Qualitative Retrospective Pilot Study of CXRMate-2
summary:
Chest X-ray (CXR) radiology report generation (RRG) models have shown rapid progress, yet their clinical utility remains uncertain due to limited evaluation by radiologists. We present CXRMate-2, a state-of-the-art CXR RRG model that integrates structured multimodal conditioning and reinforcement learning with a composite reward for semantic alignment with radiologist reports. Across the MIMIC-CXR, CheXpert Plus, and ReXgradient datasets, CXRMate-2 achieves statistically significant improvements over strong benchmarks, including gains of 11.2% and 24.4% in GREEN and RadGraph-XL, respectively, on MIMIC-CXR relative to MedGemma 1.5 (4B).
  To directly compare CXRMate-2 against radiologist reporting, we conduct a blinded, randomised qualitative retrospective evaluation. Three consultant radiologists compare generated and radiologist reports across 120 studies from the MIMIC-CXR test set. Generated reports were deemed acceptable (defined as preferred or rated equally to radiologist reports) in 45% of ratings, with no statistically significant difference in preference rates between radiologist reports and acceptable generated reports for seven of the eight analysed findings. Preference for radiologist reports was driven primarily by higher recall, while generated reports were often preferred for readability.
  Together, these results suggest a credible pathway to clinically acceptable CXR RRG. Improvements in recall, alongside better detection of subtle findings (e.g., pulmonary congestion), are likely sufficient to achieve non-inferiority to radiologist reporting. With these targeted advances, CXR RRG systems may be ready for prospective evaluation in assistive roles within radiologist-led workflows.

AI.tldr: CXRMate-2模型在胸片报告生成任务中表现优异，在多项指标上超越基准模型，并在45%的病例中被放射科医生评为可接受，显示出临床应用的潜力。
AI.motivation: 尽管胸片放射报告生成模型发展迅速，但其临床实用性仍不确定，主要原因是缺乏放射科医生的专业评估。本研究旨在开发一个先进的胸片报告生成模型，并通过放射科医生的盲法评估来验证其临床可用性。
AI.method: 开发了CXRMate-2模型，整合了结构化多模态条件处理和强化学习，使用复合奖励机制确保与放射科医生报告的语义对齐。在MIMIC-CXR、CheXpert Plus和ReXgradient数据集上进行评估。同时进行了盲法随机回顾性定性评估，由三名放射科顾问医生对120个病例的生成报告和放射科医生报告进行比较。
AI.result: CXRMate-2在多个数据集上显著超越基准模型，在MIMIC-CXR上相对于MedGemma 1.5 (4B)分别提升了11.2%的GREEN分数和24.4%的RadGraph-XL分数。在放射科医生评估中，45%的生成报告被评为可接受（优于或等同于放射科医生报告）。在8个分析发现中，有7个没有显著偏好差异。放射科医生报告因更高的召回率而受青睐，而生成报告在可读性方面更受偏好。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果表明胸片报告生成模型有可信的临床应用路径。通过提高召回率和更好地检测细微发现（如肺淤血），可能达到与放射科医生报告的非劣效性。这些有针对性的改进使得胸片报告生成系统有望在放射科医生主导的工作流程中进行前瞻性评估，发挥辅助作用。

title: Fine-Tuning Small Reasoning Models for Quantum Field Theory
summary: Despite the growing application of Large Language Models (LLMs) to theoretical physics, there is little academic exploration into how domain-specific physics reasoning ability develops while training these models. To investigate this, we perform the first academic fine-tuning study of small (7B-parameter) reasoning models dedicated specifically to theoretical physics. Because open-source verifiable training data required to train such capabilities is scarce, we developed a robust data generation pipeline that can both create synthetic problems and make existing human-authored problems suitable for model training. Selecting Quantum Field Theory (QFT) as our primary domain, we generated over 2,500 synthetic problems alongside a curated collection of human-adapted problems sourced from arXiv and standard pedagogical resources. We conduct both Reinforcement Learning (RL) and Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) experiments, benchmarking performance gains as well as generalization to other physics domains. We perform an extensive analysis of model chains-of-though before and after fine-tuning, to understand how reasoning errors evolve during RL and SFT. Finally, we publicly release our data pipeline, verifiable QFT training data, and $\sim$200M tokens of QFT reasoning traces.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次对小型推理模型（7B参数）在理论物理领域进行学术微调，重点关注量子场论，开发了数据生成管道，创建了2500多个合成问题，并通过强化学习和监督微调实验分析了模型推理能力的发展。
AI.motivation: 尽管大语言模型在理论物理中的应用日益增多，但学术界对领域特定物理推理能力在模型训练过程中如何发展的研究很少。缺乏开源可验证的训练数据来训练这种能力。
AI.method: 开发了稳健的数据生成管道，既能创建合成问题，又能使现有的人工编写问题适合模型训练。选择量子场论作为主要领域，生成了2500多个合成问题，并整理了来自arXiv和标准教学资源的人类改编问题集合。进行了强化学习和监督微调实验，并分析了模型思维链在微调前后的变化。
AI.result: 创建了超过2500个合成问题，进行了RL和SFT实验，分析了性能提升和向其他物理领域的泛化能力。对模型思维链进行了广泛分析，以理解推理错误在RL和SFT过程中的演变。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为理论物理领域特定推理能力的模型训练提供了首个学术微调研究，开发了数据生成管道，公开了数据管道、可验证的QFT训练数据和约2亿个QFT推理标记，为后续研究奠定了基础。

title: Explicit Trait Inference for Multi-Agent Coordination
summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems (MAS) show promise on complex tasks but remain prone to coordination failures such as goal drift, error cascades, and misaligned behaviors. We propose Explicit Trait Inference (ETI), a psychologically grounded method for improving coordination. ETI enables agents to infer and track partner characteristics along two established psychological dimensions--warmth (e.g., trust) and competence (e.g., skill)--from interaction histories to guide decisions. We evaluate ETI in controlled settings (economic games), where it reduces payoff loss by 45-77%, and in more realistic, complex multi-agent settings (MultiAgentBench), where it improves performance by 3-29% depending on the scenario and model, relative to a CoT baseline. Additional analysis shows that gains are closely linked to trait inference: ETI profiles predict agents' actions, and informative profiles drive improvements. These results highlight ETI as a lightweight and robust mechanism for improving coordination in diverse multi-agent settings, and provide the first systematic evidence that LLM agents can (i) reliably infer others' traits from interaction histories and (ii) leverage structured awareness of others' traits for coordination.

AI.tldr: 提出ETI方法，通过心理维度（温暖度和能力）推断伙伴特征来改善多智能体协调，在多种场景下显著提升性能
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统在处理复杂任务时存在协调失败问题，如目标漂移、错误级联和行为不匹配，需要改进协调机制
AI.method: 提出显式特质推断（ETI）方法，让智能体从交互历史中推断并跟踪伙伴的两个心理维度特征：温暖度（如信任）和能力（如技能），以此指导决策
AI.result: 在受控环境（经济游戏）中减少45-77%的收益损失；在复杂多智能体场景（MultiAgentBench）中性能提升3-29%；特质推断与性能提升密切相关
AI.conclusion: ETI是轻量级且鲁棒的协调改进机制，首次系统证明LLM智能体能从交互历史可靠推断他人特质，并利用结构化认知改善协调

title: AdaGScale: Viewpoint-Adaptive Gaussian Scaling in 3D Gaussian Splatting to Reduce Gaussian-Tile Pairs
summary: Reducing the number of Gaussian-tile pairs is one of the most promising approaches to improve 3D Gaussian Splatting (3D-GS) rendering speed on GPUs. However, the importance difference existing among Gaussian-tile pairs has never been considered in the previous works. In this paper, we propose AdaGScale, a novel viewpoint-adaptive Gaussian scaling technique for reducing the number of Gaussian-tile pairs. AdaGScale is based on the observation that the peripheral tiles located far from Gaussian center contribute negligibly to pixel color accumulation. This suggests an opportunity for reducing the number of Gaussian-tile pairs based on color contribution. AdaGScale efficiently estimates the color contribution in the peripheral region of each Gaussian during a preprocessing stage and adaptively scales its size based on the peripheral score. As a result, Gaussians with lower importance intersect with fewer tiles during the intersection test, which improves rendering speed while maintaining image quality. The adjusted size is used only for tile intersection test, and the original size is retained during color accumulation to preserve visual fidelity. Experimental results show that AdaGScale achieves a geometric mean speedup of 13.8x over original 3D-GS on a GPU, with only about 0.5 dB degradation in PSNR on city-scale scenes.

AI.tldr: AdaGScale是一种新颖的自适应高斯缩放技术，通过减少高斯-瓦片对数量来提升3D高斯泼溅渲染速度，同时保持图像质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在减少高斯-瓦片对时未考虑不同高斯-瓦片对的重要性差异。作者观察到远离高斯中心的边缘瓦片对像素颜色累积贡献很小，这为基于颜色贡献减少高斯-瓦片对提供了机会。
AI.method: AdaGScale在预处理阶段高效估计每个高斯边缘区域的颜色贡献，并根据边缘评分自适应缩放其大小。调整后的大小仅用于瓦片相交测试，原始大小在颜色累积阶段保留以保持视觉保真度。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，AdaGScale在GPU上相比原始3D-GS实现了13.8倍的几何平均加速，在城市规模场景中PSNR仅下降约0.5 dB。
AI.conclusion: AdaGScale通过自适应缩放高斯大小来减少高斯-瓦片对数量，在显著提升渲染速度的同时保持了图像质量，为3D高斯泼溅渲染提供了有效的优化方案。

title: TabEmb: Joint Semantic-Structure Embedding for Table Annotation
summary: Table annotation is crucial for making web and enterprise tables usable in downstream NLP applications. Unlike textual data where learning semantically rich token or sentence embeddings often suffice, tables are structured combinations of columns wherein useful representations must jointly capture column's semantics and the inter-column relationships. Existing models learn by linearizing the 2D table into a 1D token sequence and encoding it with pretrained language models (PLMs) such as BERT. However, this leads to limited semantic quality and weaker generalization to unseen or rare values compared to modern LLMs, and degraded structural modeling due to 2D-to-1D flattening and context-length constraints. We propose TabEmb, which directly targets these limitations by decoupling semantic encoding from structural modeling. An LLM first produces semantically rich embeddings for each column, and a graph-based module over columns then injects relationships into the embeddings, yielding joint semantic-tructural representations for table annotation. Experiments show that TabEmb consistently outperforms strong baselines on different table annotation tasks. Source code and datasets are available at https://github.com/hoseinzadeehsan/TabEmb

AI.tldr: TabEmb提出了一种新的表格表示学习方法，通过解耦语义编码和结构建模，使用LLM生成列语义嵌入，再通过图模块注入列间关系，显著提升了表格标注任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有表格表示学习方法存在两个主要问题：1）将2D表格线性化为1D序列并使用预训练语言模型编码，导致语义质量有限且对未见或罕见值的泛化能力较弱；2）2D到1D的扁平化处理以及上下文长度限制导致结构建模能力下降。需要一种能同时捕获列语义和列间关系的更好方法。
AI.method: TabEmb采用解耦设计：首先使用大型语言模型为每个列生成语义丰富的嵌入，然后通过基于图的模块在列之间注入关系信息，最终产生联合的语义-结构表示。这种方法避免了2D到1D的扁平化，同时充分利用了LLM的语义理解能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，TabEmb在不同表格标注任务上始终优于现有基线方法。该方法在语义质量和结构建模方面都有显著提升，特别是在处理未见或罕见值时表现出更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TabEmb通过解耦语义编码和结构建模，有效解决了现有表格表示学习方法的局限性，为表格标注任务提供了一种更优的解决方案。该方法在保持语义丰富性的同时，更好地捕获了表格的结构信息。

title: Large Language Models Exhibit Normative Conformity
summary: The conformity bias exhibited by large language models (LLMs) can pose a significant challenge to decision-making in LLM-based multi-agent systems (LLM-MAS). While many prior studies have treated "conformity" simply as a matter of opinion change, this study introduces the social psychological distinction between informational conformity and normative conformity in order to understand LLM conformity at the mechanism level. Specifically, we design new tasks to distinguish between informational conformity, in which participants in a discussion are motivated to make accurate judgments, and normative conformity, in which participants are motivated to avoid conflict or gain acceptance within a group. We then conduct experiments based on these task settings. The experimental results show that, among the six LLMs evaluated, up to five exhibited tendencies toward not only informational conformity but also normative conformity. Furthermore, intriguingly, we demonstrate that by manipulating subtle aspects of the social context, it may be possible to control the target toward which a particular LLM directs its normative conformity. These findings suggest that decision-making in LLM-MAS may be vulnerable to manipulation by a small number of malicious users. In addition, through analysis of internal vectors associated with informational and normative conformity, we suggest that although both behaviors appear externally as the same form of "conformity," they may in fact be driven by distinct internal mechanisms. Taken together, these results may serve as an initial milestone toward understanding how "norms" are implemented in LLMs and how they influence group dynamics.

AI.tldr: 本研究区分了大型语言模型中的信息性从众和规范性从众，发现多数LLM同时表现出这两种从众倾向，且规范性从众的目标可通过社会情境操控，这可能使LLM多智能体系统易受恶意用户操纵。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在基于LLM的多智能体系统中表现出的从众偏见可能严重影响决策质量。以往研究将"从众"简单视为意见改变，本研究旨在从社会心理学角度区分信息性从众和规范性从众，以理解LLM从众的内在机制。
AI.method: 设计新任务区分信息性从众（参与者追求准确判断）和规范性从众（参与者避免冲突或寻求群体接纳），基于这些任务设置进行实验。评估六个LLM，分析其内部向量与两种从众行为的关联。
AI.result: 六个被评估的LLM中，多达五个同时表现出信息性从众和规范性从众倾向。有趣的是，通过操控社会情境的细微方面，可以控制特定LLM规范性从众的目标对象。分析表明，虽然两种行为外部表现相同，但可能由不同的内部机制驱动。
AI.conclusion: LLM多智能体系统的决策可能易受少数恶意用户操纵。研究结果为了解"规范"如何在LLM中实现以及它们如何影响群体动态提供了初步里程碑，揭示了从众行为背后的复杂机制差异。

title: A Multi-Agent Framework with Structured Reasoning and Reflective Refinement for Multimodal Empathetic Response Generation
summary: Multimodal empathetic response generation (MERG) aims to generate emotionally engaging and empathetic responses based on users' multimodal contexts. Existing approaches usually rely on an implicit one-pass generation paradigm from multimodal context to the final response, which overlooks two intrinsic characteristics of MERG: (1) Human perception of emotional cues is inherently structured rather than a direct mapping. The conventional paradigm neglects the hierarchical progression of emotion perception, leading to distorted emotional judgments. (2) Given the inherent complexity and ambiguity of human emotions, the conventional paradigm is prone to significant emotional biases, ultimately resulting in suboptimal empathy. In this paper, we propose a multi-agent framework for MERG, which enhances empathy through structured reasoning and reflective refinement. Specifically, we first introduce a structured empathetic reasoning-to-generation module that explicitly decomposes response generation via multimodal perception, consistency-aware emotion forecasting, pragmatic strategy planning, and strategy-guided response generation, providing a clearer intermediate path from multimodal evidence to response realization. Besides, we develop a global reflection and refinement module, in which a global reflection agent performs step-wise auditing over intermediate states and the generated response, eliminating existing emotional biases and empathy errors, and triggering targeted regeneration. Overall, such a closed-loop framework enables our model to gradually improve the accuracy of emotion perception and eliminate emotion biases during the iteration process. Experiments on several benchmarks, e.g., IEMOCAP and MELD, demonstrate that our model has superior empathic response generation capabilities compared to state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种多智能体框架用于多模态共情响应生成，通过结构化推理和反思优化来增强共情能力，相比传统单次生成方法有显著改进。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态共情响应生成方法通常采用从多模态上下文到最终响应的隐式单次生成范式，忽视了两个内在特性：1）人类情感感知本质上是结构化的而非直接映射；2）人类情感的复杂性和模糊性容易导致情感偏见和次优共情。
AI.method: 提出多智能体框架，包含结构化共情推理生成模块（分解为多模态感知、一致性情感预测、实用策略规划和策略引导响应生成）和全局反思优化模块（通过全局反思智能体进行逐步审计，消除情感偏见和共情错误，触发针对性重新生成）。
AI.result: 在IEMOCAP和MELD等多个基准测试中，该模型展现出优于现有最先进方法的多模态共情响应生成能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化推理和反思优化的闭环框架，模型能够逐步提高情感感知准确性并消除情感偏见，显著提升多模态共情响应生成的质量。

title: Distillation Traps and Guards: A Calibration Knob for LLM Distillability
summary: Knowledge distillation (KD) transfers capabilities from large language models (LLMs) to smaller students, yet it can fail unpredictably and also underpins model leakage risks. Our analysis revealed several distillation traps: tail noise, off-policy instability, and, most fundamentally, the teacher-student gap, that distort training signals. These traps manifest as overconfident hallucinations, self-correction collapse, and local decoding degradation, causing distillation to fail. Motivated by these findings, we propose a post-hoc calibration method that, to the best of our knowledge, for the first time enables control over a teacher's distillability via reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT). Our objective combines task utility, KL anchor, and across-tokenizer calibration reward. This makes distillability a practical safety lever for foundation models, connecting robust teacher-student transfer with deployment-aware model protection. Experiments across math, knowledge QA, and instruction-following tasks show that students distilled from distillable calibrated teachers outperform SFT and KD baselines, while undistillable calibrated teachers retain their task performance but cause distilled students to collapse, offering a practical knob for both better KD and model IP protection.

AI.tldr: 该论文分析了知识蒸馏中的陷阱，提出了通过强化微调进行后校准的方法来控制教师模型的可蒸馏性，既能提升蒸馏效果，又能保护模型知识产权。
AI.motivation: 知识蒸馏在将大语言模型能力转移到小模型时存在不可预测的失败风险，并且存在模型泄露的安全隐患。研究发现蒸馏过程中存在尾部噪声、离策略不稳定性和师生差距等陷阱，导致训练信号失真，表现为过度自信的幻觉、自校正崩溃和局部解码退化等问题。
AI.method: 提出了一种后校准方法，通过强化微调（RFT）来控制教师模型的可蒸馏性。目标函数结合了任务效用、KL锚点和跨分词器校准奖励，使可蒸馏性成为基础模型的实际安全杠杆。
AI.result: 在数学、知识问答和指令跟随任务上的实验表明，从可蒸馏校准教师蒸馏出的学生模型优于SFT和KD基线，而不可蒸馏校准教师虽然保持任务性能，但会导致蒸馏出的学生模型崩溃，为更好的知识蒸馏和模型知识产权保护提供了实用工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现了对教师模型可蒸馏性的控制，将稳健的师生转移与部署感知的模型保护联系起来，为知识蒸馏提供了既提升效果又保护知识产权的实用解决方案。

title: Towards Energy Impact on AI-Powered 6G IoT Networks: Centralized vs. Decentralized
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures. Accepted for presentation at the IEEE GLOBECOM 2025 Workshop on Workshop on Green Learning for Wireless Communications
summary: The emergence of sixth-generation (6G) technologies has introduced new challenges and opportunities for machine learning (ML) applications in Internet of Things (IoT) networks, particularly concerning energy efficiency. As model training and data transmission contribute significantly to energy consumption, optimizing these processes has become critical for sustainable system design. This study first conduct analysis on the energy consumption model for both centralized and decentralized architecture and then presents a testbed deployed within the German railway infrastructure, leveraging sensor data for ML-based predictive maintenance. A comparative analysis of distributed versus Centralized Learning (CL) architectures reveals that distributed models maintain competitive predictive accuracy (~90%) while reducing overall electricity consumption by up to 70%. These findings underscore the potential of distributed ML to improve energy efficiency in real-world IoT deployments, particularly by mitigating transmission-related energy costs.

AI.tldr: 分布式机器学习在6G物联网中能显著提升能源效率，在保持约90%预测准确率的同时减少高达70%的电力消耗
AI.motivation: 6G技术为物联网中的机器学习应用带来了新的挑战和机遇，特别是能源效率问题。模型训练和数据传输消耗大量能源，优化这些过程对可持续系统设计至关重要。
AI.method: 首先分析集中式和分布式架构的能源消耗模型，然后在德国铁路基础设施中部署测试平台，利用传感器数据进行基于机器学习的预测性维护。对分布式与集中式学习架构进行对比分析。
AI.result: 分布式模型在保持约90%竞争性预测准确率的同时，将整体电力消耗减少了高达70%。分布式机器学习特别通过减少传输相关的能源成本来提高能源效率。
AI.conclusion: 分布式机器学习在现实世界物联网部署中具有显著提高能源效率的潜力，特别是在6G技术背景下，通过优化数据传输和模型训练过程实现可持续的系统设计。

title: Explore Like Humans: Autonomous Exploration with Online SG-Memo Construction for Embodied Agents
summary: Constructing structured spatial memory is essential for enabling long-horizon reasoning in complex embodied navigation tasks. Current memory construction predominantly relies on a decoupled, two-stage paradigm: agents first aggregate environmental data through exploration, followed by the offline reconstruction of spatial memory. However, this post-hoc and geometry-centric approach precludes agents from leveraging high-level semantic intelligence, often causing them to overlook navigationally critical landmarks (e.g., doorways and staircases) that serve as fundamental semantic anchors in human cognitive maps. To bridge this gap, we propose ABot-Explorer, a novel active exploration framework that unifies memory construction and exploration into an online, RGB-only process. At its core, ABot-Explorer leverages Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to distill Semantic Navigational Affordances (SNA), which act as cognitive-aligned anchors to guide the agent's movement. By dynamically integrating these SNAs into a hierarchical SG-Memo, ABot-Explorer mirrors human-like exploratory logic by prioritizing structural transit nodes to facilitate efficient coverage. To support this framework, we contribute a large-scale dataset extending InteriorGS with SNA and SG-Memo annotations. Experimental results demonstrate that ABot-Explorer significantly outperforms current state-of-the-art methods in both exploration efficiency and environment coverage, while the resulting SG-Memo is shown to effectively support diverse downstream tasks.

AI.tldr: ABot-Explorer提出了一种主动探索框架，将空间记忆构建与探索统一为在线RGB-only过程，利用视觉语言模型提取语义导航可操作性作为认知对齐锚点，显著提升探索效率和环境覆盖率。
AI.motivation: 当前空间记忆构建主要采用解耦的两阶段范式：先探索收集环境数据，再离线重建空间记忆。这种后处理且以几何为中心的方法无法利用高级语义智能，常常忽略导航关键地标（如门道、楼梯），而这些正是人类认知地图中的基本语义锚点。
AI.method: 提出ABot-Explorer主动探索框架，核心是利用大型视觉语言模型提取语义导航可操作性作为认知对齐锚点，动态集成到分层SG-Memo中，通过优先考虑结构转换节点来模仿人类探索逻辑，实现高效覆盖。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，ABot-Explorer在探索效率和环境覆盖率方面显著优于当前最先进方法，生成的SG-Memo能有效支持多种下游任务。贡献了扩展InteriorGS的大规模数据集，包含SNA和SG-Memo标注。
AI.conclusion: ABot-Explorer通过统一记忆构建与探索过程，利用语义智能引导探索，实现了更高效、更符合人类认知的空间记忆构建，为复杂具身导航任务中的长时程推理提供了更好的基础。

title: Self-Improving Tabular Language Models via Iterative Group Alignment
summary: While language models have been adapted for tabular data generation, two fundamental limitations remain: (1) static fine-tuning produces models that cannot learn from their own generated samples and adapt to self-correct, and (2) autoregressive objectives preserve local token coherence but neglect global statistical properties, degrading tabular quality. Reinforcement learning offers a potential solution but requires designing reward functions that balance competing objectives -- impractical for tabular data. To fill the gap, we introduce TabGRAA (Tabular Group-Relative Advantage Alignment), the first self-improving framework for tabular data generation via automated feedback. At each iteration, TabGRAA uses an \emph{automated quality signal} -- such as a two-sample distinguishability classifier or a distance-based reward -- to partition newly generated samples into high- and low-quality groups, then optimizes a group-relative advantage objective that reinforces realistic patterns while penalizing artifacts. The specific signal is a modular choice rather than a fixed component of the framework. This establishes a virtuous feedback cycle, where the quality signal is re-computed against newly \emph{generated synthetic} samples at each round; the language model is only fine-tuned on these self-generated signals, so no additional real record is exposed during alignment, mitigating data-leakage risk beyond the initial supervised fine-tuning. Experiments show TabGRAA outperforms existing methods in fidelity, utility, and privacy, while matching or exceeding diffusion-based synthesizers, advancing tabular synthesis from static statistical replication to dynamic, self-improving generation.

AI.tldr: TabGRAA是首个通过自动反馈实现表格数据自改进生成的框架，使用分组相对优势对齐方法，无需人工设计奖励函数，在保真度、实用性和隐私性方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有语言模型用于表格数据生成存在两个根本限制：(1) 静态微调无法从自身生成样本中学习并自我纠正；(2) 自回归目标保持局部标记连贯性但忽略全局统计特性，降低表格质量。强化学习需要设计平衡竞争目标的奖励函数，这在表格数据中不切实际。
AI.method: TabGRAA框架使用自动质量信号（如双样本可区分性分类器或基于距离的奖励）将新生成样本分为高质量和低质量组，然后优化分组相对优势目标，强化真实模式同时惩罚伪影。质量信号是模块化选择而非固定组件，形成良性反馈循环，每轮重新计算质量信号，语言模型仅在这些自生成信号上微调。
AI.result: 实验表明TabGRAA在保真度、实用性和隐私性方面优于现有方法，同时匹配或超过基于扩散的合成器，将表格合成从静态统计复制推进到动态自改进生成。
AI.conclusion: TabGRAA填补了表格数据自改进生成的空白，通过自动反馈循环实现了动态优化，无需额外真实数据暴露，降低了数据泄露风险，代表了表格合成技术的重要进步。

title: GRASPrune: Global Gating for Budgeted Structured Pruning of Large Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are expensive to serve because model parameters, attention computation, and KV caches impose substantial memory and latency costs. We present GRASPrune, a structured pruning framework applied after pretraining that jointly prunes FFN channels and KV head groups under a single global budget. Instead of learning importance scores without constraints and applying the budget only after training, GRASPrune learns lightweight gate scores with a projected straight-through estimator that enforces a hard mask satisfying the budget at every step while keeping the backbone weights frozen. After the mask is fixed, we calibrate scaling factors on the retained units to mitigate scale mismatch caused by pruning, and fold these factors into the pruned weights to obtain a smaller dense checkpoint with no extra parameters at inference. On LLaMA-2-7B, GRASPrune removes 50% of parameters and achieves 12.18 perplexity on WikiText-2 while maintaining competitive average zero-shot accuracy on five benchmarks, using four epochs on 512 unlabeled calibration sequences on a single NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU without any full model fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: GRASPrune是一个结构化剪枝框架，可在预训练后联合剪枝FFN通道和KV头组，在保持模型性能的同时显著减少参数和推理成本。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型服务成本高昂，主要因为模型参数、注意力计算和KV缓存带来了巨大的内存和延迟开销。需要一种有效的剪枝方法来减少这些成本。
AI.method: GRASPrune使用投影直通估计器学习轻量级门分数，在训练过程中强制实施硬掩码以满足预算约束，同时保持主干权重冻结。剪枝后校准保留单元的缩放因子以缓解尺度不匹配问题，并将这些因子折叠到剪枝权重中。
AI.result: 在LLaMA-2-7B上，GRASPrune移除了50%的参数，在WikiText-2上达到12.18困惑度，同时在五个基准测试中保持竞争力的平均零样本准确率，仅使用512个未标记校准序列在单个A100 GPU上训练四个epoch。
AI.conclusion: GRASPrune提供了一种高效的结构化剪枝方法，能够在保持模型性能的同时显著减少参数和推理成本，无需完整的模型微调。

title: Generative Texture Filtering
summary: We present a generative method for texture filtering, which exhibits surprisingly good performance and generalizability. Our core idea is to empower texture filtering by taking full advantage of the strong learned image prior of pre-trained generative models. To this end, we propose to fine-tune a pre-trained generative model via a two-stage strategy. Specifically, we first conduct supervised fine-tuning on a very small set of paired images, and then perform reinforcement fine-tuning on a large-scale unlabeled dataset under the guidance of a reward function that quantifies the quality of texture removal and structure preservation. Extensive experiments show that our method clearly outperforms previous methods, and is effective to deal with previously challenging cases. Our code is available at https://github.com/OnlyZZZZ/Generative_Texture_Filtering.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于预训练生成模型的纹理过滤方法，通过两阶段微调策略实现优异的纹理去除和结构保持性能
AI.motivation: 利用预训练生成模型的强大图像先验知识来提升纹理过滤的性能和泛化能力，解决传统方法在处理复杂纹理时的局限性
AI.method: 采用两阶段微调策略：首先在少量配对图像上进行监督微调，然后在大量无标签数据集上进行强化学习微调，使用量化纹理去除和结构保持质量的奖励函数指导
AI.result: 实验表明该方法明显优于先前方法，能有效处理先前具有挑战性的案例，展现出良好的性能和泛化能力
AI.conclusion: 通过充分利用预训练生成模型的图像先验，提出的生成式纹理过滤方法取得了显著性能提升，为纹理处理任务提供了新的有效解决方案

title: Four-Axis Decision Alignment for Long-Horizon Enterprise AI Agents
comment: 21 pages, 5 figures, 8 tables. PDFLaTeX. Code and artifacts: https://github.com/vasundras/decision-alignment-long-horizon-agents
summary: Long-horizon enterprise agents make high-stakes decisions (loan underwriting, claims adjudication, clinical review, prior authorization) under lossy memory, multi-step reasoning, and binding regulatory constraints. Current evaluation reports a single task-success scalar that conflates distinct failure modes and hides whether an agent is aligned with the standards its deployment environment requires. We propose that long-horizon decision behavior decomposes into four orthogonal alignment axes, each independently measurable and failable: factual precision (FRP), reasoning coherence (RCS), compliance reconstruction (CRR), and calibrated abstention (CAR). CRR is a novel regulatory-grounded axis; CAR is a measurement axis separating coverage from accuracy. We exercise the decomposition on a controlled benchmark (LongHorizon-Bench) covering loan qualification and insurance claims adjudication with deterministic ground-truth construction. Running six memory architectures, we find structure aggregate accuracy cannot see: retrieval collapses on factual precision; schema-anchored architectures pay a scaffolding tax; plain summarization under a fact-preservation prompt is a strong baseline on FRP, RCS, EDA, and CRR; and all six architectures commit on every case, exposing a decisional-alignment axis the field has not targeted. The decomposition also surfaced a pre-registered prediction of our own, that summarization would fail factual recall, which the data reversed at large magnitude, an axis-level reversal aggregate accuracy would have hidden. Institutional alignment (regulatory reconstruction) and decisional alignment (calibrated abstention) are under-represented in the alignment literature and become load-bearing once decisions leave the laboratory. The framework transfers to any regulated decisioning domain via two steps: build a fact schema, and calibrate the CRR auditor prompt.

AI.tldr: 论文提出将长时程企业智能体决策行为分解为四个正交的对齐轴：事实精度、推理一致性、合规重构和校准弃权，以解决传统单一成功率指标无法区分不同失败模式的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前长时程企业智能体（贷款审批、理赔裁决、临床审查等）评估仅报告单一任务成功率，这一指标混淆了不同的失败模式，无法判断智能体是否真正符合部署环境所需的监管标准。
AI.method: 提出四轴对齐分解框架：事实精度（FRP）、推理一致性（RCS）、合规重构（CRR）和校准弃权（CAR）。在LongHorizon-Bench基准上测试六种记忆架构，包括检索、模式锚定架构和简单摘要等方法。
AI.result: 发现传统聚合准确率无法观察到的现象：检索架构在事实精度上崩溃；模式锚定架构需支付"脚手架税"；简单摘要配合事实保留提示在多个轴上表现强劲；所有六种架构都存在弃权问题，暴露了决策对齐轴的缺失。
AI.conclusion: 四轴分解框架能够揭示传统指标隐藏的对齐问题，特别是合规重构和校准弃权这两个在实验室外决策中至关重要的对齐维度。该框架可通过构建事实模式和校准CRR审计提示迁移到任何受监管决策领域。

title: Evaluation of Winning Solutions of 2025 Low Power Computer Vision Challenge
summary: The IEEE Low-Power Computer Vision Challenge (LPCVC) aims to promote the development of efficient vision models for edge devices, balancing accuracy with constraints such as latency, memory capacity, and energy use. The 2025 challenge featured three tracks: (1) Image classification under various lighting conditions and styles, (2) Open-Vocabulary Segmentation with Text Prompt, and (3) Monocular Depth Estimation. This paper presents the design of LPCVC 2025, including its competition structure and evaluation framework, which integrates the Qualcomm AI Hub for consistent and reproducible benchmarking. The paper also introduces the top-performing solutions from each track and outlines key trends and observations. The paper concludes with suggestions for future computer vision competitions.

AI.tldr: LPCVC 2025挑战赛设计、评估框架及优胜方案分析，为边缘设备高效视觉模型开发提供参考
AI.motivation: 推动面向边缘设备的高效视觉模型发展，在精度、延迟、内存和能耗之间取得平衡，促进实际应用部署
AI.method: 设计包含三个赛道的竞赛结构：1)不同光照和风格条件下的图像分类；2)基于文本提示的开放词汇分割；3)单目深度估计。采用Qualcomm AI Hub构建可复现的评估框架
AI.result: 介绍了各赛道的最佳解决方案，总结了关键趋势和观察结果，为高效视觉模型开发提供了实践参考
AI.conclusion: 提出了未来计算机视觉竞赛的发展建议，强调在边缘设备约束下平衡精度与效率的重要性

title: Do LLMs Game Formalization? Evaluating Faithfulness in Logical Reasoning
comment: 25 pages, 4 figures, 22 tables. Published at the VerifAI-2 Workshop, ICLR 2026 (non-archival). Code and data: https://github.com/koreankiwi99/formalization-gaming
summary:
Formal verification guarantees proof validity but not formalization faithfulness. For natural-language logical reasoning, where models construct axiom systems from scratch without library constraints, this gap between valid proofs and faithful translations is especially acute. We investigate whether frontier models exploit this gap when generating Lean 4 proofs, a behavior we term formalization gaming.
  We evaluate GPT-5 and DeepSeek-R1 on 303 first-order logic problems (203 from FOLIO, 100 from Multi-LogiEval), comparing unified generation against a two-stage pipeline that separates formalization from proving. Despite compilation rates of 87-99%, we find no evidence of systematic gaming in unified generation: models prefer reporting failure over forcing proofs, even under prompting designed to encourage it. However, unfaithfulness that evades our detection signals may still occur. The two-stage pipeline reveals two distinct modes of unfaithfulness: GPT-5 fabricates axioms during proof generation, a reactive fallback detectable via cross-stage comparison, while DeepSeek-R1 mistranslates premises during formalization, producing internally consistent outputs that evade detection entirely. These findings show that high compilation rates or accuracies should not be equated with faithful reasoning. Code and data are available at https://github.com/koreankiwi99/formalization-gaming.

AI.tldr: 研究发现前沿大模型在生成Lean 4证明时存在"形式化游戏"现象，即模型可能利用形式化验证只保证证明有效性而不保证形式化忠实性的漏洞。虽然统一生成模式下未发现系统性游戏行为，但两阶段流程揭示了两种不同的不忠实模式。
AI.motivation: 形式化验证只保证证明的有效性，但不保证形式化的忠实性。在自然语言逻辑推理中，模型需要从头构建公理系统而没有库约束，这种有效证明与忠实翻译之间的差距尤为突出。研究旨在探究前沿模型在生成Lean 4证明时是否会利用这一差距，即是否存在"形式化游戏"行为。
AI.method: 评估GPT-5和DeepSeek-R1在303个一阶逻辑问题上的表现（203个来自FOLIO，100个来自Multi-LogiEval）。比较统一生成与两阶段流程：第一阶段将自然语言问题形式化，第二阶段基于形式化版本生成证明。通过编译率（87-99%）和跨阶段比较来检测不忠实行为。
AI.result: 统一生成模式下未发现系统性游戏行为：模型倾向于报告失败而非强制生成证明。两阶段流程揭示了两种不忠实模式：GPT-5在证明生成阶段伪造公理（可通过跨阶段比较检测），而DeepSeek-R1在形式化阶段错误翻译前提，产生内部一致但完全逃避检测的输出。高编译率或准确率不应等同于忠实推理。
AI.conclusion: 前沿大模型在形式化推理中存在"形式化游戏"风险，表现为两种不同的不忠实模式。形式化验证的高编译率或准确率不能保证推理的忠实性，需要更细致的检测方法来识别隐藏的不忠实行为。研究为理解模型在形式化任务中的行为提供了重要洞见。

title: The Essence of Balance for Self-Improving Agents in Vision-and-Language Navigation
summary: In vision-and-language navigation (VLN), self-improvement from policy-induced experience, using only standard VLN action supervision, critically depends on balancing behavioral diversity and learning stability, which governs whether the agent can extract a reliable learning signal for improvement. Increasing behavioral diversity is necessary to expose alternative action hypotheses but can destabilize policy-induced learning signals, whereas overly conservative stability constraints suppress exploration and induce early commitment, making reliable self-improvement difficult. To address this challenge, we propose Stability-Diversity Balance (SDB), a plug-and-play mechanism for balanced self-improvement in VLN. SDB expands each decision step into multiple latent behavioral hypotheses by applying controlled shifts in the instruction-conditioned hidden states, and then performs reliability-aware soft evaluation and aggregation to retain diverse yet instruction-consistent alternatives during learning. An explicit regularizer further constrains hypothesis interactions, preventing excessive drift or premature collapse of hypothesis diversity and stabilizing self-improvement without discarding training signals. Experiments on R2R, SOON, and REVERIE show consistent improvements; for example, on REVERIE val-unseen, SDB improves SPL from 33.73 to 35.93 and OSR from 51.07 to 54.25.

AI.tldr: 提出SDB机制，通过平衡行为多样性和学习稳定性来改进视觉语言导航中的自我提升，在多个基准测试中取得显著性能提升
AI.motivation: 在视觉语言导航中，基于策略诱导经验的自我提升面临行为多样性与学习稳定性之间的平衡难题。增加行为多样性有助于探索替代行动假设，但会破坏学习信号的稳定性；而过于保守的稳定性约束则会抑制探索，导致早期固化，使可靠的自我提升变得困难。
AI.method: 提出稳定性-多样性平衡机制：1）通过可控的指令条件隐藏状态偏移，将每个决策步骤扩展为多个潜在行为假设；2）进行可靠性感知的软评估和聚合，在学习过程中保留多样且与指令一致的替代方案；3）使用显式正则化器约束假设间的交互，防止过度漂移或过早的多样性崩溃，稳定自我提升过程。
AI.result: 在R2R、SOON和REVERIE三个基准测试上均取得一致改进。例如在REVERIE val-unseen上，SPL从33.73提升到35.93，OSR从51.07提升到54.25。
AI.conclusion: SDB机制通过平衡行为多样性和学习稳定性，有效解决了视觉语言导航中自我提升的挑战，提供了一种即插即用的解决方案，显著提升了导航性能。

title: Decompose, Structure, and Repair: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Autoformalization via Operator Trees
summary: Statement autoformalization acts as a critical bridge between human mathematics and formal mathematics by translating natural language problems into formal language. While prior works have focused on data synthesis and diverse training paradigms to optimize end-to-end Large Language Models (LLMs), they typically treat formal code as flat sequences, neglecting the hierarchical logic inherent in mathematical statements. In this work, we introduce Decompose, Structure, and Repair (DSR), a neuro-symbolic framework that restructures autoformalization into a modular pipeline. DSR decomposes statements into logical components and maps them to structured operator trees, leveraging this topological blueprint to precisely localize and repair errors via sub-tree refinement. Furthermore, we introduce PRIME, a benchmark of 156 undergraduate and graduate-level theorems selected from canonical textbooks and expertly annotated in Lean 4. Experimental results demonstrate that DSR establishes a new state-of-the-art, consistently outperforming baselines under equivalent computational budgets. The datasets, model, and code will be released to the public soon.

AI.tldr: DSR框架将自动形式化分解为模块化流程，通过分解、结构化、修复三步骤处理数学陈述，在PRIME基准测试中达到新SOTA
AI.motivation: 现有自动形式化方法将形式代码视为扁平序列，忽略了数学陈述中固有的层次逻辑结构，需要更系统的方法来处理复杂的数学陈述
AI.method: 提出DSR神经符号框架：1) 将陈述分解为逻辑组件；2) 映射到结构化操作符树；3) 基于拓扑蓝图通过子树精确定位和修复错误
AI.result: 在PRIME基准（156个本科和研究生级别定理）上，DSR在同等计算预算下始终优于基线方法，建立了新的最先进水平
AI.conclusion: DSR框架通过模块化管道和层次化处理，显著提升了自动形式化的性能，为数学陈述的形式化提供了更系统的方法

title: CoDA: Towards Effective Cross-domain Knowledge Transfer via CoT-guided Domain Adaptation
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved substantial advances in logical reasoning, yet they continue to lag behind human-level performance. In-context learning provides a viable solution that boosts the model's performance via prompting its input with expert-curated, in-domain exemplars. However, in many real-world, expertise-scarce domains, such as low-resource scientific disciplines, emerging biomedical subfields, or niche legal jurisdictions, such high-quality in-domain demonstrations are inherently limited or entirely unavailable, thereby constraining the general applicability of these approaches. To mitigate this limitation, recent efforts have explored the retrieval of cross-domain samples as surrogate in-context demonstrations. Nevertheless, the resulting gains remain modest. This is largely attributable to the pronounced domain shift between source and target distributions, which impedes the model's ability to effectively identify and exploit underlying shared structures or latent reasoning patterns. Consequently, when relying solely on raw textual prompting, LLMs struggle to abstract and transfer such cross-domain knowledge in a robust and systematic manner. To address these issues, we propose CoDA, which employs a lightweight adapter to directly intervene in the intermediate hidden states. By combining feature-based distillation of CoT-enriched reference representations with Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) for kernelized distribution matching, our method aligns the latent reasoning representation of the source and target domains. Extensive experimental results on multiple logical reasoning tasks across various model families validate the efficacy of CoDA by significantly outperforming the previous state-of-the-art baselines by a large margin.

AI.tldr: CoDA提出使用轻量级适配器干预LLM隐藏状态，通过特征蒸馏和分布对齐来提升跨领域逻辑推理能力，显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: LLMs在逻辑推理方面仍有提升空间，特别是在专家稀缺的领域（如低资源科学学科、新兴生物医学子领域或小众法律管辖区），高质量领域内示例有限或完全不可用，限制了现有方法的通用性。虽然已有研究探索使用跨领域样本作为替代演示，但由于源域和目标域之间的显著领域偏移，模型难以有效识别和利用共享结构或潜在推理模式。
AI.method: CoDA采用轻量级适配器直接干预中间隐藏状态，结合CoT增强参考表示的特征蒸馏和最大均值差异（MMD）进行核化分布匹配，对齐源域和目标域的潜在推理表示。
AI.result: 在多个逻辑推理任务和不同模型家族上的广泛实验结果表明，CoDA显著优于先前最先进的基线方法，取得了大幅性能提升。
AI.conclusion: CoDA通过直接干预隐藏状态并利用特征蒸馏和分布对齐，有效解决了跨领域逻辑推理中的领域偏移问题，为在专家稀缺领域提升LLMs推理能力提供了有效解决方案。

title: Multi-modal Test-time Adaptation via Adaptive Probabilistic Gaussian Calibration
summary: Multi-modal test-time adaptation (TTA) enhances the resilience of benchmark multi-modal models against distribution shifts by leveraging the unlabeled target data during inference. Despite the documented success, the advancement of multi-modal TTA methodologies has been impeded by a persistent limitation, i.e., the lack of explicit modeling of category-conditional distributions, which is crucial for yielding accurate predictions and reliable decision boundaries. Canonical Gaussian discriminant analysis (GDA) provides a vanilla modeling of category-conditional distributions and achieves moderate advancement in uni-modal contexts. However, in multi-modal TTA scenario, the inherent modality distribution asymmetry undermines the effectiveness of modeling the category-conditional distribution via the canonical GDA. To this end, we introduce a tailored probabilistic Gaussian model for multi-modal TTA to explicitly model the category-conditional distributions, and further propose an adaptive contrastive asymmetry rectification technique to counteract the adverse effects arising from modality asymmetry, thereby deriving calibrated predictions and reliable decision boundaries. Extensive experiments across diverse benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance under a wide range of distribution shifts. The code is available at https://github.com/XuJinglinn/AdaPGC.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多模态测试时适应的概率高斯模型，通过显式建模类别条件分布和自适应对比不对称性校正技术，解决了多模态分布不对称问题，提升了分布偏移下的模型性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态测试时适应方法缺乏对类别条件分布的显式建模，这限制了准确预测和可靠决策边界的生成。传统的GDA方法在多模态场景中因模态分布不对称而效果有限。
AI.method: 提出定制的概率高斯模型来显式建模类别条件分布，并引入自适应对比不对称性校正技术来抵消模态不对称带来的负面影响。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试上的广泛实验表明，该方法在各种分布偏移下实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模类别条件分布并校正模态不对称性，该方法能够生成校准的预测和可靠的决策边界，显著提升了多模态测试时适应在分布偏移下的性能。

title: Guiding Distribution Matching Distillation with Gradient-Based Reinforcement Learning
summary: Diffusion distillation, exemplified by Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD), has shown great promise in few-step generation but often sacrifices quality for sampling speed. While integrating Reinforcement Learning (RL) into distillation offers potential, a naive fusion of these two objectives relies on suboptimal raw sample evaluation. This sample-based scoring creates inherent conflicts with the distillation trajectory and produces unreliable rewards due to the noisy nature of early-stage generation. To overcome these limitations, we propose GDMD, a novel framework that redefines the reward mechanism by prioritizing distillation gradients over raw pixel outputs as the primary signal for optimization. By reinterpreting the DMD gradients as implicit target tensors, our framework enables existing reward models to directly evaluate the quality of distillation updates. This gradient-level guidance functions as an adaptive weighting that synchronizes the RL policy with the distillation objective, effectively neutralizing optimization divergence. Empirical results show that GDMD sets a new SOTA for few-step generation. Specifically, our 4-step models outperform the quality of their multi-step teacher and substantially exceed previous DMDR results in GenEval and human-preference metrics, exhibiting strong scalability potential.

AI.tldr: GDMD提出了一种新的扩散蒸馏框架，通过将蒸馏梯度而非原始像素输出作为主要优化信号，解决了传统方法中强化学习与蒸馏目标冲突的问题，在少步生成中实现了SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统扩散蒸馏方法（如DMD）在追求采样速度时往往牺牲生成质量。虽然将强化学习融入蒸馏有潜力，但基于原始样本评估的简单融合方法存在内在冲突，因为早期生成阶段的噪声特性导致奖励信号不可靠。
AI.method: GDMD重新定义奖励机制，将蒸馏梯度而非原始像素输出作为主要优化信号。通过将DMD梯度重新解释为隐式目标张量，使现有奖励模型能够直接评估蒸馏更新的质量。这种梯度级指导作为自适应权重，同步RL策略与蒸馏目标，有效消除优化分歧。
AI.result: GDMD在少步生成中实现了新的SOTA性能。具体而言，4步模型的质量超过了多步教师模型，并在GenEval和人类偏好指标上显著超越之前的DMDR结果，展现出强大的可扩展潜力。
AI.conclusion: 通过将梯度作为主要优化信号，GDMD成功解决了传统扩散蒸馏中强化学习与蒸馏目标的冲突问题，为少步高质量生成提供了有效的解决方案，展现出在实际应用中的潜力。

title: EgoMotion: Hierarchical Reasoning and Diffusion for Egocentric Vision-Language Motion Generation
summary: Faithfully modeling human behavior in dynamic environments is a foundational challenge for embodied intelligence. While conditional motion synthesis has achieved significant advances, egocentric motion generation remains largely underexplored due to the inherent complexity of first-person perception. In this work, we investigate Egocentric Vision-Language (Ego-VL) motion generation. This task requires synthesizing 3D human motion conditioned jointly on first-person visual observations and natural language instructions. We identify a critical \textit{reasoning-generation entanglement} challenge: the simultaneous optimization of semantic reasoning and kinematic modeling introduces gradient conflicts. These conflicts systematically degrade the fidelity of multimodal grounding and motion quality. To address this challenge, we propose a hierarchical generative framework \textbf{EgoMotion}. Inspired by the biological decoupling of cognitive reasoning and motor control, EgoMotion operates in two stages. In the Cognitive Reasoning stage, A vision-language model (VLM) projects multimodal inputs into a structured space of discrete motion primitives. This forces the VLM to acquire goal-consistent representations, effectively bridging the semantic gap between high-level perceptual understanding and low-level action execution. In the Motion Generation stage, these learned representations serve as expressive conditioning signals for a diffusion-based motion generator. By performing iterative denoising within a continuous latent space, the generator synthesizes physically plausible and temporally coherent trajectories. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that EgoMotion achieves state-of-the-art performance, and produces motion sequences that are both semantically grounded and kinematically superior to existing approaches.

AI.tldr: EgoMotion：一种解决第一人称视觉-语言运动生成中推理-生成纠缠问题的分层生成框架，通过认知推理和运动生成两阶段分离，实现语义理解和运动质量的双重提升。
AI.motivation: 第一人称运动生成面临推理-生成纠缠挑战，同时优化语义推理和运动建模会导致梯度冲突，降低多模态对齐和运动质量。需要一种能分离认知推理和运动控制的方法。
AI.method: 提出EgoMotion分层框架：1）认知推理阶段：使用视觉语言模型将多模态输入映射到离散运动基元空间，获得目标一致的表示；2）运动生成阶段：以这些表示为条件，在连续潜在空间中进行扩散模型迭代去噪，生成物理合理的时间连贯轨迹。
AI.result: EgoMotion在广泛评估中达到最先进性能，生成的运动序列在语义对齐和运动学质量上都优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离认知推理和运动生成，EgoMotion有效解决了第一人称视觉-语言运动生成中的推理-生成纠缠问题，实现了语义理解和运动质量的双重优化。

title: Accelerating trajectory optimization with Sobolev-trained diffusion policies
summary: Trajectory Optimization (TO) solvers exploit known system dynamics to compute locally optimal trajectories through iterative improvements. A downside is that each new problem instance is solved independently; therefore, convergence speed and quality of the solution found depend on the initial trajectory proposed. To improve efficiency, a natural approach is to warm-start TO with initial guesses produced by a learned policy trained on trajectories previously generated by the solver. Diffusion-based policies have recently emerged as expressive imitation learning models, making them promising candidates for this role. Yet, a counterintuitive challenge comes from the local optimality of TO demonstrations: when a policy is rolled out, small non-optimal deviations may push it into situations not represented in the training data, triggering compounding errors over long horizons. In this work, we focus on learning-based warm-starting for gradient-based TO solvers that also provide feedback gains. Exploiting this specificity, we derive a first-order loss for Sobolev learning of diffusion-based policies using both trajectories and feedback gains. Through comprehensive experiments, we demonstrate that the resulting policy avoids compounding errors, and so can learn from very few trajectories to provide initial guesses reducing solving time by $2\times$ to $20 \times$. Incorporating first-order information enables predictions with fewer diffusion steps, reducing inference latency.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一种基于扩散模型的学习策略，利用轨迹优化求解器生成的轨迹和反馈增益进行Sobolev学习，为梯度优化求解器提供高质量的初始猜测，显著减少求解时间。
AI.motivation: 轨迹优化求解器对每个新问题都独立求解，收敛速度和解决方案质量依赖于初始轨迹猜测。传统方法效率低下，而基于学习的策略在长时域中容易产生累积误差。
AI.method: 提出基于扩散模型的学习策略，利用梯度优化求解器提供的轨迹和反馈增益进行Sobolev学习。通过一阶损失函数结合轨迹和反馈增益信息，避免累积误差。
AI.result: 该方法能够从少量轨迹中学习，为求解器提供初始猜测，减少求解时间2-20倍。结合一阶信息还能减少扩散步骤，降低推理延迟。
AI.conclusion: 利用轨迹优化求解器的反馈增益进行Sobolev学习的扩散策略，能够有效避免累积误差，显著提高求解效率，为学习型轨迹优化提供了新思路。

title: SimDiff: Depth Pruning via Similarity and Difference
summary: Depth pruning improves the deployment efficiency of large language models (LLMs) by identifying and removing redundant layers. A widely accepted standard for this identification process is to measure the similarity between layers using cosine distance. However, we find that methods relying solely on this one-dimensional heuristic can exhibit unpredictable performance and even catastrophic collapse across different architectures. To address this issue, we propose SimDiff, a novel layer importance criterion that jointly evaluates layers from two orthogonal perspectives: representational similarity and transformation difference. The difference is quantified using two distinct metrics: MSSD, which is sensitive to outliers and identifies layers that make decisive corrections, and MASD, which robustly measures a layer's average contribution. Extensive experiments on multiple models ranging from 0.5B to 13B parameters demonstrate that SimDiff significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines across various pruning ratios. Notably, our method retains over 91% of LLaMA2-7B's performance at a 25% pruning ratio and achieves up to a 1.49x inference speedup when pruning 12 layers on LLaMA3.1-8B. We also show that pruned models can be effectively recovered with minimal fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: SimDiff提出了一种新的深度剪枝方法，通过联合评估表示相似性和变换差异两个正交视角来确定层的重要性，显著优于仅依赖余弦距离的现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度剪枝方法主要依赖层间余弦距离这一单一启发式标准，但这种方法在不同架构上表现出不可预测的性能，甚至可能导致灾难性崩溃。需要更稳健的层重要性评估标准。
AI.method: 提出SimDiff方法，从两个正交角度联合评估层重要性：1) 表示相似性；2) 变换差异。变换差异使用两种不同指标量化：MSSD（对异常值敏感，识别做出决定性修正的层）和MASD（稳健测量层的平均贡献）。
AI.result: 在0.5B到13B参数范围的多个模型上进行实验，SimDiff显著优于最先进的基线方法。在25%剪枝比例下，LLaMA2-7B性能保留超过91%；在LLaMA3.1-8B上剪枝12层时，推理速度提升达1.49倍。剪枝后的模型可以通过最小化微调有效恢复。
AI.conclusion: SimDiff通过多维度评估层重要性，解决了现有单维度启发式方法的局限性，为大型语言模型的深度剪枝提供了更可靠、高效的解决方案。

title: PortraitDirector: A Hierarchical Disentanglement Framework for Controllable and Real-time Facial Reenactment
summary: Existing facial reenactment methods struggle with a trade-off between expressiveness and fine-grained controllability. Holistic facial reenactment models often sacrifice granular control for expressiveness, while methods designed for control may struggle with fidelity and robust disentanglement. Instead of treating facial motion as a monolithic signal, we explore an alternative compositional perspective. In this paper, we introduce PortraitDirector, a novel framework that formulates face reenactment as a hierarchical composition task, achieving high-fidelity and controllable results. We employ a Hierarchical Motion Disentanglement and Composition strategy, deconstructing facial motion into a Spatial Layer for physical movements and a Semantic Layer for emotional content. The Spatial Layer comprises: (i) global head pose, managed via a dedicated representation and injection pathway; (ii) spatially separated local facial expressions, distilled from cropped facial regions and purged of emotional cues via Emotion-Filtering Module leveraging an information bottleneck. The Semantic Layer contains a derived global emotion. The disentangled components are then recomposed into an expressive motion latent. Furthermore, we engineer the framework for real-time performance through a suite of optimizations, including diffusion distillation, causal attention and VAE acceleration. PortraitDirector achieves streaming, high-fidelity, controllable 512 x 512 face reenactment at 20 FPS with a end-to-end 800 ms latency on a single 5090 GPU.

AI.tldr: PortraitDirector提出了一种分层组合式人脸重演框架，通过空间层（全局头部姿态+局部面部表情）和语义层（全局情感）的分解与重组，实现了高保真度与细粒度控制的平衡，并在单GPU上达到20FPS实时性能。
AI.motivation: 现有面部重演方法在表达性和细粒度可控性之间存在权衡：整体性方法牺牲了精细控制来获得表达性，而控制导向的方法则在保真度和鲁棒解耦方面存在困难。本文探索从组合视角处理面部运动，而非将其视为单一信号。
AI.method: 采用分层运动解耦与组合策略：1) 空间层：包含全局头部姿态（专用表示和注入路径）和局部面部表情（从裁剪面部区域提取，通过情感过滤模块去除情感线索）；2) 语义层：包含全局情感。通过扩散蒸馏、因果注意力和VAE加速等优化实现实时性能。
AI.result: PortraitDirector在单张5090 GPU上实现了512×512分辨率、20FPS的流式高保真可控面部重演，端到端延迟为800毫秒，在表达性和可控性方面取得平衡。
AI.conclusion: 通过将面部重演构建为分层组合任务，PortraitDirector框架成功解决了表达性与可控性之间的权衡问题，实现了高保真度、细粒度控制和实时性能的统一。

title: BALTIC: A Benchmark and Cross-Domain Strategy for 3D Reconstruction Across Air and Underwater Domains Under Varying Illumination
summary: Robust 3D reconstruction across varying environmental conditions remains a critical challenge for robotic perception, particularly when transitioning between air and water. To address this, we introduce BALTIC, a controlled benchmark designed to systematically evaluate modern 3D reconstruction methods under variations in medium and lighting. The benchmark comprises 13 datasets spanning two media (air and water) and three lighting conditions (ambient, artificial, and mixed), with additional variations in motion type, scanning pattern, and initialization trajectory, resulting in a diverse set of sequences.
