We further illustrate the method on the UCI Adult Census dataset. The proposed algorithms provide a flexible framework for the statistical evaluation of the performance and aspects of fairness of machine learning models in a wide range of applications even in relatively small data.

AI.tldr: FairTree是一种基于心理测量不变性测试的新算法，用于检测机器学习模型在不同子组中的性能差异，可直接处理连续、分类和有序特征，无需离散化，并能将性能差异分解为系统偏差和方差。
AI.motivation: 当前机器学习模型评估主要依赖基于损失函数的性能指标，这可能会忽略相关子组中的性能变化。现有的审计工具如SliceFinder和SliceLine存在概念上的缺陷，特别是无法直接处理连续协变量。
AI.method: FairTree算法从心理测量不变性测试改编而来，直接处理连续、分类和有序特征而无需离散化。算法将性能差异分解为系统偏差和方差，提出了两种变体：基于置换的方法（概念上更接近SliceFinder）和波动测试。
AI.result: 通过模拟研究（包括与SliceLine的直接比较）表明，两种方法都有令人满意的假阳性率，但波动测试方法具有相对更高的检测能力。在UCI成人人口普查数据集上的应用进一步验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FairTree算法为机器学习模型的性能和公平性方面提供了灵活的统计评估框架，即使在相对较小的数据集中也能在广泛的应用中发挥作用。

title: Detection of T-shirt Presentation Attacks in Face Recognition Systems
summary: Face recognition systems are often used for biometric authentication. Nevertheless, it is known that without any protective measures, face recognition systems are vulnerable to presentation attacks. To tackle this security problem, methods for detecting presentation attacks have been developed and shown good detection performance on several benchmark datasets. However, generalising presentation attack detection methods to new and novel types of attacks is an ongoing challenge. In this work, we employ 1,608 T-shirt attacks of the T-shirt Face Presentation Attack (TFPA) database using 100 unique presentation attack instruments together with 152 bona fide presentations. In a comprehensive evaluation, we show that this type of attack can compromise the security of face recognition systems. Furthermore, we propose a detection method based on spatial consistency checks in order to detect said T-shirt attacks. Precisely, state-of-the-art face and person detectors are combined to analyse the spatial positions of detected faces and persons based on which T-shirt attacks can be reliably detected.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一种基于空间一致性检查的方法来检测T恤攻击，这种攻击能威胁人脸识别系统的安全。
AI.motivation: 人脸识别系统易受呈现攻击，现有攻击检测方法难以泛化到新型攻击类型。T恤攻击作为一种新型呈现攻击手段，能够威胁人脸识别系统的安全性。
AI.method: 结合最先进的人脸检测器和人体检测器，通过分析检测到的人脸和人体空间位置的一致性来识别T恤攻击。当人脸检测结果与人体检测结果在空间上不一致时，可判定为T恤攻击。
AI.result: 使用TFPA数据库中的1,608个T恤攻击样本和152个真实呈现样本进行综合评估，证明该方法能够可靠地检测T恤攻击，有效提升人脸识别系统的安全性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于空间一致性检查的检测方法能够有效识别T恤攻击，为解决新型呈现攻击检测的泛化问题提供了可行方案。

title: TACENR: Task-Agnostic Contrastive Explanations for Node Representations
comment: Accepted at the XAI 2026 Conference. 24 pages, 10 figures
summary: Graph representation learning has achieved notable success in encoding graph-structured data into latent vector spaces, enabling a wide range of downstream tasks. However, these node representations remain opaque and difficult to interpret. Existing explainability methods primarily focus on supervised settings or on explaining individual representation dimensions, leaving a critical gap in explaining the overall structure of node representations. In this paper, we propose TACENR (Task-Agnostic Contrastive Explanations for Node Representations), a local explanation method that identifies not only attribute features but also proximity and structural ones that contribute the most in the representation space. TACENR builds on contrastive learning, through which we learn a similarity function in the representation space, revealing which are the features that play an important role in the representation of a node. While our focus is on task-agnostic explanations, TACENR can be applied to supervised scenarios as well. Experimental results demonstrate that proximity and structural features play a significant role in shaping node representations and that our supervised variant performs comparably to existing task-specific approaches in identifying the most impactful features.

AI.tldr: TACENR是一种任务无关的对比解释方法，用于解释节点表示，能识别属性、邻近性和结构特征对表示空间的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有的图表示学习方法虽然成功，但节点表示不透明且难以解释。现有解释方法主要关注监督设置或解释单个维度，缺乏对节点表示整体结构的解释。
AI.method: 提出TACENR（任务无关对比解释节点表示），基于对比学习学习表示空间中的相似性函数，识别对节点表示最重要的属性、邻近性和结构特征。
AI.result: 实验结果表明邻近性和结构特征在塑造节点表示中起重要作用，监督变体在识别最重要特征方面与现有任务特定方法表现相当。
AI.conclusion: TACENR填补了节点表示整体结构解释的空白，既能提供任务无关解释，也能应用于监督场景，为图表示学习提供更全面的可解释性。

title: Mind2Drive: Predicting Driver Intentions from EEG in Real-world On-Road Driving
summary: Predicting driver intention from neurophysiological signals offers a promising pathway for enhancing proactive safety in advanced driver assistance systems, yet remains challenging in real-world driving due to EEG signal non-stationarity and the complexity of cognitive-motor preparation. This study proposes and evaluates an EEG-based driver intention prediction framework using a synchronised multi-sensor platform integrated into a real electric vehicle. A real-world on-road dataset was collected across 32 driving sessions, and 12 deep learning architectures were evaluated under consistent experimental conditions. Among the evaluated architectures, TSCeption achieved the highest average accuracy (0.907) and Macro-F1 score (0.901). The proposed framework demonstrates strong temporal stability, maintaining robust decoding performance up to 1000 ms before manoeuvre execution with minimal degradation. Furthermore, additional analyses reveal that minimal EEG preprocessing outperforms artefact-handling pipelines, and prediction performance peaks within a 400-600 ms interval, corresponding to a critical neural preparatory phase preceding driving manoeuvres. Overall, these findings support the feasibility of early and stable EEG-based driver intention decoding under real-world on-road conditions. Code: https://github.com/galosaimi/Mind2Drive.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出并评估了一个基于EEG的驾驶员意图预测框架，在真实道路条件下使用深度学习模型，TSCeption模型表现最佳，准确率达90.7%，能提前1000毫秒稳定预测驾驶意图。
AI.motivation: 从神经生理信号预测驾驶员意图对提升先进驾驶辅助系统的主动安全性很有前景，但在真实驾驶环境中面临EEG信号非平稳性和认知-运动准备复杂性的挑战。
AI.method: 研究提出基于EEG的驾驶员意图预测框架，使用同步多传感器平台集成到真实电动汽车中，收集了32个驾驶会话的真实道路数据集，在一致实验条件下评估了12种深度学习架构。
AI.result: TSCeption架构获得最高平均准确率（0.907）和Macro-F1分数（0.901）；框架展示强时间稳定性，能在动作执行前1000毫秒保持稳健解码性能；最小化EEG预处理优于伪迹处理流程；预测性能在400-600毫秒区间达到峰值。
AI.conclusion: 研究支持在真实道路条件下早期稳定解码EEG驾驶员意图的可行性，为基于神经生理信号的主动安全系统开发提供了实证基础。

title: Revisiting Catastrophic Forgetting in Continual Knowledge Graph Embedding
summary:
Knowledge Graph Embeddings (KGEs) support a wide range of downstream tasks over Knowledge Graphs (KGs). In practice, KGs evolve as new entities and facts are added, motivating Continual Knowledge Graph Embedding (CKGE) methods that update embeddings over time. Current CKGE approaches address catastrophic forgetting (i.e., the performance degradation on previously learned tasks) primarily by limiting changes to existing embeddings.
  However, we show that this view is incomplete. When new entities are introduced, their embeddings can interfere with previously learned ones, causing the model to predict them in place of previously correct answers. This phenomenon, which we call entity interference, has been largely overlooked and is not accounted for in current CKGE evaluation protocols. As a result, the assessment of catastrophic forgetting becomes misleading, and CKGE methods performance is systematically overestimated.
  To address this issue, we introduce a corrected CKGE evaluation protocol that accounts for entity interference. Through experiments on multiple benchmarks, we show that ignoring this effect can lead to performance overestimation of up to 25%, particularly in scenarios with significant entity growth. We further analyze how different CKGE methods and KGE models are affected by the different sources of forgetting, and introduce a catastrophic forgetting metric tailored to CKGE.

AI.tldr: 本文指出当前持续知识图谱嵌入方法忽略了实体干扰问题，导致对灾难性遗忘的评估存在偏差，并提出了修正的评估协议。
AI.motivation: 现有持续知识图谱嵌入方法主要关注限制现有嵌入的变化来应对灾难性遗忘，但忽略了新实体引入时可能对已有嵌入产生的干扰，导致模型预测错误，这种现象被称为实体干扰，在当前的评估协议中被忽视。
AI.method: 提出了修正的持续知识图谱嵌入评估协议，考虑了实体干扰效应；引入了专门针对持续知识图谱嵌入的灾难性遗忘度量指标；在多个基准数据集上进行实验分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，忽略实体干扰效应可能导致性能被高估达25%，特别是在实体显著增长的场景中；分析了不同持续知识图谱嵌入方法和知识图谱嵌入模型如何受到不同遗忘源的影响。
AI.conclusion: 实体干扰是持续知识图谱嵌入中一个被忽视的重要问题，需要专门的评估协议来准确衡量灾难性遗忘；提出的修正评估协议能更真实地反映持续知识图谱嵌入方法的性能。

title: PanDA: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Multimodal 3D Panoptic Segmentation in Autonomous Driving
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: This paper presents the first study on Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) for multimodal 3D panoptic segmentation (mm-3DPS), aiming to improve generalization under domain shifts commonly encountered in real-world autonomous driving. A straightforward solution is to employ a pseudo-labeling strategy, which is widely used in UDA to generate supervision for unlabeled target data, combined with an mm-3DPS backbone. However, existing supervised mm-3DPS methods rely heavily on strong cross-modal complementarity between LiDAR and RGB inputs, making them fragile under domain shifts where one modality degrades (e.g., poor lighting or adverse weather). Moreover, conventional pseudo-labeling typically retains only high-confidence regions, leading to fragmented masks and incomplete object supervision, which are issues particularly detrimental to panoptic segmentation. To address these challenges, we propose PanDA, the first UDA framework specifically designed for multimodal 3D panoptic segmentation. To improve robustness against single-sensor degradation, we introduce an asymmetric multimodal augmentation that selectively drops regions to simulate domain shifts and improve robust representation learning. To enhance pseudo-label completeness and reliability, we further develop a dual-expert pseudo-label refinement module that extracts domain-invariant priors from both 2D and 3D modalities. Extensive experiments across diverse domain shifts, spanning time, weather, location, and sensor variations, significantly surpass state-of-the-art UDA baselines for 3D semantic segmentation.

AI.tldr: 首个针对多模态3D全景分割的无监督域适应研究，提出PanDA框架解决自动驾驶中跨域泛化问题，通过非对称多模态增强和双专家伪标签优化提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现实自动驾驶中常遇到域偏移问题（如光照、天气变化），现有监督式多模态3D全景分割方法过度依赖LiDAR和RGB的强互补性，在单模态退化时表现脆弱。传统伪标签方法仅保留高置信度区域，导致掩码碎片化和不完整监督，对全景分割尤为不利。
AI.method: 提出PanDA框架：1）非对称多模态增强，选择性丢弃区域模拟域偏移，提升鲁棒表示学习；2）双专家伪标签优化模块，从2D和3D模态提取域不变先验，增强伪标签完整性和可靠性。
AI.result: 在涵盖时间、天气、地点和传感器变化的多种域偏移场景中，实验结果显示显著超越现有3D语义分割的SOTA无监督域适应基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PanDA是首个专门为多模态3D全景分割设计的无监督域适应框架，通过增强对单传感器退化的鲁棒性和改进伪标签质量，有效解决了自动驾驶中的跨域泛化挑战。

title: Heterogeneity-Aware Personalized Federated Learning for Industrial Predictive Analytics
summary: Federated prognostics enable clients (e.g., companies, factories, and production lines) to collaboratively develop a failure time prediction model while keeping each client's data local and confidential. However, traditional federated models often assume homogeneity in the degradation processes across clients, an assumption that may not hold in many industrial settings. To overcome this, this paper proposes a personalized federated prognostic model designed to accommodate clients with heterogeneous degradation processes, allowing them to build tailored prognostic models. The prognostic model iteratively facilitates the underlying pairwise collaborations between clients with similar degradation patterns, which enhances the performance of personalized federated learning. To estimate parameters jointly using decentralized datasets, we develop a federated parameter estimation algorithm based on proximal gradient descent. The proposed approach addresses the limitations of existing federated prognostic models by simultaneously achieving model personalization, preserving data privacy, and providing comprehensive failure time distributions. The superiority of the proposed model is validated through extensive simulation studies and a case study using the turbofan engine degradation dataset from the NASA repository.

AI.tldr: 提出个性化联邦预测模型，解决工业场景中客户退化过程异质性问题，通过相似退化模式客户间的协作提升个性化联邦学习性能。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦预测模型假设客户间退化过程同质，但实际工业场景中客户退化过程存在异质性，需要个性化模型来适应不同客户的特定需求。
AI.method: 开发基于近端梯度下降的联邦参数估计算法，通过迭代促进具有相似退化模式的客户间成对协作，构建个性化预测模型。
AI.result: 通过大量仿真研究和NASA涡轮风扇发动机退化数据集的案例研究验证了所提模型的优越性，能够同时实现模型个性化、数据隐私保护和全面的故障时间分布预测。
AI.conclusion: 提出的个性化联邦预测模型克服了现有联邦预测模型的局限性，能够有效处理客户间退化过程的异质性，在保持数据隐私的同时提供准确的故障时间预测。

title: HarmoniDiff-RS: Training-Free Diffusion Harmonization for Satellite Image Composition
comment: 8 pages, 6 figures, CVPR 2026 findings. Code is available at https://github.com/XiaoqiZhuang/HarmoniDiff-RS
summary: Satellite image composition plays a critical role in remote sensing applications such as data augmentation, disaste simulation, and urban planning. We propose HarmoniDiff-RS, a training-free diffusion-based framework for harmonizing composite satellite images under diverse domain conditions. Our method aligns the source and target domains through a Latent Mean Shift operation that transfers radiometric characteristics between them. To balance harmonization and content preservation, we introduce a Timestep-wise Latent Fusion strategy by leveraging early inverted latents for high harmonization and late latents for semantic consistency to generate a set of composite candidates. A lightweight harmony classifier is trained to further automatically select the most coherent result among them. We also construct RSIC-H, a benchmark dataset for satellite image harmonization derived from fMoW, providing 500 paired composition samples. Experiments demonstrate that our method effectively performs satellite image composition, showing strong potential for scalable remote-sensing synthesis and simulation tasks. Code is available at: https://github.com/XiaoqiZhuang/HarmoniDiff-RS.

AI.tldr: HarmoniDiff-RS是一个无需训练的扩散模型框架，用于卫星图像合成，通过潜在均值偏移和时序潜在融合实现跨域协调，并构建了RSIC-H基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 卫星图像合成在遥感应用中至关重要，如数据增强、灾害模拟和城市规划。现有方法在处理不同域条件下的合成图像时存在协调效果不佳的问题，需要一种能够有效协调合成卫星图像的方法。
AI.method: 提出训练免费的扩散模型框架HarmoniDiff-RS：1）通过潜在均值偏移操作在源域和目标域之间传递辐射特征；2）采用时序潜在融合策略，利用早期反转潜在实现高协调性，晚期潜在保持语义一致性；3）训练轻量级协调分类器自动选择最一致的结果；4）构建RSIC-H基准数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效执行卫星图像合成，在遥感合成和模拟任务中显示出强大潜力。构建的RSIC-H数据集包含500个配对合成样本。
AI.conclusion: HarmoniDiff-RS是一个有效的训练免费扩散模型框架，能够协调不同域条件下的合成卫星图像，为可扩展的遥感合成和模拟任务提供了有力工具。

title: VecHeart: Holistic Four-Chamber Cardiac Anatomy Modeling via Hybrid VecSets
summary: Accurate cardiac anatomy modeling requires the model to be able to handle intricate interrelations among structures. In this paper, we propose VecHeart, a unified framework for holistic reconstruction and generation of four-chamber cardiac structures. To overcome the limitations of current feed-forward implicit methods, specifically their restriction to single-object modeling and their neglect of inter-part correlations, we introduce Hybrid Part Transformer, which leverages part-specific learnable queries and interleaved attention to capture complex inter-chamber dependencies. Furthermore, we propose Anatomical Completion Masking and Modality Alignment strategies, enabling the model to infer complete four-chamber structures from partial, sparse, or noisy observations, even when certain anatomical parts are entirely missing. VecHeart also seamlessly extends to 3D+t dynamic mesh sequence generation, demonstrating exceptional versatility. Experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance, maintaining high-fidelity reconstruction across diverse challenging scenarios. Code will be released.

AI.tldr: VecHeart是一个统一框架，用于全心脏四腔室结构的重建与生成，通过混合部件Transformer和解剖补全策略处理不完整观测，并能扩展到3D+时间动态网格序列生成。
AI.motivation: 现有前馈隐式方法存在两个主要局限：1) 仅限于单对象建模，无法处理多结构心脏解剖；2) 忽视部件间相关性。心脏解剖建模需要处理结构间复杂相互关系。
AI.method: 提出混合部件Transformer，利用部件特定可学习查询和交错注意力捕获腔室间复杂依赖关系；引入解剖补全掩蔽和模态对齐策略，使模型能从部分、稀疏或噪声观测中推断完整四腔室结构。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法达到最先进性能，在多样化挑战性场景下保持高保真重建，并能无缝扩展到3D+时间动态网格序列生成。
AI.conclusion: VecHeart是一个多功能框架，能够处理完整心脏解剖建模，克服了现有方法的局限性，在心脏结构重建和生成任务中表现出色。

title: EVPO: Explained Variance Policy Optimization for Adaptive Critic Utilization in LLM Post-Training
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) for LLM post-training faces a fundamental design choice: whether to use a learned critic as a baseline for policy optimization. Classical theory favors critic-based methods such as PPO for variance reduction, yet critic-free alternatives like GRPO have gained widespread adoption due to their simplicity and competitive performance. We show that in sparse-reward settings, a learned critic can inject estimation noise that exceeds the state signal it captures, increasing rather than reducing advantage variance. By casting baseline selection as a Kalman filtering problem, we unify PPO and GRPO as two extremes of the Kalman gain and prove that explained variance (EV), computable from a single training batch, identifies the exact boundary: positive EV indicates the critic reduces variance, while zero or negative EV signals that it inflates variance. Building on this insight, we propose Explained Variance Policy Optimization (EVPO), which monitors batch-level EV at each training step and adaptively switches between critic-based and batch-mean advantage estimation, provably achieving no greater variance than the better of the two at every step. Across four tasks spanning classical control, agentic interaction, and mathematical reasoning, EVPO consistently outperforms both PPO and GRPO regardless of which fixed baseline is stronger on a given task. Further analysis confirms that the adaptive gating tracks critic maturation over training and that the theoretically derived zero threshold is empirically optimal.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVPO算法，通过监控解释方差自适应选择优势估计方法，在稀疏奖励场景下超越PPO和GRPO
AI.motivation: 在LLM后训练的强化学习中，传统理论支持使用学习到的critic作为基线来减少方差，但在稀疏奖励场景下，critic可能引入比状态信号更多的估计噪声，反而增加方差。需要一种自适应方法来确定何时使用critic更有效。
AI.method: 将基线选择建模为卡尔曼滤波问题，证明解释方差(EV)可识别critic是否减少方差的边界。提出EVPO算法，在每一步训练中监控批量级EV，自适应地在critic-based和batch-mean优势估计之间切换。
AI.result: 在四个任务（经典控制、智能体交互、数学推理）上，EVPO始终优于PPO和GRPO，无论哪种固定基线在特定任务上更强。分析证实自适应门控能跟踪critic在训练过程中的成熟度，且理论推导的零阈值是经验最优的。
AI.conclusion: EVPO通过自适应基线选择，在理论上保证每一步的方差不大于两种方法中更好的那个，为RL中的方差减少提供了原则性解决方案，特别适用于稀疏奖励场景。

title: HP-Edit: A Human-Preference Post-Training Framework for Image Editing
summary: Common image editing tasks typically adopt powerful generative diffusion models as the leading paradigm for real-world content editing. Meanwhile, although reinforcement learning (RL) methods such as Diffusion-DPO and Flow-GRPO have further improved generation quality, efficiently applying Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) to diffusion-based editing remains largely unexplored, due to a lack of scalable human-preference datasets and frameworks tailored to diverse editing needs. To fill this gap, we propose HP-Edit, a post-training framework for Human Preference-aligned Editing, and introduce RealPref-50K, a real-world dataset across eight common tasks and balancing common object editing. Specifically, HP-Edit leverages a small amount of human-preference scoring data and a pretrained visual large language model (VLM) to develop HP-Scorer--an automatic, human preference-aligned evaluator. We then use HP-Scorer both to efficiently build a scalable preference dataset and to serve as the reward function for post-training the editing model. We also introduce RealPref-Bench, a benchmark for evaluating real-world editing performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly enhances models such as Qwen-Image-Edit-2509, aligning their outputs more closely with human preference.

AI.tldr: HP-Edit是一个基于人类偏好的图像编辑后训练框架，通过构建RealPref-50K真实世界数据集和HP-Scorer自动评估器，提升扩散模型在图像编辑任务中的人类偏好对齐能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管扩散模型已成为图像编辑的主流方法，但如何将人类反馈强化学习（RLHF）有效应用于扩散编辑仍面临挑战，主要缺乏可扩展的人类偏好数据集和针对多样化编辑需求的框架。
AI.method: 提出HP-Edit后训练框架：1）构建RealPref-50K真实世界数据集，涵盖8个常见任务；2）利用少量人类偏好评分数据和预训练视觉大语言模型开发HP-Scorer自动评估器；3）使用HP-Scorer构建可扩展偏好数据集并作为奖励函数对编辑模型进行后训练；4）建立RealPref-Bench评估基准。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升了如Qwen-Image-Edit-2509等模型的性能，使其输出更符合人类偏好。
AI.conclusion: HP-Edit框架通过结合人类偏好数据和自动评估器，成功解决了扩散模型在图像编辑中的人类偏好对齐问题，为真实世界编辑任务提供了有效的解决方案。

title: When Graph Structure Becomes a Liability: A Critical Re-Evaluation of Graph Neural Networks for Bitcoin Fraud Detection under Temporal Distribution Shift
summary: The consensus that GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT, and EvolveGCN outperform feature-only baselines on the Elliptic Bitcoin Dataset is widely cited but has not been rigorously stress-tested under a leakage-free evaluation protocol. We perform a seed-matched inductive-versus-transductive comparison and find that this consensus does not hold. Under a strictly inductive protocol, Random Forest on raw features achieves F1 = 0.821 and outperforms all evaluated GNNs, while GraphSAGE reaches F1 = 0.689 +/- 0.017. A paired controlled experiment reveals a 39.5-point F1 gap attributable to training-time exposure to test-period adjacency. Additionally, edge-shuffle ablations show that randomly wired graphs outperform the real transaction graph, indicating that the dataset's topology can be misleading under temporal distribution shift. Hybrid models combining GNN embeddings with raw features provide only marginal gains and remain substantially below feature-only baselines. We release code, checkpoints, and a strict-inductive protocol to enable reproducible, leakage-free evaluation.

AI.tldr: 传统观点认为GCN、GraphSAGE、GAT和EvolveGCN在Elliptic比特币数据集上优于仅使用特征的基线方法，但这一共识在无泄漏评估协议下并不成立。严格归纳协议中，随机森林在原始特征上表现最佳，而GNNs表现较差，表明先前结果存在数据泄漏问题。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是验证广泛引用的共识——即GCN、GraphSAGE、GAT和EvolveGCN在Elliptic比特币数据集上优于仅使用特征的基线方法——是否在无数据泄漏的严格评估协议下仍然成立。作者怀疑先前研究可能存在训练时暴露测试期邻接信息的问题。
AI.method: 采用种子匹配的归纳与传导对比方法，设计严格归纳协议避免数据泄漏。进行配对控制实验量化训练时暴露测试期邻接信息的影响。通过边洗牌消融实验分析图拓扑结构的作用，并评估结合GNN嵌入与原始特征的混合模型。
AI.result: 严格归纳协议下，随机森林在原始特征上达到F1=0.821，优于所有评估的GNNs（GraphSAGE仅达到F1=0.689）。配对实验显示39.5分的F1差距可归因于训练时暴露测试期邻接信息。边洗牌实验表明随机连接图优于真实交易图，说明数据集拓扑在时间分布偏移下具有误导性。混合模型仅提供边际增益且仍显著低于仅特征基线。
AI.conclusion: 传统关于GNNs在Elliptic比特币数据集上优于特征基线方法的共识在无泄漏评估下不成立。数据泄漏问题严重影响了先前研究结果，随机森林在原始特征上表现最佳。研究强调了严格评估协议的重要性，并发布了代码、检查点和严格归纳协议以确保可复现的无泄漏评估。

title: GOLD-BEV: GrOund and aeriaL Data for Dense Semantic BEV Mapping of Dynamic Scenes
summary: Understanding road scenes in a geometrically consistent, scene-centric representation is crucial for planning and mapping. We present GOLD-BEV, a framework that learns dense bird's-eye-view (BEV) semantic environment maps-including dynamic agents-from ego-centric sensors, using time-synchronized aerial imagery as supervision only during training. BEV-aligned aerial crops provide an intuitive target space, enabling dense semantic annotation with minimal manual effort and avoiding the ambiguity of ego-only BEV labeling. Crucially, strict aerial-ground synchronization allows overhead observations to supervise moving traffic participants and mitigates the temporal inconsistencies inherent to non-synchronized overhead sources. To obtain scalable dense targets, we generate BEV pseudo-labels using domain-adapted aerial teachers, and jointly train BEV segmentation with optional pseudo-aerial BEV reconstruction for interpretability. Finally, we extend beyond aerial coverage by learning to synthesize pseudo-aerial BEV images from ego sensors, which support lightweight human annotation and uncertainty-aware pseudo-labeling on unlabeled drives.

AI.tldr: GOLD-BEV：利用时间同步的航拍图像作为训练监督，从自车传感器学习密集鸟瞰图语义环境地图的框架，包括动态交通参与者。
AI.motivation: 需要在几何一致、场景中心的表示中理解道路场景，这对于规划和地图构建至关重要。传统方法依赖自车视角的BEV标注存在模糊性，且手动标注成本高。
AI.method: 1. 使用时间同步的航拍图像作为训练监督；2. BEV对齐的航拍裁剪提供直观目标空间，实现密集语义标注；3. 通过领域适应的航拍教师生成BEV伪标签；4. 联合训练BEV分割和可选的伪航拍BEV重建；5. 从自车传感器学习合成伪航拍BEV图像，支持轻量级人工标注和不确定性感知的伪标注。
AI.result: 框架能够学习密集的BEV语义环境地图，包括动态交通参与者，仅需在训练时使用时间同步的航拍图像监督。通过伪航拍BEV图像合成，可扩展到无航拍覆盖的区域。
AI.conclusion: GOLD-BEV提供了一种利用航拍图像监督学习BEV语义地图的有效方法，解决了传统自车视角BEV标注的模糊性问题，并通过伪航拍合成实现了可扩展性。

title: VCE: A zero-cost hallucination mitigation method of LVLMs via visual contrastive editing
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) frequently suffer from Object Hallucination (OH), wherein they generate descriptions containing objects that are not actually present in the input image. This phenomenon is particularly problematic in real-world applications such as medical imaging and autonomous driving, where accuracy is critical. Recent studies suggest that the hallucination problem may stem from language priors: biases learned during pretraining that cause LVLMs to generate words based on their statistical co-occurrence. To mitigate this problem, we propose Visual Contrastive Editing (VCE), a novel post-hoc method that identifies and suppresses hallucinatory tendencies by analyzing the model's response to contrastive visual perturbations. Using Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), we decompose the model's activation patterns to isolate hallucination subspaces and apply targeted parameter edits to attenuate its influence. Unlike existing approaches that require fine-tuning or labeled data, VCE operates as a label-free intervention, making it both scalable and practical for deployment in resource-constrained settings. Experimental results demonstrate that VCE effectively reduces object hallucination across multiple benchmarks while maintaining the model's original computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出VCE方法，通过视觉对比编辑和SVD分解来减少大型视觉语言模型中的物体幻觉问题，无需微调或标注数据
AI.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型经常出现物体幻觉问题，即在图像描述中生成实际不存在的物体。这在医疗影像和自动驾驶等关键应用中尤其危险。研究表明幻觉问题可能源于语言先验偏差，即模型基于训练数据的统计共现生成词汇。
AI.method: 提出视觉对比编辑（VCE）方法，通过分析模型对对比性视觉扰动的响应来识别和抑制幻觉倾向。使用奇异值分解（SVD）分解模型激活模式，隔离幻觉子空间，并应用有针对性的参数编辑来减弱其影响。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，VCE在多个基准测试中有效减少了物体幻觉，同时保持了模型原有的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: VCE作为一种无需标注的后处理方法，既具有可扩展性，又适合在资源受限的环境中部署，为解决大型视觉语言模型的物体幻觉问题提供了实用解决方案。

title: Revisiting RaBitQ and TurboQuant: A Symmetric Comparison of Methods, Theory, and Experiments
summary: This technical note revisits the relationship between RaBitQ and TurboQuant under a unified comparison framework. We compare the two methods in terms of methodology, theoretical guarantees, and empirical performance, using a reproducible, transparent, and symmetric setup. Our results show that, despite the claimed advantage of TurboQuant, TurboQuant does not provide a consistent improvement over RaBitQ in directly comparable settings; in many tested configurations, it performs worse than RaBitQ. We further find that several reported runtime and recall results in the TurboQuant paper could not be reproduced from the released implementation under the stated configuration. Overall, this note clarifies the shared structure and genuine differences between the two lines of work, while documenting reproducibility issues in the experimental results reported by the TurboQuant paper.

AI.tldr: 本文重新评估了RaBitQ和TurboQuant两种方法，在统一框架下比较了它们的方法论、理论保证和实证性能，发现TurboQuant并未在可比设置中一致优于RaBitQ，且存在实验结果可复现性问题。
AI.motivation: 重新审视RaBitQ和TurboQuant两种方法之间的关系，澄清它们之间的共享结构和真正差异，同时记录TurboQuant论文中实验结果的复现性问题。
AI.method: 建立统一、可复现、透明且对称的比较框架，从方法论、理论保证和实证性能三个维度对两种方法进行系统比较。
AI.result: 1. TurboQuant并未在直接可比的设置中提供对RaBitQ的一致改进；2. 在许多测试配置中，TurboQuant表现比RaBitQ更差；3. TurboQuant论文中报告的多个运行时和召回结果无法从其发布的实现中复现。
AI.conclusion: 本文澄清了两种方法的共享结构和真正差异，同时记录了TurboQuant论文中实验结果的复现性问题，为相关研究提供了更准确的比较基准。

title: Calibrating Scientific Foundation Models with Inference-Time Stochastic Attention
summary: Transformer-based scientific foundation models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes settings, but current architectures give deterministic outputs and provide limited support for calibrated predictive uncertainty. We propose Stochastic Attention, a lightweight inference-time modification that randomizes attention by replacing softmax weights with normalized multinomial samples controlled by a single concentration parameter, and produces predictive ensembles without retraining. To set this parameter, we introduce a calibration objective that matches the stochastic attention output with the target, yielding an efficient univariate post-hoc tuning problem. We evaluate this mechanism on two scientific foundation models for weather and timeseries forecasting along with an additional regression task. Across benchmarks against uncertainty-aware baselines, we find that Stochastic Attention achieves the strongest native calibration and the sharpest prediction intervals at comparable coverage, while requiring only minutes of post-hoc tuning versus days of retraining for competitive baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Stochastic Attention，一种轻量级推理时修改方法，通过用归一化多项式样本替换softmax权重来随机化注意力，无需重新训练即可生成预测集成，并在科学基础模型中实现最佳校准和预测区间。
AI.motivation: Transformer基础的科学基础模型越来越多地部署在高风险环境中，但当前架构输出确定性结果且对校准预测不确定性的支持有限，需要一种轻量级方法来提供可靠的不确定性量化。
AI.method: 提出Stochastic Attention，在推理时通过单个浓度参数控制，用归一化多项式样本替换softmax权重来随机化注意力机制，无需重新训练即可生成预测集成。引入校准目标来匹配随机注意力输出与目标，形成高效的单变量后验调优问题。
AI.result: 在天气和时间序列预测的两个科学基础模型以及回归任务上评估，相比不确定性感知基线，Stochastic Attention实现了最强的原生校准和最尖锐的预测区间，在可比覆盖率下仅需几分钟的后验调优，而竞争基线需要数天重新训练。
AI.conclusion: Stochastic Attention为Transformer基础的科学基础模型提供了一种高效、轻量级的推理时不确定性量化方法，显著优于现有基线，仅需最小调优成本即可实现可靠的不确定性估计。

title: Separating Geometry from Probability in the Analysis of Generalization
summary: The goal of machine learning is to find models that minimize prediction error on data that has not yet been seen. Its operational paradigm assumes access to a dataset $S$ and articulates a scheme for evaluating how well a given model performs on an arbitrary sample. The sample can be $S$ (in which case we speak of ``in-sample'' performance) or some entirely new $S'$ (in which case we speak of ``out-of-sample'' performance). Traditional analysis of generalization assumes that both in- and out-of-sample data are i.i.d.\ draws from an infinite population. However, these probabilistic assumptions cannot be verified even in principle. This paper presents an alternative view of generalization through the lens of sensitivity analysis of solutions of optimization problems to perturbations in the problem data. Under this framework, generalization bounds are obtained by purely deterministic means and take the form of variational principles that relate in-sample and out-of-sample evaluations through an error term that quantifies how close out-of-sample data are to in-sample data. Statistical assumptions can then be used \textit{ex post} to characterize the situations when this error term is small (either on average or with high probability).

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种基于优化问题敏感性分析的泛化理论新视角，用确定性方法建立泛化界，通过误差项量化样本内外数据接近程度，统计假设仅用于事后分析误差项特性。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习泛化分析依赖于i.i.d.假设，但这些概率假设无法在原则上验证。作者希望提供一个不依赖概率假设的替代框架，从优化问题敏感性分析的角度重新审视泛化问题。
AI.method: 采用优化问题敏感性分析视角，将泛化界表示为变分原理形式，通过确定性方法建立样本内和样本外评估之间的关系，误差项量化样本外数据与样本内数据的接近程度。
AI.result: 获得了纯确定性方法推导的泛化界，这些界以变分原理形式表达，将样本内和样本外评估通过误差项联系起来。统计假设仅用于事后分析误差项在平均或高概率情况下的特性。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一个不依赖传统概率假设的泛化理论新框架，通过优化问题敏感性分析提供确定性泛化界，统计假设仅作为事后分析工具，为机器学习泛化分析提供了更基础的理论基础。

title: LoViF 2026 Challenge on Real-World All-in-One Image Restoration: Methods and Results
summary: This paper presents a review for the LoViF Challenge on Real-World All-in-One Image Restoration. The challenge aimed to advance research on real-world all-in-one image restoration under diverse real-world degradation conditions, including blur, low-light, haze, rain, and snow. It provided a unified benchmark to evaluate the robustness and generalization ability of restoration models across multiple degradation categories within a common framework. The competition attracted 124 registered participants and received 9 valid final submissions with corresponding fact sheets, significantly contributing to the progress of real-world all-in-one image restoration. This report provides a detailed analysis of the submitted methods and corresponding results, emphasizing recent progress in unified real-world image restoration. The analysis highlights effective approaches and establishes a benchmark for future research in real-world low-level vision.

AI.tldr: LoViF挑战赛综述：针对真实世界多退化图像修复的竞赛报告，涵盖模糊、低光、雾霾、雨雪等多种退化类型，旨在评估模型在统一框架下的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 推动真实世界多合一图像修复研究，为多种退化条件（模糊、低光、雾霾、雨雪）下的图像修复提供统一的基准测试平台，评估模型在复杂真实场景中的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过举办LoViF挑战赛，收集124名参赛者的9份有效最终提交，提供统一基准框架，分析参赛方法在多种退化类型下的表现，建立综合评价体系。
AI.result: 挑战赛成功吸引了广泛参与，获得了9份有效提交，为真实世界多合一图像修复领域建立了重要基准，推动了该领域的研究进展。
AI.conclusion: LoViF挑战赛为真实世界多退化图像修复提供了有价值的基准测试平台，分析了当前有效方法，为未来低层视觉研究建立了重要参考框架。

title: Structure-guided molecular design with contrastive 3D protein-ligand learning
summary: Structure-based drug discovery faces the dual challenge of accurately capturing 3D protein-ligand interactions while navigating ultra-large chemical spaces to identify synthetically accessible candidates. In this work, we present a unified framework that addresses these challenges by combining contrastive 3D structure encoding with autoregressive molecular generation conditioned on commercial compound spaces. First, we introduce an SE(3)-equivariant transformer that encodes ligand and pocket structures into a shared embedding space via contrastive learning, achieving competitive results in zero-shot virtual screening. Second, we integrate these embeddings into a multimodal Chemical Language Model (MCLM). The model generates target-specific molecules conditioned on either pocket or ligand structures, with a learned dataset token that steers the output toward targeted chemical spaces, yielding candidates with favorable predicted binding properties across diverse targets.

AI.tldr: 提出统一框架，结合对比性3D结构编码和基于商业化合物空间的自回归分子生成，用于基于结构的药物发现
AI.motivation: 基于结构的药物发现面临双重挑战：准确捕捉3D蛋白质-配体相互作用，同时在超大规模化学空间中导航以识别可合成候选物
AI.method: 1. 引入SE(3)-等变transformer，通过对比学习将配体和口袋结构编码到共享嵌入空间；2. 将这些嵌入集成到多模态化学语言模型(MCLM)中，该模型基于口袋或配体结构生成靶点特异性分子，并通过学习的数据集标记引导输出到目标化学空间
AI.result: 在零样本虚拟筛选中取得竞争性结果；生成具有有利预测结合特性的候选分子，适用于多种靶点
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架通过结合3D结构编码和条件分子生成，有效解决了基于结构药物发现中的关键挑战

title: TS-Attn: Temporal-wise Separable Attention for Multi-Event Video Generation
summary: Generating high-quality videos from complex temporal descriptions that contain multiple sequential actions is a key unsolved problem. Existing methods are constrained by an inherent trade-off: using multiple short prompts fed sequentially into the model improves action fidelity but compromises temporal consistency, while a single complex prompt preserves consistency at the cost of prompt-following capability. We attribute this problem to two primary causes: 1) temporal misalignment between video content and the prompt, and 2) conflicting attention coupling between motion-related visual objects and their associated text conditions. To address these challenges, we propose a novel, training-free attention mechanism, Temporal-wise Separable Attention (TS-Attn), which dynamically rearranges attention distribution to ensure temporal awareness and global coherence in multi-event scenarios. TS-Attn can be seamlessly integrated into various pre-trained text-to-video models, boosting StoryEval-Bench scores by 33.5% and 16.4% on Wan2.1-T2V-14B and Wan2.2-T2V-A14B with only a 2% increase in inference time. It also supports plug-and-play usage across models for multi-event image-to-video generation. The source code and project page are available at https://github.com/Hong-yu-Zhang/TS-Attn.

AI.tldr: 提出TS-Attn注意力机制解决多动作视频生成中的时间对齐和注意力耦合问题，无需训练即可提升现有模型性能
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理包含多个顺序动作的复杂时间描述时面临两难：使用多个短提示能提高动作保真度但损害时间一致性，而使用单个复杂提示能保持一致性但降低提示跟随能力。主要问题源于时间不对齐和注意力耦合冲突。
AI.method: 提出无需训练的时间感知可分离注意力机制（TS-Attn），动态重新分配注意力分布，确保多事件场景中的时间感知和全局连贯性，可无缝集成到各种预训练文本到视频模型中。
AI.result: 在Wan2.1-T2V-14B和Wan2.2-T2V-A14B模型上，仅增加2%推理时间就将StoryEval-Bench分数分别提升33.5%和16.4%，同时支持跨模型的多事件图像到视频生成的即插即用。
AI.conclusion: TS-Attn机制有效解决了多动作视频生成中的时间对齐和注意力耦合问题，显著提升了现有模型的性能，具有广泛的适用性和实用性。

title: Deep sprite-based image models: An analysis
summary: While foundation models drive steady progress in image segmentation and diffusion algorithms compose always more realistic images, the seemingly simple problem of identifying recurrent patterns in a collection of images remains very much open. In this paper, we focus on sprite-based image decomposition models, which have shown some promise for clustering and image decomposition and are appealing because of their high interpretability. These models come in different flavors, need to be tailored to specific datasets, and struggle to scale to images with many objects. We dive into the details of their design, identify their core components, and perform an extensive analysis on clustering benchmarks. We leverage this analysis to propose a deep sprite-based image decomposition method that performs on par with state-of-the-art unsupervised class-aware image segmentation methods on the standard CLEVR benchmark, scales linearly with the number of objects, identifies explicitly object categories, and fully models images in an easily interpretable way.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于精灵的图像分解方法，在标准CLEVR基准测试中与最先进的无监督类感知图像分割方法性能相当，能够线性扩展处理多对象图像，明确识别对象类别，并以高度可解释的方式建模图像。
AI.motivation: 尽管基础模型在图像分割方面取得稳定进展，扩散算法生成越来越逼真的图像，但在图像集合中识别重复模式这一看似简单的问题仍然非常开放。精灵基图像分解模型在聚类和图像分解方面显示出潜力，因其高可解释性而具有吸引力，但现有模型需要针对特定数据集定制，且难以扩展到包含多个对象的图像。
AI.method: 深入研究精灵基图像分解模型的设计细节，识别其核心组件，在聚类基准上进行广泛分析。基于此分析提出一种深度精灵基图像分解方法，该方法在标准CLEVR基准测试中与最先进的无监督类感知图像分割方法性能相当，能够线性扩展处理多对象图像，明确识别对象类别，并以高度可解释的方式建模图像。
AI.result: 提出的深度精灵基图像分解方法在标准CLEVR基准测试中与最先进的无监督类感知图像分割方法性能相当，能够线性扩展处理多对象图像，明确识别对象类别，并以高度可解释的方式建模图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过深入分析精灵基图像分解模型的设计并识别其核心组件，成功开发了一种性能优越的深度精灵基图像分解方法，解决了现有模型需要定制化、难以扩展的问题，为图像集合中的重复模式识别提供了高度可解释的解决方案。

title: An Efficient Black-Box Reduction from Online Learning to Multicalibration, and a New Route to $Φ$-Regret Minimization
summary:
We give a Gordon-Greenwald-Marks (GGM) style black-box reduction from online learning to online multicalibration. Concretely, we show that to achieve high-dimensional multicalibration with respect to a class of functions H, it suffices to combine any no-regret learner over H with an expected variational inequality (EVI) solver. We also prove a converse statement showing that efficient multicalibration implies efficient EVI solving, highlighting how EVIs in multicalibration mirror the role of fixed points in the GGM result for $Φ$-regret.
  This first set of results resolves the main open question in Garg, Jung, Reingold, and Roth (SODA '24), showing that oracle-efficient online multicalibration with $\sqrt{T}$-type guarantees is possible in full generality. Furthermore, our GGM-style reduction unifies the analyses of existing online multicalibration algorithms, enables new algorithms for challenging environments with delayed observations or censored outcomes, and yields the first efficient black-box reduction between online learning and multiclass omniprediction.
  Our second main result is a fine-grained reduction from high-dimensional online multicalibration to (contextual) $Φ$-regret minimization. Together with our first result, this establishes a new route from external regret to Phi-regret that bypasses sophisticated fixed-point or semi-separation machinery, dramatically simplifies a result of Daskalakis, Farina, Fishelson, Pipis, and Schneider (STOC '25) while improving rates, and yields new algorithms that are robust to richer deviation classes, such as those belonging to any reproducing kernel Hilbert space.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了从在线学习到在线多校准的GGM风格黑盒约简，证明了高效多校准与EVI求解的等价性，并建立了从高维多校准到Φ-遗憾的细粒度约简。
AI.motivation: 解决Garg等人(SODA '24)提出的主要开放问题：证明具有√T型保证的oracle高效在线多校准在完全一般性下是可能的。统一现有在线多校准算法的分析，并为具有延迟观测或审查结果的挑战性环境提供新算法。
AI.method: 1. 提出GGM风格的黑盒约简：将任何对函数类H的无遗憾学习器与期望变分不等式(EVI)求解器结合，实现高维多校准。2. 证明逆命题：高效多校准意味着高效EVI求解。3. 建立从高维在线多校准到(上下文)Φ-遗憾最小化的细粒度约简。
AI.result: 1. 完全解决了SODA '24的主要开放问题，证明了具有√T型保证的oracle高效在线多校准在一般性下是可能的。2. 统一了现有在线多校准算法的分析。3. 为延迟观测或审查结果环境提供了新算法。4. 获得了在线学习与多类全预测之间的首个高效黑盒约简。5. 简化了Daskalakis等人(STOC '25)的结果并改进了速率。6. 产生了对更丰富偏差类(如再生核希尔伯特空间)具有鲁棒性的新算法。
AI.conclusion: 该论文通过建立从在线学习到在线多校准的GGM风格约简，解决了该领域的核心开放问题。提出的方法不仅统一了现有分析，还为新环境提供了算法，并建立了从外部遗憾到Φ-遗憾的新路径，显著简化了先前结果并提高了性能。

title: Seeing Candidates at Scale: Multimodal LLMs for Visual Political Communication on Instagram
comment: An earlier version was presented at #SMSociety 2024 (London)
summary: This paper presents a computational case study that evaluates the capabilities of specialized machine learning models and emerging multimodal large language models for Visual Political Communication (VPC) analysis. Focusing on concentrated visibility in Instagram stories and posts during the 2021 German federal election campaign, we compare the performance of traditional computer vision models (FaceNet512, RetinaFace, Google Cloud Vision) with a multimodal large language model (GPT-4o) in identifying front-runner politicians and counting individuals in images. GPT-4o outperformed the other models, achieving a macro F1-score of 0.89 for face recognition and 0.86 for person counting in stories. These findings demonstrate the potential of advanced AI systems to scale and refine visual content analysis in political communication while highlighting methodological considerations for future research.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了传统计算机视觉模型与多模态大语言模型在视觉政治传播分析中的表现，发现GPT-4o在识别政治人物和统计图像人数方面表现最佳。
AI.motivation: 评估专业机器学习模型和新兴多模态大语言模型在视觉政治传播分析中的能力，特别是在政治竞选期间社交媒体图像内容分析方面。
AI.method: 以2021年德国联邦选举期间Instagram故事和帖子为研究对象，比较FaceNet512、RetinaFace、Google Cloud Vision等传统计算机视觉模型与GPT-4o多模态大语言模型在识别主要政治人物和统计图像中人数方面的性能。
AI.result: GPT-4o在所有模型中表现最优，在故事分析中面部识别的宏观F1分数达到0.89，人物统计达到0.86，显著优于传统计算机视觉模型。
AI.conclusion: 先进AI系统在扩展和精细化政治传播视觉内容分析方面具有巨大潜力，同时为未来研究提供了重要的方法论考量。

title: SAGE: Training-Free Semantic Evidence Composition for Edge-Cloud Inference under Hard Uplink Budgets
summary: Edge-cloud hybrid inference offloads difficult inputs to a powerful remote model, but the uplink channel imposes hard per-request constraints on the number of bits that can be transmitted. We show that selecting transmitted content based solely on attention-based importance, the standard approach in collaborative inference, is inherently limited under hard budgets. Two findings support this claim. First, replacing high-importance units with low-importance but complementary ones improves server accuracy. This shows that what matters is not individual importance but how well the transmitted set covers diverse aspects of the input. Second, spatially uniform selection without any content information achieves competitive accuracy at moderate budgets. This confirms that spatial coverage alone carries independent value. Based on this analysis, we propose SAGE (Semantic Attention-Guided Evidence), a principled, training-free method that combines importance filtering with embedding-diversity sampling. SAGE achieves 93% of the server ceiling in offloaded accuracy while transmitting fewer than half of the available evidence units on ImageNet-1K, substantially outperforming importance-only composition.

AI.tldr: SAGE方法通过结合重要性过滤和嵌入多样性采样，在硬比特预算下显著提升边缘-云协同推理的准确性，优于仅基于注意力的方法。
AI.motivation: 边缘-云混合推理在硬比特预算下面临挑战，传统基于注意力重要性的内容选择方法存在固有局限性，需要更有效的内容传输策略。
AI.method: 提出SAGE方法，结合重要性过滤和嵌入多样性采样，无需训练，在硬比特预算下优化传输内容选择。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K上，SAGE达到服务器上限精度的93%，同时传输少于一半可用证据单元，显著优于仅基于重要性的方法。
AI.conclusion: 在硬比特预算下，传输内容的多样性和覆盖范围比单个单元的重要性更重要，SAGE方法为此提供了有效的解决方案。

title: Evaluating Histogram Matching for Robust Deep learning-Based Grapevine Disease Detection
summary: Variability in illumination is a primary factor limiting deep learning robustness for field-based plant disease detection. This study evaluates Histogram Matching (HM), a technique that transforms the pixel intensity distribution of an image to match a reference profile, to mitigate this in grapevine classification, distinguishing among healthy leaves, downy mildew, and spider mite damage. We propose a dual-stage integration of HM: (i) as a preprocessing step for normalization, and (ii) as a data augmentation technique to introduce controlled training variability. Experiments using 1,469 RGB images (comprising homogeneous leaf-focused and heterogeneous canopy samples) to train ResNet-18 models demonstrate that this combination significantly enhances robustness on real-world canopy images. While leaf-focused samples showed marginal gains, the canopy subset improved markedly, indicating that balancing normalization with histogram-based diversification effectively bridges the domain gap caused by uncontrolled lighting.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了直方图匹配技术在葡萄病害检测中的应用，通过预处理归一化和数据增强的双阶段集成，显著提升了模型在真实冠层图像上的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 光照变化是限制深度学习在田间植物病害检测中鲁棒性的主要因素。本研究旨在解决葡萄病害分类中因光照变化导致的性能下降问题。
AI.method: 提出直方图匹配的双阶段集成方法：(1)作为预处理步骤进行图像归一化；(2)作为数据增强技术引入受控的训练变异性。使用1,469张RGB图像（包括均匀叶片聚焦和异质冠层样本）训练ResNet-18模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法显著提升了模型在真实冠层图像上的鲁棒性。叶片聚焦样本显示边际增益，而冠层子集改善明显，表明平衡归一化与直方图多样化能有效弥合由非受控光照引起的域差距。
AI.conclusion: 直方图匹配的双阶段集成方法能有效缓解光照变化对深度学习植物病害检测的影响，特别是在处理真实冠层图像时表现出显著优势。

title: Disentangling Damage from Operational Variability: A Label-Free Self-Supervised Representation Learning Framework for Output-Only Structural Damage Identification
summary: Damage identification is a core task in structural health monitoring. In practice, however, its reliability is often compromised by confounding non-damage effects, such as variations in excitation and environmental conditions, which can induce changes comparable to or larger than those caused by structural damage. To address this challenge, this study proposes a self-supervised label-free disentangled representation learning framework for robust vibration-based structural damage identification. The proposed framework employs an autoencoder with two latent representations to learn directly from raw vibration acceleration signals. A self-supervised invariance regularization, implemented via Variance-Invariance-Covariance Regularization (VICReg), is imposed on one latent representation using baseline data where structural damage is assumed constant but operational and environmental conditions vary. In addition, a frequency-domain constraint is introduced to enforce agreement between the power spectral density reconstructed from the latent representation and that computed from the corresponding input time series. Together, these mechanisms promote disentanglement, enabling the learned representation to be sensitive to damage-related characteristics while remaining invariant to nuisance variability. The framework is trained in a fully end-to-end and label-free manner, requiring no prior information on damage, excitation, or environmental conditions, making it well-suited for real-world applications. Its effectiveness is validated on two distinct real-world vibration datasets, including a bridge and a gearbox. The results demonstrate robustness to operational variability, strong generalization capability, and good performance in both damage detection and quantification.

AI.tldr: 提出自监督无标签解耦表示学习框架，用于振动信号的结构损伤识别，通过VICReg正则化和频域约束实现损伤相关特征与干扰因素的解耦。
AI.motivation: 结构健康监测中的损伤识别在实际应用中常受到激励和环境变化等非损伤因素的干扰，这些因素引起的变化可能比结构损伤本身更大，影响损伤识别的可靠性。
AI.method: 采用具有两个潜在表示的自编码器直接从原始振动加速度信号学习。通过VICReg自监督不变性正则化使一个潜在表示对操作和环境变化保持不变，同时引入频域约束确保重建的功率谱密度与输入时间序列一致，实现损伤特征与干扰因素的解耦。
AI.result: 在两个真实振动数据集（桥梁和齿轮箱）上验证了有效性，结果表明该方法对操作变化具有鲁棒性，具有强大的泛化能力，在损伤检测和量化方面表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该框架以完全端到端和无标签的方式训练，无需损伤、激励或环境条件的先验信息，适合实际应用，能够实现稳健的振动基结构损伤识别。

title: Paparazzo: Active Mapping of Moving 3D Objects
comment: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026
summary: Current 3D mapping pipelines generally assume static environments, which limits their ability to accurately capture and reconstruct moving objects. To address this limitation, we introduce the novel task of active mapping of moving objects, in which a mapping agent must plan its trajectory while compensating for the object's motion. Our approach, Paparazzo, provides a learning-free solution that robustly predicts the target's trajectory and identifies the most informative viewpoints from which to observe it, to plan its own path. We also contribute a comprehensive benchmark designed for this new task. Through extensive experiments, we show that Paparazzo significantly improves 3D reconstruction completeness and accuracy compared to several strong baselines, marking an important step toward dynamic scene understanding. Project page: https://davidea97.github.io/paparazzo-page/

AI.tldr: 提出主动映射移动物体的新任务，开发无需学习的Paparazzo方法，通过预测目标轨迹和选择最优视角来规划路径，显著提升动态场景的3D重建质量
AI.motivation: 现有3D映射方法通常假设静态环境，无法准确捕捉和重建移动物体，这限制了动态场景的理解能力
AI.method: 提出Paparazzo方法：无需学习，通过鲁棒预测目标运动轨迹，识别最富信息的观测视角，并规划自身路径来主动映射移动物体
AI.result: 相比多个强基线方法，Paparazzo显著提高了3D重建的完整性和准确性，为动态场景理解迈出重要一步
AI.conclusion: 提出了主动映射移动物体的新任务和解决方案，开发了相应基准测试，展示了在动态场景理解方面的重要进展

title: EgoSelf: From Memory to Personalized Egocentric Assistant
summary: Egocentric assistants often rely on first-person view data to capture user behavior and context for personalized services. Since different users exhibit distinct habits, preferences, and routines, such personalization is essential for truly effective assistance. However, effectively integrating long-term user data for personalization remains a key challenge. To address this, we introduce EgoSelf, a system that includes a graph-based interaction memory constructed from past observations and a dedicated learning task for personalization. The memory captures temporal and semantic relationships among interaction events and entities, from which user-specific profiles are derived. The personalized learning task is formulated as a prediction problem where the model predicts possible future interactions from individual user's historical behavior recorded in the graph. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of EgoSelf as a personalized egocentric assistant. Code is available at \href{https://abie-e.github.io/egoself_project/}{https://abie-e.github.io/egoself\_project/}.

AI.tldr: EgoSelf是一个基于图记忆的个性化自我中心助手系统，通过构建用户交互记忆图并设计个性化学习任务来预测用户未来行为。
AI.motivation: 自我中心助手需要个性化服务，但不同用户有不同的习惯、偏好和日常行为，有效整合长期用户数据以实现个性化仍然是一个关键挑战。
AI.method: 提出EgoSelf系统，包括：1）基于过去观察构建图结构的交互记忆，捕捉交互事件和实体之间的时间和语义关系；2）设计个性化学习任务，将其表述为预测问题，从用户历史行为图中预测可能的未来交互。
AI.result: 大量实验证明了EgoSelf作为个性化自我中心助手的有效性。
AI.conclusion: EgoSelf通过图记忆和个性化预测任务，有效解决了自我中心助手的个性化挑战，代码已开源。

title: Budgeted Online Influence Maximization
comment: 37th International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2020), 28 pages
summary: We introduce a new budgeted framework for online influence maximization, considering the total cost of an advertising campaign instead of the common cardinality constraint on a chosen influencer set. Our approach better models the real-world setting where the cost of influencers varies and advertisers want to find the best value for their overall social advertising budget. We propose an algorithm assuming an independent cascade diffusion model and edge level semi-bandit feedback, and provide both theoretical and experimental results. Our analysis is also valid for the cardinality constraint setting and improves the state of the art regret bound in this case.

AI.tldr: 提出新的预算约束在线影响力最大化框架，用总成本替代传统基数约束，更贴合现实广告投放场景
AI.motivation: 现实世界中影响者成本各不相同，广告主希望用有限预算获得最大价值，传统基于影响者数量的约束无法准确建模这一场景
AI.method: 提出新算法，基于独立级联传播模型和边级半赌博反馈，考虑可变成本的影响者选择
AI.result: 提供理论分析和实验结果，算法在基数约束设置下也能改进现有最优遗憾界
AI.conclusion: 预算约束框架更贴合实际广告投放需求，提出的算法在理论和实验上均有良好表现

title: PREF-XAI: Preference-Based Personalized Rule Explanations of Black-Box Machine Learning Models
summary: Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has predominantly focused on generating model-centric explanations that approximate the behavior of black-box models. However, such explanations often overlook a fundamental aspect of interpretability: different users require different explanations depending on their goals, preferences, and cognitive constraints. Although recent work has explored user-centric and personalized explanations, most existing approaches rely on heuristic adaptations or implicit user modeling, lacking a principled framework for representing and learning individual preferences. In this paper, we consider Preference-Based Explainable Artificial Intelligence (PREF-XAI), a novel perspective that reframes explanation as a preference-driven decision problem. Within PREF-XAI, explanations are not treated as fixed outputs, but as alternatives to be evaluated and selected according to user-specific criteria. In the PREF-XAI perspective, here we propose a methodology that combines rule-based explanations with formal preference learning. User preferences are elicited through a ranking of a small set of candidate explanations and modeled via an additive utility function inferred using robust ordinal regression. Experimental results on real-world datasets show that PREF-XAI can accurately reconstruct user preferences from limited feedback, identify highly relevant explanations, and discover novel explanatory rules not initially considered by the user. Beyond the proposed methodology, this work establishes a connection between XAI and preference learning, opening new directions for interactive and adaptive explanation systems.

AI.tldr: PREF-XAI提出了一种基于偏好的可解释人工智能新视角，将解释视为偏好驱动的决策问题，通过偏好学习为用户提供个性化解释。
AI.motivation: 现有XAI方法主要关注模型中心的解释，忽略了不同用户因目标、偏好和认知约束需要不同解释这一根本问题。虽然已有用户中心和个性化解释的研究，但大多依赖启发式调整或隐式用户建模，缺乏表示和学习个体偏好的原则性框架。
AI.method: 提出PREF-XAI框架，将解释视为偏好驱动的决策问题。结合基于规则的解释和形式化偏好学习，通过用户对少量候选解释的排序来获取偏好，使用鲁棒序数回归推断加性效用函数来建模用户偏好。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的实验表明，PREF-XAI能够从有限的反馈中准确重建用户偏好，识别高度相关的解释，并发现用户最初未考虑的新解释规则。
AI.conclusion: PREF-XAI建立了XAI与偏好学习之间的连接，为交互式和自适应解释系统开辟了新方向，强调解释应作为根据用户特定标准评估和选择的备选方案。

title: TransSplat: Unbalanced Semantic Transport for Language-Driven 3DGS Editing
summary: Language-driven 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) editing provides a more convenient approach for modifying complex scenes in VR/AR. Standard pipelines typically adopt a two-stage strategy: first editing multiple 2D views, and then optimizing the 3D representation to match these edited observations. Existing methods mainly improve view consistency through multi-view feature fusion, attention filtering, or iterative recalibration. However, they fail to explicitly address a more fundamental issue: the semantic correspondence between edited 2D evidence and 3D Gaussians. To tackle this problem, we propose TransSplat, which formulates language-driven 3DGS editing as a multi-view unbalanced semantic transport problem. Specifically, our method establishes correspondences between visible Gaussians and view-specific editing prototypes, thereby explicitly characterizing the semantic relationship between edited 2D evidence and 3D Gaussians. It further recovers a cross-view shared canonical 3D edit field to guide unified 3D appearance updates. In addition, we use transport residuals to suppress erroneous edits in non-target regions, mitigating edit leakage and improving local control precision. Qualitative and quantitative results show that, compared with existing 3D editing methods centered on enhancing view consistency, TransSplat achieves superior performance in local editing accuracy and structural consistency.

AI.tldr: TransSplat通过将语言驱动的3D高斯泼溅编辑建模为多视角不平衡语义传输问题，建立2D编辑证据与3D高斯之间的语义对应关系，提升局部编辑精度和结构一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有3DGS编辑方法主要关注提升视角一致性，但未能解决一个更根本的问题：编辑后的2D证据与3D高斯之间的语义对应关系。这限制了局部编辑的准确性和结构一致性。
AI.method: 提出TransSplat方法，将语言驱动的3DGS编辑建模为多视角不平衡语义传输问题。建立可见高斯与视角特定编辑原型之间的对应关系，显式表征2D编辑证据与3D高斯的语义关系。恢复跨视角共享的规范3D编辑场来指导统一的3D外观更新，并使用传输残差抑制非目标区域的错误编辑。
AI.result: 定性和定量结果表明，与现有专注于增强视角一致性的3D编辑方法相比，TransSplat在局部编辑精度和结构一致性方面实现了更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模2D编辑证据与3D高斯之间的语义对应关系，TransSplat有效解决了现有方法忽略的根本问题，在语言驱动的3DGS编辑中实现了更好的局部控制和结构一致性。

title: Planning in entropy-regularized Markov decision processes and games
summary: We propose SmoothCruiser, a new planning algorithm for estimating the value function in entropy-regularized Markov decision processes and two-player games, given a generative model of the environment. SmoothCruiser makes use of the smoothness of the Bellman operator promoted by the regularization to achieve problem-independent sample complexity of order O~(1/epsilon^4) for a desired accuracy epsilon, whereas for non-regularized settings there are no known algorithms with guaranteed polynomial sample complexity in the worst case.

AI.tldr: SmoothCruiser是一种用于熵正则化MDP和双人博弈的新规划算法，在给定环境生成模型的情况下，能以O~(1/ε⁴)的样本复杂度估计值函数，优于非正则化设置。
AI.motivation: 在非正则化马尔可夫决策过程和博弈中，目前没有已知算法能在最坏情况下保证多项式样本复杂度。熵正则化通过促进贝尔曼算子的平滑性，为设计具有理论保证的算法提供了机会。
AI.method: SmoothCruiser利用熵正则化带来的贝尔曼算子平滑性，设计了一种新的规划算法。该算法在给定环境生成模型的情况下，通过问题无关的样本复杂度来估计值函数。
AI.result: 算法实现了O~(1/ε⁴)的样本复杂度（其中ε为期望精度），这是首个在最坏情况下具有多项式样本复杂度保证的算法，优于非正则化设置中的现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 熵正则化通过促进贝尔曼算子的平滑性，使得设计具有理论保证的规划算法成为可能。SmoothCruiser展示了正则化在改善样本复杂度方面的优势，为非正则化设置提供了新的研究方向。

title: SmartPhotoCrafter: Unified Reasoning, Generation and Optimization for Automatic Photographic Image Editing
summary: Traditional photographic image editing typically requires users to possess sufficient aesthetic understanding to provide appropriate instructions for adjusting image quality and camera parameters. However, this paradigm relies on explicit human instruction of aesthetic intent, which is often ambiguous, incomplete, or inaccessible to non-expert users. In this work, we propose SmartPhotoCrafter, an automatic photographic image editing method which formulates image editing as a tightly coupled reasoning-to-generation process. The proposed model first performs image quality comprehension and identifies deficiencies by the Image Critic module, and then the Photographic Artist module realizes targeted edits to enhance image appeal, eliminating the need for explicit human instructions. A multi-stage training pipeline is adopted: (i) Foundation pretraining to establish basic aesthetic understanding and editing capabilities, (ii) Adaptation with reasoning-guided multi-edit supervision to incorporate rich semantic guidance, and (iii) Coordinated reasoning-to generation reinforcement learning to jointly optimize reasoning and generation. During training, SmartPhotoCrafter emphasizes photo-realistic image generation, while supporting both image restoration and retouching tasks with consistent adherence to color- and tone-related semantics. We also construct a stage-specific dataset, which progressively builds reasoning and controllable generation, effective cross-module collaboration, and ultimately high-quality photographic enhancement. Experiments demonstrate that SmartPhotoCrafter outperforms existing generative models on the task of automatic photographic enhancement, achieving photo-realistic results while exhibiting higher tonal sensitivity to retouching instructions. Project page: https://github.com/vivoCameraResearch/SmartPhotoCrafter.

AI.tldr: SmartPhotoCrafter是一个自动摄影图像编辑系统，通过推理到生成的紧密耦合过程，无需用户提供明确的美学指令即可自动增强图像质量。
AI.motivation: 传统摄影图像编辑需要用户具备足够的美学理解能力来提供适当的调整指令，但这种方法依赖明确的人类美学意图指导，而这些意图往往模糊、不完整或非专业用户难以表达。
AI.method: 提出一个紧密耦合的推理到生成过程：Image Critic模块进行图像质量理解并识别缺陷，Photographic Artist模块实现针对性编辑以增强图像吸引力。采用多阶段训练流程：基础预训练、推理引导的多编辑监督适应、协调的推理到生成强化学习。
AI.result: 实验表明SmartPhotoCrafter在自动摄影增强任务上优于现有生成模型，实现了照片级真实感结果，同时对调色指令表现出更高的色调敏感性。
AI.conclusion: SmartPhotoCrafter通过自动化的推理到生成框架，消除了对明确人类美学指令的依赖，为非专业用户提供了高质量的自动摄影图像编辑能力。

title: On two ways to use determinantal point processes for Monte Carlo integration
summary: The standard Monte Carlo estimator $\widehat{I}_N^{\mathrm{MC}}$ of $\int fdω$ relies on independent samples from $ω$ and has variance of order $1/N$. Replacing the samples with a determinantal point process (DPP), a repulsive distribution, makes the estimator consistent, with variance rates that depend on how the DPP is adapted to $f$ and $ω$. We examine two existing DPP-based estimators: one by Bardenet & Hardy (2020) with a rate of $\mathcal{O}(N^{-(1+1/d)})$ for smooth $f$, but relying on a fixed DPP. The other, by Ermakov & Zolotukhin (1960), is unbiased with rate of order $1/N$, like Monte Carlo, but its DPP is tailored to $f$. We revisit these estimators, generalize them to continuous settings, and provide sampling algorithms.

AI.tldr: 论文研究基于确定性点过程(DPP)的蒙特卡洛积分估计器，比较了两种现有DPP方法：一种固定DPP具有超线性收敛率，另一种针对特定函数的DPP具有与标准MC相同的收敛率。
AI.motivation: 标准蒙特卡洛估计器使用独立样本，方差为O(1/N)。使用具有排斥性质的确定性点过程(DPP)作为样本可以改进估计器性能，但现有DPP方法各有优缺点：一种收敛更快但DPP固定，另一种无偏但需要针对特定函数定制DPP。
AI.method: 重新审视两种现有DPP估计器：1) Bardenet & Hardy (2020)方法使用固定DPP，对光滑函数f达到O(N^{-(1+1/d)})收敛率；2) Ermakov & Zolotukhin (1960)方法使用针对f定制的DPP，无偏且具有O(1/N)收敛率。将这两种方法推广到连续设置，并提供采样算法。
AI.result: 论文系统分析比较了两种DPP基估计器的理论性质：固定DPP方法在光滑函数条件下具有超线性收敛优势，而定制DPP方法保持无偏性且收敛率与标准MC相同。提供了连续设置的推广和实际采样算法。
AI.conclusion: DPP基蒙特卡洛估计器提供了标准独立采样之外的替代方案，在特定条件下可以改进收敛性能。两种方法各有适用场景：固定DPP适合光滑函数且能获得更快收敛，定制DPP保持无偏性但需要针对特定函数设计。论文为实际应用提供了理论框架和算法实现。

title: Structure-Semantic Decoupled Modulation of Global Geospatial Embeddings for High-Resolution Remote Sensing Mapping
summary: Fine-grained high-resolution remote sensing mapping typically relies on localized visual features, which restricts cross-domain generalizability and often leads to fragmented predictions of large-scale land covers. While global geospatial foundation models offer powerful, generalizable representations, directly fusing their high-dimensional implicit embeddings with high-resolution visual features frequently triggers feature interference and spatial structure degradation due to a severe semantic-spatial gap. To overcome these limitations, we propose a Structure-Semantic Decoupled Modulation (SSDM) framework, which decouples global geospatial representations into two complementary cross-modal injection pathways. First, the structural prior modulation branch introduces the macroscopic receptive field priors from global representations into the self-attention modules of the high-resolution encoder. By guiding local feature extraction with holistic structural constraints, it effectively suppresses prediction fragmentation caused by high-frequency detail noise and excessive intra-class variance. Second, the global semantic injection branch explicitly aligns holistic context with the deep high-resolution feature space and directly supplements global semantics via cross-modal integration, thereby significantly enhancing the semantic consistency and category-level discrimination of complex land covers. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to existing cross-modal fusion approaches. By unleashing the potential of global embeddings, SSDM consistently improves high-resolution mapping accuracy across diverse scenarios, providing a universal and effective paradigm for integrating geospatial foundation models into high-resolution vision tasks.

AI.tldr: SSDM框架通过解耦全局地理空间表示，使用结构先验调制和全局语义注入两条路径，有效融合地理基础模型与高分辨率视觉特征，提升遥感制图精度
AI.motivation: 传统细粒度高分辨率遥感制图依赖局部视觉特征，导致跨域泛化能力差和大尺度地表覆盖预测碎片化。现有方法直接融合全局地理基础模型的高维隐式嵌入与高分辨率特征时，由于严重的语义-空间鸿沟，常引发特征干扰和空间结构退化
AI.method: 提出结构-语义解耦调制（SSDM）框架，将全局地理空间表示解耦为两条互补的跨模态注入路径：1）结构先验调制分支，将全局表示的宏观感受野先验引入高分辨率编码器的自注意力模块；2）全局语义注入分支，显式对齐整体上下文与深层高分辨率特征空间，通过跨模态集成直接补充全局语义
AI.result: 大量实验表明，该方法相比现有跨模态融合方法实现了最先进的性能。通过释放全局嵌入的潜力，SSDM在不同场景下持续提高高分辨率制图精度
AI.conclusion: SSDM为将地理空间基础模型集成到高分辨率视觉任务中提供了一个通用有效的范式，通过解耦调制策略解决了特征干扰和空间结构退化问题

title: Ultrametric OGP - parametric RDT \emph{symmetric} binary perceptron connection
summary:
In [97,99,100], an fl-RDT framework is introduced to characterize \emph{statistical computational gaps} (SCGs). Studying \emph{symmetric binary perceptrons} (SBPs), [100] obtained an \emph{algorithmic} threshold estimate $α_a\approx α_c^{(7)}\approx 1.6093$ at the 7th lifting level (for $κ=1$ margin), closely approaching $1.58$ local entropy (LE) prediction [18].
  In this paper, we further connect parametric RDT to overlap gap properties (OGPs), another key geometric feature of the solution space. Specifically, for any positive integer $s$, we consider $s$-level ultrametric OGPs ($ult_s$-OGPs) and rigorously upper-bound the associated constraint densities $α_{ult_s}$. To achieve this, we develop an analytical union-bounding program consisting of combinatorial and probabilistic components. By casting the combinatorial part as a convex problem and the probabilistic part as a nested integration, we conduct numerical evaluations and obtain that the tightest bounds at the first two levels, $\barα_{ult_1} \approx 1.6578$ and $\barα_{ult_2} \approx 1.6219$, closely approach the 3rd and 4th lifting level parametric RDT estimates, $α_c^{(3)} \approx 1.6576$ and $α_c^{(4)} \approx 1.6218$. We also observe excellent agreement across other key parameters, including overlap values and the relative sizes of ultrametric clusters.
  Based on these observations, we propose several conjectures linking $ult$-OGP and parametric RDT. Specifically, we conjecture that algorithmic threshold $α_a=\lim_{s\rightarrow\infty} α_{ult_s} = \lim_{s\rightarrow\infty} \barα{ult_s} = \lim_{r\rightarrow\infty} α_{c}^{(r)}$, and $α_{ult_s} \leq α_{c}^{(s+2)}$ (with possible equality for some (maybe even all) $s$). Finally, we discuss the potential existence of a full isomorphism connecting all key parameters of $ult$-OGP and parametric RDT.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了参数化RDT与重叠间隙性质(OGPs)的理论联系，通过分析s级超度量OGPs，获得了约束密度的严格上界，发现其与参数化RDT估计值高度一致，并提出了关于算法阈值和两种方法等价性的猜想。
AI.motivation: 先前研究提出了fl-RDT框架来刻画统计计算间隙(SCGs)，并在对称二元感知器(SBPs)中获得了算法阈值估计。本文旨在进一步连接参数化RDT与解空间的另一个关键几何特征——重叠间隙性质(OGPs)，探索两者之间的理论联系。
AI.method:
1. 考虑s级超度量OGPs(ult_s-OGPs)并严格上界相关的约束密度α_ult_s
2. 开发包含组合和概率分量的解析联合边界程序
3. 将组合部分转化为凸问题，概率部分转化为嵌套积分
4. 进行数值评估，获得前两个层级的最紧边界
AI.result:
1. 获得ult_1和ult_2层级的最紧边界：ᾱ_ult_1 ≈ 1.6578，ᾱ_ult_2 ≈ 1.6219
2. 这些边界与第3和第4层级参数化RDT估计值高度一致：α_c^(3) ≈ 1.6576，α_c^(4) ≈ 1.6218
3. 在其他关键参数(包括重叠值和超度量簇的相对大小)上也观察到极好的一致性
AI.conclusion: 基于观察结果提出了几个连接ult-OGP和参数化RDT的猜想：算法阈值α_a等于两个极限的极限值，且α_ult_s ≤ α_c^(s+2)(可能在某些或所有s上相等)。最后讨论了ult-OGP和参数化RDT所有关键参数之间可能存在完全同构关系。

title: PC2Model: ISPRS benchmark on 3D point cloud to model registration
summary: Point cloud registration involves aligning one point cloud with another or with a three-dimensional (3D) model, enabling the integration of multimodal data into a unified representation. This is essential in applications such as construction monitoring, autonomous driving, robotics, and virtual or augmented reality (VR/AR).With the increasing accessibility of point cloud acquisition technologies, such as Light Detection and Ranging (LiDAR) and structured light scanning, along with recent advances in deep learning, the research focus has increasingly shifted towards downstream tasks, particularly point cloud-to-model (PC2Model) registration. While data-driven methods aim to automate this process, they struggle with sparsity, noise, clutter, and occlusions in real-world scans, which limit their performance. To address these challenges, this paper introduces the PC2Model benchmark, a publicly available dataset designed to support the training and evaluation of both classical and data-driven methods. Developed under the leadership of ICWG II/Ib, the PC2Model benchmark adopts a hybrid design that combines simulated point clouds with, in some cases, real-world scans and their corresponding 3D models. Simulated data provide precise ground truth and controlled conditions, while real-world data introduce sensor and environmental artefacts. This design supports robust training and evaluation across domains and enables the systematic analysis of model transferability from simulated to real-world scenarios. The dataset is publicly accessible at: https://zenodo.org/uploads/17581812.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了PC2Model基准数据集，用于点云到三维模型配准任务的训练和评估，结合模拟数据和真实扫描数据以解决实际应用中的稀疏性、噪声和遮挡等问题。
AI.motivation: 随着点云获取技术（如LiDAR和结构光扫描）的普及和深度学习的发展，研究重点转向下游任务，特别是点云到模型配准。然而，数据驱动方法在处理真实世界扫描中的稀疏性、噪声、杂乱和遮挡时表现不佳，限制了其性能。
AI.method: 提出了PC2Model基准数据集，采用混合设计：结合模拟点云（提供精确地面真值和受控条件）和部分真实世界扫描及其对应的3D模型（引入传感器和环境伪影）。该数据集由ICWG II/Ib领导开发。
AI.result: 创建了一个公开可用的数据集，支持经典和数据驱动方法的训练和评估，并能够系统分析模型从模拟到真实场景的可迁移性。数据集已在Zenodo平台公开。
AI.conclusion: PC2Model基准通过混合设计解决了点云配准中的实际挑战，为研究社区提供了支持跨领域鲁棒训练和评估的资源，促进了从模拟到真实世界场景的系统性模型迁移分析。

title: Adaptive MSD-Splitting: Enhancing C4.5 and Random Forests for Skewed Continuous Attributes
summary: The discretization of continuous numerical attributes remains a persistent computational bottleneck in the induction of decision trees, particularly as dataset dimensions scale. Building upon the recently proposed MSD-Splitting technique -- which bins continuous data using the empirical mean and standard deviation to dramatically improve the efficiency and accuracy of the C4.5 algorithm -- we introduce Adaptive MSD-Splitting (AMSD). While standard MSD-Splitting is highly effective for approximately symmetric distributions, its rigid adherence to fixed one-standard-deviation cutoffs can lead to catastrophic information loss in highly skewed data, a common artifact in real-world biomedical and financial datasets. AMSD addresses this by dynamically adjusting the standard deviation multiplier based on feature skewness, narrowing intervals in dense regions to preserve discriminative resolution. Furthermore, we integrate AMSD into ensemble methods, specifically presenting the Random Forest-AMSD (RF-AMSD) framework. Empirical evaluations on the Census Income, Heart Disease, Breast Cancer, and Forest Covertype datasets demonstrate that AMSD yields a 2-4% accuracy improvement over standard MSD-Splitting, while maintaining near-identical O(N) time complexity reductions compared to the O(N log N) exhaustive search. Our Random Forest extension achieves state-of-the-art accuracy at a fraction of standard computational costs, confirming the viability of adaptive statistical binning in large-scale ensemble learning architectures.

AI.tldr: AMSD方法通过动态调整标准差乘数来改进MSD-Splitting技术，解决了在偏斜分布数据中的信息丢失问题，并在集成学习中实现了更高的准确性和计算效率。
AI.motivation: 连续数值属性的离散化是决策树归纳中的计算瓶颈。虽然MSD-Splitting技术使用均值和标准差分箱提高了C4.5算法的效率和准确性，但其固定的标准差截断方法在处理高度偏斜数据（如生物医学和金融数据集）时会导致灾难性的信息丢失。
AI.method: 提出了自适应MSD-Splitting（AMSD）方法，根据特征偏度动态调整标准差乘数，在密集区域缩小间隔以保持分辨能力。还将AMSD集成到集成方法中，提出了Random Forest-AMSD（RF-AMSD）框架。
AI.result: 在Census Income、Heart Disease、Breast Cancer和Forest Covertype数据集上的实验表明，AMSD比标准MSD-Splitting提高了2-4%的准确率，同时保持了与O(N log N)穷举搜索相比近似的O(N)时间复杂度降低。RF-AMSD框架以标准计算成本的一小部分实现了最先进的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 自适应统计分箱在大规模集成学习架构中是可行的，AMSD方法在保持计算效率的同时显著提高了处理偏斜分布数据的准确性。

title: Benign Overfitting in Adversarial Training for Vision Transformers
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2409.19345 by other authors
summary: Despite the remarkable success of Vision Transformers (ViTs) across a wide range of vision tasks, recent studies have revealed that they remain vulnerable to adversarial examples, much like Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). A common empirical defense strategy is adversarial training, yet the theoretical underpinnings of its robustness in ViTs remain largely unexplored. In this work, we present the first theoretical analysis of adversarial training under simplified ViT architectures. We show that, when trained under a signal-to-noise ratio that satisfies a certain condition and within a moderate perturbation budget, adversarial training enables ViTs to achieve nearly zero robust training loss and robust generalization error under certain regimes. Remarkably, this leads to strong generalization even in the presence of overfitting, a phenomenon known as \emph{benign overfitting}, previously only observed in CNNs (with adversarial training). Experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets further validate our theoretical findings.

AI.tldr: 本文首次对简化版Vision Transformers的对抗训练进行了理论分析，证明了在特定条件下对抗训练能使ViTs实现近乎零的鲁棒训练损失和泛化误差，甚至在过拟合情况下也能保持强泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管Vision Transformers在各种视觉任务中取得了显著成功，但研究表明它们与CNN一样容易受到对抗样本的攻击。对抗训练是常见的防御策略，但其在ViTs中的鲁棒性理论基础尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 对简化版ViT架构进行理论分析，研究在满足特定信噪比条件和适度扰动预算下，对抗训练如何影响ViTs的性能。通过合成和真实世界数据集进行实验验证。
AI.result: 理论分析表明，在特定条件下，对抗训练能使ViTs实现近乎零的鲁棒训练损失和泛化误差。即使在过拟合情况下也能保持强泛化能力，这种现象被称为"良性过拟合"，之前仅在CNN中观察到。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为ViTs的对抗训练提供了理论支撑，证明了在适当条件下对抗训练能够有效提升ViTs的鲁棒性，甚至在过拟合情况下也能实现良好的泛化性能，为ViTs的鲁棒性研究提供了新的理论视角。

title: GRAFT: Geometric Refinement and Fitting Transformer for Human Scene Reconstruction
summary:
Reconstructing physically plausible 3D human-scene interactions (HSI) from a single image currently presents a trade-off: optimization based methods offer accurate contact but are slow (~20s), while feed-forward approaches are fast yet lack explicit interaction reasoning, producing floating and interpenetration artifacts.
  Our key insight is that geometry-based human--scene fitting can be amortized into fast feed-forward inference. We present GRAFT (Geometric Refinement And Fitting Transformer), a learned HSI prior that predicts Interaction Gradients: corrective parameter updates that iteratively refine human meshes by reasoning about their 3D relationship to the surrounding scene.
  GRAFT encodes the interaction state into compact body-anchored tokens, each grounded in the scene geometry via Geometric Probes that capture spatial relationships with nearby surfaces.
  A lightweight transformer recurrently updates human meshes and re-probes the scene, ensuring the final pose aligns with both learned priors and observed geometry.
  GRAFT operates either as an end-to-end reconstructor using image features, or with geometry alone as a transferable plug-and-play HSI prior that improves feed-forward methods without retraining.
  Experiments show GRAFT improves interaction quality by up to 113% over state-of-the-art feed-forward methods and matches optimization-based interaction quality at ${\sim}50{\times}$ lower runtime, while generalizing seamlessly to in-the-wild multi-person scenes and being preferred in 64.8% of three-way user study. Project page: https://pradyumnaym.github.io/graft .

AI.tldr: GRAFT是一种快速的人-场景交互重建方法，通过预测交互梯度来迭代优化人体网格，在保持优化方法精度的同时实现50倍加速
AI.motivation: 当前单图像3D人-场景交互重建存在权衡：优化方法准确但慢（~20秒），前馈方法快但缺乏显式交互推理，产生漂浮和穿透伪影
AI.method: GRAFT通过学习的人-场景交互先验预测交互梯度，使用几何探针编码交互状态到身体锚定标记，通过轻量级transformer递归更新人体网格并重新探测场景
AI.result: GRAFT比最先进的前馈方法提升交互质量达113%，匹配优化方法质量的同时运行时间降低50倍，在用户研究中64.8%被偏好
AI.conclusion: GRAFT成功将几何拟合摊销到快速前馈推理中，可作为端到端重建器或可转移的即插即用先验，显著提升人-场景交互重建的质量和效率

title: FB-NLL: A Feature-Based Approach to Tackle Noisy Labels in Personalized Federated Learning
summary:
Personalized Federated Learning (PFL) aims to learn multiple task-specific models rather than a single global model across heterogeneous data distributions. Existing PFL approaches typically rely on iterative optimization-such as model update trajectories-to cluster users that need to accomplish the same tasks together. However, these learning-dynamics-based methods are inherently vulnerable to low-quality data and noisy labels, as corrupted updates distort clustering decisions and degrade personalization performance. To tackle this, we propose FB-NLL, a feature-centric framework that decouples user clustering from iterative training dynamics. By exploiting the intrinsic heterogeneity of local feature spaces, FB-NLL characterizes each user through the spectral structure of the covariances of their feature representations and leverages subspace similarity to identify task-consistent user groupings. This geometry-aware clustering is label-agnostic and is performed in a one-shot manner prior to training, significantly reducing communication overhead and computational costs compared to iterative baselines.
  Complementing this, we introduce a feature-consistency-based detection and correction strategy to address noisy labels within clusters. By leveraging directional alignment in the learned feature space and assigning labels based on class-specific feature subspaces, our method mitigates corrupted supervision without requiring estimation of stochastic noise transition matrices. In addition, FB-NLL is model-independent and integrates seamlessly with existing noise-robust training techniques. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets and noise regimes demonstrate that our framework consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in terms of average accuracy and performance stability.

AI.tldr: FB-NLL：一种基于特征而非学习动态的个性化联邦学习框架，通过谱结构分析实现一次性用户聚类，并引入特征一致性策略处理噪声标签，显著降低通信开销并提升性能稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习动态的PFL方法容易受到低质量数据和噪声标签的影响，因为损坏的更新会扭曲聚类决策并降低个性化性能。需要一种能够解耦用户聚类与迭代训练动态的鲁棒方法。
AI.method: FB-NLL采用特征中心框架：1）利用局部特征空间的谱结构表征用户，通过子空间相似性一次性识别任务一致的用户分组；2）引入基于特征一致性的检测和校正策略处理噪声标签，利用学习特征空间中的方向对齐和类特定特征子空间分配标签。
AI.result: 在多种数据集和噪声机制下的实验表明，FB-NLL在平均准确率和性能稳定性方面持续优于现有最先进的基线方法，同时显著降低了通信开销和计算成本。
AI.conclusion: FB-NLL通过解耦用户聚类与训练动态，提供了一种对噪声鲁棒的个性化联邦学习框架，具有模型无关性且能与现有噪声鲁棒训练技术无缝集成，为异构数据分布下的多任务学习提供了有效解决方案。

title: FASTER: Value-Guided Sampling for Fast RL
summary: Some of the most performant reinforcement learning algorithms today can be prohibitively expensive as they use test-time scaling methods such as sampling multiple action candidates and selecting the best one. In this work, we propose FASTER, a method for getting the benefits of sampling-based test-time scaling of diffusion-based policies without the computational cost by tracing the performance gain of action samples back to earlier in the denoising process. Our key insight is that we can model the denoising of multiple action candidates and selecting the best one as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) where the goal is to progressively filter action candidates before denoising is complete. With this MDP, we can learn a policy and value function in the denoising space that predicts the downstream value of action candidates in the denoising process and filters them while maximizing returns. The result is a method that is lightweight and can be plugged into existing generative RL algorithms. Across challenging long-horizon manipulation tasks in online and batch-online RL, FASTER consistently improves the underlying policies and achieves the best overall performance among the compared methods. Applied to a pretrained VLA, FASTER achieves the same performance while substantially reducing training and inference compute requirements. Code is available at https://github.com/alexanderswerdlow/faster .

AI.tldr: FASTER是一种轻量级方法，通过将扩散策略的多候选动作采样建模为MDP，在去噪过程中早期预测并过滤动作候选，从而获得采样带来的性能提升但避免计算成本。
AI.motivation: 当前基于采样的强化学习方法（如扩散策略）在测试时需要采样多个动作候选并选择最佳，计算成本过高。需要一种方法既能获得采样带来的性能提升，又能避免高昂的计算开销。
AI.method: 将扩散策略中多个动作候选的去噪和选择过程建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），目标是在去噪完成前逐步过滤动作候选。通过学习去噪空间中的策略和价值函数，预测动作候选的下游价值并进行过滤，同时最大化回报。
AI.result: 在具有挑战性的长时程操作任务中，FASTER持续改进基础策略，在在线和批量在线强化学习中均取得最佳性能。应用于预训练的VLA时，FASTER在保持相同性能的同时显著降低了训练和推理的计算需求。
AI.conclusion: FASTER提供了一种轻量级方法，可以在不增加计算成本的情况下获得基于采样的测试时扩展带来的性能提升，可轻松集成到现有的生成式强化学习算法中。

title: CreatiParser: Generative Image Parsing of Raster Graphic Designs into Editable Layers
summary: Graphic design images consist of multiple editable layers, such as text, background, and decorative elements, while most generative models produce rasterized outputs without explicit layer structures, limiting downstream editing. Existing graphic design parsing methods typically rely on multi-stage pipelines combining layout prediction, matting, and inpainting, which suffer from error accumulation and limited controllability. We propose a hybrid generative framework for raster-to-layer graphic design parsing that decomposes a design image into editable text, background, and sticker layers. Text regions are parsed using a vision-language model into a text rendering protocol, enabling faithful reconstruction and flexible re-editing, while background and sticker layers are generated using a multi-branch diffusion architecture with RGBA support. We further introduce ParserReward and integrate it with Group Relative Policy Optimization to align generation quality with human design preferences. Extensive experiments on two challenging datasets, \emph{i.e.,} the Parser-40K and Crello datasets, demonstrate superior performance over existing methods, \emph{eg.,} achieving an overall average improvement of 23.7\% across all metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种混合生成框架，将栅格化设计图像分解为可编辑的文本、背景和贴纸图层，支持下游编辑
AI.motivation: 现有图形设计解析方法通常采用多阶段流水线，存在错误累积和可控性有限的问题，而大多数生成模型输出的栅格化结果缺乏明确的图层结构，限制了后续编辑
AI.method: 提出混合生成框架：使用视觉语言模型解析文本区域为文本渲染协议；使用支持RGBA的多分支扩散架构生成背景和贴纸图层；引入ParserReward并结合Group Relative Policy Optimization来对齐人类设计偏好
AI.result: 在两个具有挑战性的数据集（Parser-40K和Crello）上进行了广泛实验，在所有指标上平均提升了23.7%，性能优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够有效地将栅格化设计图像解析为可编辑的图层结构，解决了现有方法的局限性，为图形设计的下游编辑提供了更好的支持

title: Safe Continual Reinforcement Learning in Non-stationary Environments
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) offers a compelling data-driven paradigm for synthesizing controllers for complex systems when accurate physical models are unavailable; however, most existing control-oriented RL methods assume stationarity and, therefore, struggle in real-world non-stationary deployments where system dynamics and operating conditions can change unexpectedly. Moreover, RL controllers acting in physical environments must satisfy safety constraints throughout their learning and execution phases, rendering transient violations during adaptation unacceptable.
